Uthe abakutholile ukuthi kwakudlalelwa isiteki, abangasazi ukuthi esamalini. Uthe umyalezo bawuthola ngomunye ayehambe naye ukuya ebholeni, kwathi uma befika, bathola sekufike namaphoyisa, eseqinisekisile ukuthi useshonile. UMphathiswa woMnyango wezokuThuthukiswa koMphakathi uNksz Mbali Shinga ubezovakashela umndeni kamufi izolo. Esitatimendeni esithunyelelwe abezindaba ukududuza umndeni, abangani nomphakathi waKwaNongoma, uNksz Shinga uzwakalise ukushaqeka nokuphatheka kabi ngesigameko. “Isigameko siyisikhumbuzo esibuhlungu sokuthi kufanele kugqugquzelwe indaba yokuxazulula ukungaboni ngaso linye ngendlela enokuthula ikakhulukazi kubantu abasha abazibandakanya kwezemidlalo,” kusho uNksz Shinga. Uthe ngale kokuyokhalisa umndeni kamufi, bazophinde bawuhlinzeke ngosizo lokwelulekwa ngokomqondo kulandela isigameko. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uSergeant Thenjiswa Ngcobo, uthe amaphoyisa aKwaNongoma abophe owesilisa oneminyaka engu-19 ngecala lokubulala kulandela isigameko sokubulawa kowesilisa. “Ushaywe washona ngoMeyi 7, 2026 KwaMajomela,” kusho uSerg Ngcobo. Uthe umsolwa uvele eNkantolo yeMantshi yaKwaNongoma ngoMsombuluko.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: NKOSINATHI Emmanuel Mzobe USEZE wonda nasemzimbeni owesifazane waseMthebeni, eNdwedwe, kulandela ukuphela kwezinyanga kwanyamalala indodana yakhe eyayisebenza njengonogada enkampanini yezimoto ezithwala imali. Ngokusho kukaNkk Joyce Mhlongo, indodana yakhe, uMnuz Nkosinathi Emmanuel Mzobe (36) yalahleka ngoDisemba 24 nyakenye. Elandisa ngesehlo uthe kwakungemuva kukaKhisimusi, ethola ucingo kowesifazane angamazi, owazethula njengesinqandamathe sikaMzobe, wathi umphathele umyalezo wokuthi ulahlekile. “Wangitshela ukuthi ufonelwe abangani bakhe (uMzobe), bemazisa ukuthi umjondolo wakhe osezakhiweni zase-Uganda eSiphingo, sekuphele izinsuku uvaliwe. Uthe owesifazane wamtshela ukuthi abangani bamtshela ukuthi bona bamgcine ngoDisemba 24, 2025, kade behleli naye khona e-Uganda,” kusho uNkk Mhlongo. Uqhube wathi waya khona ngakusasa, bahamba nowesifazane bayobika ngomuntu odukile emaphoyiseni aseSiphingo agcina ebadlulisela kwawaseMlaza, nokuyilapho bagcina bebika khona ngempumelelo. Uveze ukuthi abangani, athe wawanikwa amagama abo, abakaze bamthinte ukuze baziveze emndenini ukuthi babazana noMzobe. “Ngikhathazwa nawukuthi kungani bengezanga bazochaza ukuthi waphelelaphi njengoba kuyibo ababegcine ukubonakala naye,” usho kanje. Ukhale ngendlela amaphoyisa asingethe ngayo udaba, ethi wagcina kunezinhlelo zokuthi amaphoyisa azohloma imibuzo isinqandamathe kanjalo nabo abangani, okwagcina kungenzekanga. Uphinde wakhala ngokungalukhombisi uzwelo ephoyiseni elajutshwa ukuthi liphenye udaba. “Sagcina sesingasaboni ngaso linye, selingisola ngokuthi ngilifundisa umsebenzi walo uma nginemibuzo ngophenyo. Lokhu kwangizwisa ubuhlungu ngoba alibukhombisanga ubuntu, futhi alizange libe nesihe kimina ngingowesifazane ophithanelwe yikhanda ngokulahlekelwa yindodana ngendlela engaqondakali,” kusho uNkk Mhlongo. Uthe nangesikhathi sekushintshe uhlelo lokuthi ngeke abahlanu besaphoswa imibuzo, yena akaze aziswe ngalolo guquko. Uthe bekusinda kwehlela nangesikhathi kufanele kuyiwe emakhazeni kahulumeni ezindaweni ezehlukene, ukuyocinga ukuthi isidumbu sikaMzobe asikho yini kulezo ezisuke zilethiwe kuthiwa ezabangaziwal. Ubuye wathi umphenyi ubevele angabi khona, akhale ngokuba matasatasa ngamanye amacala abalulekile, yena agcine ezihambela yedwa. “Abasemakhazeni bebeze bangitshele ukuthi akuvumelekile ukuthi ngize ngedwa, kufanele ngiphelezelwe umseshi. Ngangisemakhazeni asePhoenix ngesikhathi umseshi efonelwa osebenza khona, wamtshela ukuthi umatasa yena,” usho kanje. Udalule ukuthi okunye  akuthola wukuthi emsebenzini wayegcine ngoDisemba 23, kanti ngakusasa wavuka waya emagaraji adayisa izimoto, ngenhloso yokuthenga eyodwa, ayezoza ngayo ekhaya. “Umzala wakhe okwathi uma esethola ukuthi ulahlekile, naye wathuka wacishe woma ethi ubenaye kanye nesinqandamathe sakhe ngesikhathi eyobheka imoto ayezoyithenga,” usho kanje. Uthe ngesikhathi sekugqekezwa emjondolo wendodana yakhe, akukho okusolisa ukuthi yahlaselwa phakathi, izimpahla zayo eziningi zazikhona futhi zihleli kahle. “Ngisho nomfaniswano wakhe womsebenzi wawukhona,” kusho uNkk Mhlongo. Uthe iselula yayilokhu ivalekile uma bezama ukuyifonela kodwa abakuqaphelayo wukuthi akhona amalungu omndeni athunyelwa imiyalezo engaqondakali emva kukaKhisimusi. “Sisola ukuthi kwakungabantu abase beyithathile iselula yakhe,” kusho uNkk Mhlongo, othe lonke lolu lwazi waludlulisela emaphoyiseni kodwa akukho akwenza ngalo. Uthe akangabazi ukuthi kukhona okubi okwehlela indodana yakhe kwazise yayingesiye umuntu ovele asuke anyamalale nje. “Ukunyamalala kwakhe kunesandla somuntu. Ngangifisa ukuthi amaphoyisa abathathe laba abahlanu ayobaphosa imibuzo, mhlawumbe ukhona umkhondo ongavela. Ngiphatheke kabi ngokungalutholi usizo ngokunyamalala kwengane yami. Bengimkhulu ngomzimba, sengize ngancipha ngaba mncane,” kusho uNkk Mhlongo. Unxuse noma ubani ongaba nolwazi abikele amaphoyisa aseduze ngoba unesifiso sokuthola ithambo lendodana yakhe ukuze azidelise. Uthe indodana inendodakazi (14) abaqale bayifihlela ukuthi uyise udukile, nokho bagcina beyitshela, bebona kuhamba isikhathi bengawutholi umkhondo.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UMUFI uNksz Zinhle Simphiwe Mchunu KUVUKE umunyu emndenini wowesifazane okuthiwa wabulawa yisoka, lamgqiba ngepotimende ngoNovemba nyakenye, ngesikhathi iNyuvesi yaKwaZulu-Natal yedlulisela iziqu zakhe emndenini emcimbini wokwethweswa kweziqu wezitshudeni obungoLwesihlanu, eThekwini. Isidumbu sikaZinhle Simphiwe Mchunu (23) waseRoosboom, eMnambithi, owayenza unyaka wokugcina ezifundweni zobuthishela kule nyuvesi, satholwa sigqitshwe ngepotimende ethuneni  eduze kweflethi elalihlala isoka lakhe kwa-C, eMlaza, ngoDisemba 20, 2025. Ngesikhathi kutholwa isidumbu kwase kuphele inyanga edukile, njengoba kuthiwa wagcina ukubonwa ephila ngoNovemba 23, 2025. IKHADI elinomyalezo kanjalo nezimbali iNyuvesi yaKwaZulu-Natal ebilibhalele unina kamufi, kwanikwa umndeni ngosuku lweminyezane Udadewabo, uNksz Nolwazi Mchunu, utshele Isolezwe ukuthi siqale phansi sabhibha isilonda sokubulawa ngesihluku kukamufi. “Ngizwe usizi ngesikhathi kubizwa isitshudeni ebesiphambi kwegama lakhe ohlwini lwezitshudeni ebezithweswa iziqu, sasukuma, sayithweswa iziqu zaso. Kwathi uma sekubizwa elakhe, kwangasukuma muntu, kwaze kwazosukuma esinye ezimenyezwe emva kwakhe,” kusho uNksz Mchunu. Uthe yilapho ubuye khona ngamandla umuzwa wokuthi konje udadewabo akasekho emhlabeni futhi wabashiya ngendlela enesihluku. Uthe emva komcimbi, babizelwe eceleni bamukeliswa iziqu zikamufi, kanjalo nezimbali nekhadi ebelinomyalezo inyuvesi ebiwubhalele unina, inyuvesi imduduza isibili. Uthe unina kamufi akakwazanga uphumelela kulo mcimbi njengoba ewumuntu osebenzela kude. Uthe kubafikele emcabangweni yabo ukuthi ngabe ujabule into engachazeki umufi ukube lesi sikhathi sifike esadla anhlamvana. Uthe wayengumuntu ophokophelele phambili futhi enethemba lokuthi nakanjani ikusasa lakhe lizoqhakaza njengoba enza izifundo esikhungweni semfundo ephakeme. “Ngabe ubesezokhuluma eyokuthi ufuna umsebenzi ngoba iziqu zakhe usezitholile,” usho kanje. Uthe ubungakabi khona umnyakazo otheni ngecala njengoba namanje lingakaqali ukuqulwa. Uthe lisalokhu lihlehliswa eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseMlaza, kanti umsolwa, uMnuz Themba Xaba (24), usalokhu etoke ejele ngengoba engadedelwanga ngebheyili. Ngesikhathi kwenzeka isigameko, kuthiwa umufi - owayeseqedile ukubhala izivivinyo zokuphela konyaka wokugcina enyuvesi - wahamba endaweni ehlala abafundi ePinetown, ewumuntu oyovakashela isoka lakhe eMlaza. Kusolakala ukuthi baba nengxabano, umsolwa wambulala, wase emgqiba ngepotimende. Kuthiwa esembulele, wazenza umuntu ocela ukufuniswa yena, ebhala nasezinkundleni zokuxhumana ukuthi isinqandamathe sakhe sidukile, siphume sahamba ebusuku emva kwengxabano. Umndeni waba nemibuzo ngesikhathi usufika eflethini likamsolwa, ubuza ukuthi uma ezihambele, uhambe kanjani ebusuku washiya iselula nesikhwama semali, esasizomsiza akwazi ukukhokha imali yokugibela yala ayeya khona? Emva kokungagculiseki komndeni ngophenyo lwamaphoyisa olwamthatha umsolwa, wayophonswa ngemibuzo, maqede wadedelwa, kuthiwa akukho okuphathekayo okukhomba ukuthi uyathinteka, umndeni waziqashela umphenyi ozimele, owavundulula ukuthi empeleni umsolwa unesandla. Phakathi kolwazi olwatholwa umphenyi ozimele, olokuthi ngezinsuku okwanyamalala ngazo umufi, umsolwa wake waboleka amathuluzi okumba umgodi kumasitende wakhe, wathi kukhona afuna ukukwenza. Kwathi uma sekuphenywa eduze kweflethi, kwatholakala ithuna elingashoni lapho umsolwa ayegqibe khona umufi ngepotimende, kwabe zimkhalela kanjalo. ABOMNDENI kaZinhle Simphiwe Mchunu waseMnambithi obulawe ngonyaka edlule bemukela iziqu zakhe e-UKZN ngoLwesihlanu

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: KWEHLE izinyembezi kuThembisani Mntungwa othweswe iminyezane ephethe isikibha esinomyalezo wokukhumbula unina osanda kushona SIKHETHE ukukhumbula unina ongasekho ngokuthi sinyukele esteji sabagqokiswa iminyezane siphethe isikibha esibhalwe umyalezo ngokushona kwakhe, isitshudeni saseNyuvesi yaKwaZulu-Natal, ebesithweswa iziqu ngoLwesihlanu. UThembisani Mntungwa okhulele eMalukazi, ngaseSipingo, uthweswa iziqu zeBachelor of Social Science in Criminology and Forensic Studies nje, akukapheli nezinyanga ezimbili unina, uNksz Nondumiso Mntungwa (40), amshiyile emhlabeni. Isikibha abesiphethe esinesithombe sikanina besikhombisa ukuthi uhambe emhlabeni ngoMashi 21, nonyaka. Besibhalwe umyalezo othi: “Umuntu obehlale engigqugquzela ukubadlula bonke. Njengamanje usuyingelosi engigadile. Mama uyisizathu ngilana namuhla.” Elandisa ngokushona kukanina, uthe kushiye esikhulu isikhala. “Ngifisa sengathi ubekhona ukuthi siwujabulele ndawonye lo mzuzu. Sasiwuhlelele, saxoxa ngokuthi sizowubungaza kanjani. Ubengumama wami, engumngani futhi engeseka kakhulu,” kusho uMntungwa. Uthe ngokuya esteji nesikibha esinalo myalezo, ubefuna ukuthi umhlaba wonke wazi ukuthi iziqu zakhe, kahle hle zingezikanina. Ekhumbula okunye, uthe unina wadela okuningi ukuqinisekisa ukuthi yena nezingane zakwabo ezintathu ezimlamayo banakekelwa ngendlela eyiyo. “Ubengumsebenzi wasendlini, kuthi ngezinye izikhathi, ahambe ayodayisa emgwaqweni ukuqinisekisa ukuthi sihlale sinakho ukudla kanjalo nemali yokuphatha esikoleni,” kukhumbula uMntungwa. Uthe nangesikhathi eseqale ukuqhuba izifundo zakhe enyuvesi, unina ubehlale emshayela ucingo embheka ukuthi kuhamba kanjani, ambuze ngamamaki akhe. “Lezo bekuyizinto ezincane ebezibalulekile kimina, kuthi ngezikhathi ezinzima, lapho sengifuna ukuyeka, ngivele ngikhumbule ukuthi nginomuntu ekhaya okholelwa kakhulu kimi futhi oziqhenyayo ngami, ofuna ukungibona ngizithola lezi ziqu, ngiba yisifundiswa,” usho kanje. Ngesikhathi ezothweswa iziqu, ubekhashwe nguyise kanjalo noninakhulu.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: INDAWO yesigameko kuQuarry Road lapho kungqongqe khona imijondolo elinganiselwa ku-130 Image: KZN HUMAN SETTLEMENTS UMNYANGO wezokuHlaliswa kwaBantu KwaZulu-Natal uphezu kwezihlelo zokutholela inqwaba yabafundi basemijondolo eyakhele umqwaqo uQuarry Road, eThekwini, umfaniswano wesikole ukuze basheshe babuyele esikoleni. Lokhu kuza emva kokuthi umlilo ungqongqise imijondolo elinganiselwa ku-130 ngoLwesine, kwasala dengwane inqwaba yemindeni. Abakhahlamezekile kuthiwa bagcinwe ematendeni amabili amakhulu agxunyekwe endaweni yesigameko. Okhulumela uMnyango, uMnuz Ndabezinhle Sibiya, uthe umlilo ushiye dengwane abantu abangu-477, okukhona kubo izingane ezingu-299 bese kuba abantu abadala abangu-178. “Njengamanje simatasatasa nokutholela abafundi umfaniswano wesikole njengoba kufanele babuyele esikoleni masinyane. UMphathiswa wezeMfundo uMnuz Sipho Hlomuka uhanjiselwe umbiko,” kusho uSibiya. Uthe olunye usizo ithimba elilunikeza abagilwa kule ndawo, olokubhalisa labo abalahlekelwe omazisi kanjalo nezitifiketi zokuzalwa zezingane. Uthe ngokuthola kwabo umlilo ocekele phansi izakhiwo kule ndawo uqale emjondolo womuntu wokufika kuleli, okuthiwa uvele wacela empunzini emva kwesigameko. Uthe ukuhanjiswa kosizo oludingwa amagilwa kufaka phakathi noMasipala weTheku njengoba besebenzisana nehhovisi leMeya uMnuz Cyril Xaba kanjalo nelikaNksz Thembi Simelane onguNgqongqoshe wezokuHlaliswa kwaBantu ezingeni likazwelonke. Uthe amathimba alekelela kule ndawo azoqhubeka nokuba khona kuyo ukuqinisekisa ukuthi abakhahlamezekile bayakuthola ukusizakala abakudingayo. Uveze nokuthi noMphathiswa wezeMpilo esifundazweni uNksz Nomagugu Simelane kanjalo nowezokuThuthukiswa koMphakathi uNksz Mbali Shinga nabo bawathumele awabo amathimba ukuzonikezela ngosizo oluqondene neminyango yabo oludingwa abagilwa. Ubonge ezinye izinhlangano, athe zifake isandla ekunikezeleni ngosizo kulesi simo. Phakathi kwazo uthe kukhona iGift of the Givers Foundation esize ngomatrasi nezingubo zokulala, i-Al Imdaad Foundation enikezele ngamaphasela okudla, iRed Cross elekelele ngokudla okufudumele, i-Ikabawo Performing Arts Academy namalungu omphakathi abanikele ngokudla okuvuthiwe.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UMSUNGULI weNtuzuma Neighbourhood Watch, uMnuz Andile Jali, uthe baphume benethemba lokuthi izocabeka indlela eya phambili Isithombe: SITHUNYELWE UMSUNGULI weThekwini Neighbourhood Watch, uMnuz Andile Jali, uwathole enenhlabathi amazwi ashiwo uKhomishana wamaPhoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uLieutenant General Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi, kulandela ukubulawa kwamalungu abo amathathu eBhambayi, eNanda, ngoMgqibelo. Esigamekweni okuthiwa senzeke ezintatha, abeqembu lemigulukudu badubule babulala amalungu eThekwini Neighbourhood Watch amathathu. Phakathi kwababulewe, bekukhona uMnuz Nkosinathi Mhlongo (41), Mnuz Mazuzo Nomonti (48) noMnuz Mdunyiswa Nozulela (64). Kuthiwa uNozulela noMhlongo bafele endaweni yesigameko, kwathi uNomonti washonela esibhedlela esiKwaMashu, iDkt Pixley Ka Seme Memorial. Kuvela ukuthi uMhlongo ubengowokudabuka KwaMaphumulo, kuthi uNomonti noNozulela babe ngabaseFlagstaff naseLusikisiki, e-Eastern Cape. Kuthiwa nakubasolwa abathathu okuthiwa bavulele ngenhlamvu kubafi, kufe ababili njengoba bese befayela ngenhlamvu bengasaboni ukuthi badubula bani. Kuvela ukuthi oyedwa wabo ufele esigamekweni, kwathi owesibili washonela esibhedlela esifanayo. Lieutenant General Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi Esitatimendeni esithunyelwe abezindaba, uMkhwanazi ugcizelele eyokuthi izinhlaka ezilwa nobugebengu emphakathini kufanele zisebenzisane namaphoyisa, zigweme eyokufuna ukubhekana ngqo nezigebengu. “Siyakugqugquzela ukuzibandakanya kwemiphakathi empini yokulwa nobugebengu. Iyona ndlela engasiza ukuthi kunqotshwe ubugebengu kodwa izinhlaka zomphakathi ezifana neCommunity Police Forum (CPF) nezinye izinhlangano kufanele zibe amehlo nezindlebe zamaphoyisa, zingenzi into ezogcina ibeka impilo yamalungu azo engcupheni,” kusho uMkhwanazi. Uthe zibonakele izigebengu zidubula amaphoyisa nokudweba isithombe esicacile sokuthi ngeke zicabange kabili ngaphambi kokuba zidubule umuntu ojwayelekile. “Sinxusa abaholi balezi zinhlangano ukuthi baziyamanise nemigomo yokusebenza kweCPF ebhalwe kuMthethosisekelo, bazibandakanye ezinhlelweni zokulwa nobugebengu ezivumelekile,” kusho uMkhwanazi. UJali uthe lesi sitatimende asehlanga kahle kubona. “Siyafisa uNdonga asihoxise lesi sitatimende esisihumushe ngokuthi sidutshulwa, silimale ngoba sizenza amaphoyisa. Kufike kuthiwe, asiwalekelele amaphoyisa, uma sesibulawa, bese kukhulunywa kanje,” kusho uJali. Uqhube wathi into ebasukumisa phansi bazibambele mathupha empini yobugebengu eNanda ukuthi uma ebizelwa izigameko zobugebengu amaphoyisa aye akhale ngokuthi awanele, kokunye athi amaveni awekho. Uthe bebengakulindele nhlobo ukuthi uMkhwanazi akhulume kanje emva kwesigameko. “Bekufanele uma ebona ukuthi kukhona esingakwenzi kahle, asondele kithi asinike umhlahlandlela ngoba iqiniso lithi ubugebengu buphumile esandleni eNanda. Uma sekushiwo kanje, sizizwa sengathi siyizimvu zomhlatshelo,” usho kanje. Uthe basalishumayela ivangeli lokuthi ayisukunyelwe phezulu eyobugebengu baseNanda, wathi kufanele kuphungulwe amaphoyisa aseziteshini ezingenabo ubugebengu obuningi, ayotshalwa eNanda, awoMkhandlu weTheku, aqinise izivimbamgwaqo eNanda, ukuvimba izigelekeqe ezicanasa ngezimoto nezibhamu ezizisebenzisa ukwenza ubugebengu, bese kusungulwa uhlelo lwama-wardens olubonakale luba wusizo eGoli. Uthe asengu-34 esewonke amalungu enhlangano yakhe asebulawe yizigebengu emalokishini aseThekwini, kusuka ngo-2022, nathe isigameko esenzeke ngoMgqibelo, sibashiye bekhathazekile ngoba sibadwebele isithombe sokuthi kusaqhubeka ukubulawa kwabo. Obekhona kwenzeka isigameko ocele ukungadalulwa, uthe iziwombe zokugqekezelwa kwabantu endaweni zaqala ngoLwesihlanu ebusuku, babikelwa ngazo. “Sahlangana saba yiqulu labaqaphi ababalelwa ku-16, sachusha emigwaqweni ehlukene endaweni. Izibhamu sasilokhu sizizwa ziqhuma ngapha nangapha kodwa singababoni nabafana,” kukhumbula owesilisa. Uthe bathi besachusha kanjalo, bavele bazithela kubasolwa abathathu behamba ngezinyawo, bazama ukubamisa babaseshe njengoba babesola ukuthi bayizigebengu. “Yilapho abavele bavulela ngenhlamvu bebhekise kithi, savele sasaphazeka yonke indawo, sibaleka. Kwadubuleka amalungu ethu amathathu,” usho kanje. Uthe yilapho ababona khona ukuthi ngesikhathi zivulela ngezulu lezandla izigebengu, kudubuleke nesisodwa sazo, safela esigamekweni. “Sazitshela ukuthi ababili bakwazile ukuphunyula babaleke kanti sizozwa emva kwesikhathi ukuthi kulaba ababalekile, owesibili naye ugcine efela esibhedlela,” kusho ulona wesilisa, othe bahlanu abagcine befa ngesigameko. Uveze eyokuthi ubugebengu obese buqale phansi endaweni obokugqekezelwa kwabantu, bakhonjwe ngezibhamu, bakhishiswe imali emabhange bese bephucwa amaselula.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: BANGASE bavale isifundazwe sonke ngokhukhulelangoqo wesiteleka osonkontileka abakha imigwaqo, abakhala ngokungakhokhelwa wuMnyango wezokuThutha KwaZulu-Natal, kusuka nyakenye. Lokhu bakuveze, esikhangisweni ebesizungeza ezinkundleni zokuxhumana iFacebook neWhatsApp. Lesi sikhangisi besiphelezelwa yinkulumo eqoshiwe yomunye wabakhahlamezekile, obezwakala ukuthi uthelwe ngezibonkolo. Kule nkulumo, lona wesilisa uzwakala ethi banenkinga noMnyango oholwa nguMphathiswa uSiboniso Duma, ongabakhokheli imali yabo. UMPHATHISWA wezokuThutha KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Siboniso Duma, usolwa ngokukhokhela osonkontileka abathandayo “Ezinye izindawo zokusebenza zimile. UDuma (onguMphathiswa woMnyango) nezikhulu zakhe bakhokhela abangani babo. Sicela yonke iZululand, ukushona phansi koMnambithi, ko-Estcourt, yiTheku, akuvalwe thaqa, ngisho no-N3,” kusho inkulumo. Lona wesilisa uqhubeka athi badlelwa impahla okufaka phakathi amaloli, izimoto nemizi. “Kuyaphela ngathi,” usho kanje. Ukhale ngokukhethwa kwephela emasini, wathi uDuma nezikhulu zakhe bakhetha abantu abambalwa, athe bangabangani bakhe babakhokhele, abanye babashiye kanjalo. “Sicela i-ANC isikhuzele uDuma. Uyasimosha, uyawuqeda uMnyango. Sidlelwa izimoto, amaloli, nakho konke okunye,” kusho lona wesilisa. Uveze ukuthi lokhu kwenzeka kusuka ngonyaka odlule. “UDuma uholela abantu abathandayo, abasenhliziyweni yakhe,” kuqhuba lona wesilisa. Uthe amamashi abo ufuna aqonde emahhovisi oMnyango asezindaweni ezehlukene. Ukhale ngokuthi kulo Mnyango bafika benezimoto, amaloli, ama-TLB, bese behamba bengenalutho, sebedayise yonke into. “Ngoba uma sekukhokhwa sewusebenzile, ukhokhelwa kabuhlungu,” usho kanje. Uthe bacwile ezikweletini, wakhala nangokuthi banabasebenzi abangakhokhelwe kusuka ngo-Okthoba nyakenye. “Sagcina ukukhokhelwa ngo-Okthoba ngonyaka ophelile. Kodwa izinkampani ezithandwa umhlonishwa zikhokhelwa nyanga zonke. Sizovala kwasani. Sizovala amahhovisi, sivale imisebenzi eyenziwa yizigwili eziseduze nenhliziyo yomhlonishwa,” kusho lona wesilisa ophethe ngokuqanganisa, ethi uDuma akavele ababulale okungcono. Kulandela ukusabalala kwezinsongo zombhikisho, ihhovisi likaDuma linameke isaziso ekhasini lalo leFacebook, esithi kuzoba nomhlangano ophuthumayo namuhla phakathi kwakhe nosonkontileka abakhahlanyezwe eyezinkokhelo ezibambezelekile. Ngokwalesi saziso, ebesikhashwa umbhalo othi: “Ukubambisana obunobuhlakani bokuzoqinisekisa ukuthi sixazulula izingqinamba ezimi phakathi kwethu neKwaZulu-Natal enempumelelo”, umhlangano uzobanjelwa emahhovisi alo Mnyango aseMerebank, eThekwini, ngo-12 emini namuhla.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: IMGIXABEZE ngodilikajele iNkantolo yesiFunda saseScottburgh, owesilisa oneminyaka engu-43, olahlwe yicala lokudlwengula owesifazane (20) waseDududu, eMzinto. Lokhu kuvezwe yiNational Prosecuting Authority (NPA), ngesikhathi isishayela ihlombe isigwebo esehliswe yinkantolo kolahlwe yicala. Ngokusho koyikhulumelayo, uNkk Natasha Ramkisson-Kara, inkantolo iphinde yanquma ukuthi angaphinde avunyelwe ukuba nesibhamu. Uthe iphinde yakhipha umyalelo wokuthi igama lakhe lifakwe ohlwini lukazwelonke lwabantu abahlukumeza ngokocansi. UNkk Ramkisson-Kara uthe bayasemukela isigwebo esikhishwe yinkantolo kulona olahlwe yicala. “Ukunqanda udlame lobulili kusalokhu kuhleli eqhulwini ophikweni lweNPA. Izigwebo ezifuze lesi siyazamukela kwazise zithumela umyalezo kulabo abasuke besacabanga ukwenza ubugebengu obufanayo,” kusho uNkk Ramkisson-Kara. Elandisa ngesigameko uthe senzeka ngoDisemba 24, 2022 endaweni yaseDududu. Uveze ukuthi umdlwenguli nomgilwa babazana njengoba umdlwenguli wayeke wasebenza endaweni, ewumuntu owaziwayo umndeni kamgilwa. “Ngobusuku bangoDisemba 24, 2022, umgilwa kuthiwa wayelele nengane yakhe encane kubo. Kuthiwa wezwa kukhona umuntu owayengqongqoza ewindini,” kusho uNkk Ramkisson-Kara. Uthe njengoba ugesi wawuhambile endaweni, umgilwa wasebenzisa ithoshi leselula yakhe ukuyobheka. UNkk Ramkisson-Kara uthe yilapho umgilwa ambona khona umdlwenguli, emi ngaphandle kwewindi. “Kuthiwa wavele wamkhomba ngesibhamu, wamyalela ukuthi amvulele angene ngaphakathi, nokuthiwa umgilwa wakwenza ngempela ngenxa yokwesabela impilo yakhe,” usho kanje. Uthe ngesikhathi esengaphakathi, lona wesilisa wabe esemdlwengula umgilwa, emkhombe ngesibhamu. Uthe waphinde wamdlwengula futhi ezintatha zangoKhisimusi. Uveze ukuthi ngaphambi kokuba akhale amaphepha, wamsabisa ngokuthi uzombulala nengane yakhe uma kuke kwaba khona umuntu amtshela ngesigameko. “Nokho emva kokuhamba kwakhe, umgilwa wavele wafonela unina noninakhulu. Isigameko sabe sesibikwa emaphoyiseni, wathola usizo lwezempilo esibhedlela esiseduze, umdlwenguli waboshwa ngokuhamba kosuku olufanayo,” usho kanje. Ngesikhathi kuqhubeka ukuqulwa kwecala, uMshushisi woMbuso uThanusha Govender ubehola ubufakazi bukamgilwa, obukanina kanjalo noninakhulu. Nodokotela owaxilonga umgilwa naye ubethulie obakhe ubufakazi. Ngesikhathi uGovender ecindezela eyokuthi umdlwenguli anikwe isigwebo esiqinile ugqamise eyokuthi izigameko zokudlwengulwa kwabantu kule ndawo zithe chithi saka. Wachaza isigameko njengesinokuhlukumeza amalungelo omzimba womuntu okufaka phakathi ukumehlisa isithunzi. Uphinde wethula phambi kwenkantolo isitatimende esibhalwe umgilwa, ngaphansi kweso likaNkk Nokukhanya Mkhize, oyiCourt Preparation Officer, lapho echaza kabanzi ukuthi yamhlukumeza kangakanani indaba yokunukubezwa. Kusona umgilwa uveze ukuthi ulahlekelwe ukubethemba abantu besilisa kanjalo nasebudlelwaneni emva kwesigameko, wathi emva kokwenzeka kwaso, impilo yakhe yavele yashintsha unomphela.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: SEKUPHELE isonto kumi nse ukufunda nokufundisa esikoleni iSiyathuthuka Secondary eNewtown A, eNanda, abazali abawotha ubomvu, befuna kuqashwe ngokugcwele uthishomkhulu abathi usebe yibamba isikhathi eside. Ngokusho komunye wabazali, ocele ukungadalulwa, abazali abebedinwe begane unwabu, bazifake ngoLwesine olwedlule izingidi ezingaziwa esangweni lesikole. Uthe ngaphezu kwengidi eyaziwa yisikole, ejwayele ukufakwa unogada, kukhona ezinye ezimbalwa ezifakwe abazali abadiniwe. “Abazali bathi izingidi zizophuma uma uMnyango wezeMfundo usuthumele incwadi yokumqasha ngokugcwele uthishomkhulu oseneminyaka emithathu eyibamba kulesi sikhundla,” kusho umzali. Uqhube wathi abazali bazwakalise ukuwuthakasela umsebenzi owenziwa uthishomkhulu yingakho bebona sengathi uMnyango uyanwabuluka uma ungamqashi ngokugcwele. Uthe banovalo lokuthi uMnyango uzovele uqashe uthishomkhulu ozobe evela ngaphandle, kanti bona bafuna kuqashwe ibamba. Uveze ukuthi ibamba selifundise kulesi sikole isikhathi eside kanti lathatha izintambo zokubamba emva kokuhamba kukathishomkhulu owayekhona eminyakeni emithathu edlule. “Kuthikamezeke ngempela ukufunda njengoba izingidi zafakwa ngoLwesine olwedlule. Okusho ukuthi sekuphela isonto abafundi bengafundi,” kusho umthombo. Uthe abazali abafake izingidi bafunga bagomela ukuthi zizokhishwa uma kufika le ncwadi abathi bafuna ukuyibona ngamehlo. Uveze ukuthi ukhona umhloli oke wazama ukuzohlola isimo ngoLwesithathu esuka ehhovisi lesifunda ePinetown. Uthe ugcine engakwazanga ukungena ngaphakathi, abazali bamyalela ukuthi akhulume nabo khona ngaphandle kwesango lesikole njengoba ebefike engayiphethe incwadi yokuqasha ibamba ngokugcwele. NOTE: Kushoda i-comment ye-SBG neye-DOE.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: SEKUVELE izinsolo ezishaqisayo ngababili ababulawa eNgwelezane, enyakatho yeKwaZulu-Natal SEKUVELE izinsolo ezishaqisayo zokuthi owesifazane waseSigisi, eNgwelezane, osanda kubulawa nendodana ngesihluku babulawa ngesinqindi. Lokhu kuza emva kokuthi umndeni wabafi uthole ubuhlalu okuthiwa babuhlobise isinqindi emva kwefriji ngempelasonto, njengoba bebefihlwa ngoMgqibelo. UNkk Thuli Khumalo nendodana yakhe, uMbuso Khumalo, kuthiwa bagwazwa bafa "yisigebengu" esahlasela ekhaya labo ngoLwesine olwedlule. Ngokusho komthombo, kuvele ngesikhathi kulungiselelwa umngcwabo ukuthi ummese, okuthiwa uNkk Khumalo wayesina ngawo ngesikhathi egcagca nyakenye awubonwa. “Izihlobo kuthiwa zigcine ziligqekeza ibhokisi lomshado likaNkk Khumalo, kulandela ukuthi isihlobo esisondelene nabafi, sale saphetha ukuthi livulwe,” kusho umthombo. Uqhube wathi izihlobo zigcine ziphoqa ukuthi ligqekezwe nokuyilapho okubonakale khona ukuthi  ummese awukho. “Kuthiwa isihlobo kuthe uma sesibuzwa ukuthi uphi ummese, sathi siyabona ukuthi uthathwe yisigebengu,” kusho umthombo. Udalule nokuthi ngesikhathi kupeqululwa endlini, kube sekutholakala ubuhlalu obabuhlobise wona ummese, bulahlwe emva kwefriji. Ngesonto eledlule Isolezwe libike udaba ngokuthi izihlobo zabafi zishaya amakhala "ngesigebengu" okuthiwa sagasela kulo muzi, senzakalisa abafi. Zazikhala ngokuthi isihlobo ebesihlala nabafi sikhuluma izinto ezingafani ngesigameko. Ngakolunye uhlangothi kuthiwa lesi sihlobo satshela umndeni ukuthi isigebengu sigasele naso sikhona. Nokho kuthiwa emaphoyiseni sathi safika umonakalo usuvele wenzekile, isigebengu saphuma siqhasha, sesibona sona. Izihlobo ziphinde zaveza ukuthi okunye okwenza zishaye amakhala wukuthi kukhona izinsolo zokuhlukumeza amanye amalungu omndeni abazi ngazo, kodwa uNkk Khumalo ebengakaze abhoboke ngazo. Isihlobo sabafi, Isolezwe elalikhulume naso ngeledlule, sithe sesicela ukungaphawuli ngoba bayesaba. “Umndeni ubufuna lolu lwazi lube yimfihlo. Asazi ukuthi luphume kanjani,” kusho isihlobo. Owomndeni uqhube wathi okwenza umndeni ube namanzi emadolweni wukuthi akukaboshwa muntu namanje. “Kungangcono uma (umsolwa) esebanjiwe, esengaphakathi,” usho kanje. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uLt Col Paul Magwaza, ngesikhathi eqinisekisa isigameko wathi amaphoyisa aseMpangeni aphenya amacala amabili okubulala kanjalo nelokugqekeza kulandela isigameko esenzeke eNgwelezane ngo-Ephreli 16. "Kubikwa ukuthi ubaba uthole isidumbu sendodana yakhe nesomkakhe emagumbini ahlukene, benamanxeba okugwazwa emzimbeni. Utshele amaphoyisa ukuthi ngesikhathi engena endlini, owesilisa ongaziwa uphume eyinhlamvu ephethe ubhakha, okuthe uma ejomba uthango, i-laptop yaqathaka kuwo," kusho uMagwaza. Akukaboshwa muntu ngesigameko.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UMUFI, uConstable Njabulo Cebekhulu BABOSHWE ngalo usuku lwesigameko abesilisa ababili abasolwa ngokudubula babulale iphoyisa ebelingekho emsebenzini endaweni yokucima ukoma eRichmond, ngeSonto. UConstable Njabulo Cebekhulu (32) okuvela ukuthi ungowokudabuka eLovu, kuthiwa udutshulwe wafa ngomunye wabasolwa abeyobakhuza ngokudlala ngesibhamu endaweni evulelekile. Kuvela ukuthi umufi - obengekho emsebenzini - uzwe kukhona okuqhuma kwesibhamu obekuqhamuka ngaphakathi eShames Tavern, wase enikela khona ukuyobheka. Kuthiwa ngesikhathi efika ngaphakathi uthole ukuthi obeqhumisa isibhamu, ubexabana nomunye umuntu, wase eqhumisa isibhamu endaweni ebinabantu. Kuvela ukuthi ngesikhathi ethi uzama ukumkhuza lona wesilisa obeqhumisa isibhamu, uvele wasiphendula wasibhekisa ngakumufi, wamdubula ephindelela. Kuthiwa uphuthunyiswe esibhedlela, nokho wafika waqinisekiswa njengosephangalele. Umufi kuthiwa ubeneminyaka emine esebenzela isiteshi samaphoyisa saseRichmond. IMeya kaMasipala waseRichmond, uMnuz Melikhaya Ngcongo, ithe bakushayela ihlombe ukuboshwa kwabasolwa ngokuphazima kweso. “Umufi obewuthanda umsebenzi wakhe futhi ekukhathalele ukuphepha komphakathi, uhambile waya kumsolwa eyozama ukungenelela. Ngeshwa umsolwa uphendule ngentululwane yezinhlamvu, wamdubula wambulala umsolwa,” kusho uNgcongo. Ubonge ukusebenza ngokuzikhandla kwamaphoyisa, iCommunity Policing Forum (CPF) kanjalo namalungu omphakathi ngokusebenza ngokubambisana, okuholele ekutheni umsolwa nabehamba naye baboshwe ngokushesha. Uthe ukuboshwa kwabasolwa ngokuphazima kweso kuzobuyisa isithunzi kwezomthetho kuphinde kuthumele umyalezo oqinile wokuthi labo abenza amacala afuze lawa bazobhekana nengalo yomthetho. Udalule ukuthi emva kokwenza umuga, umsolwa ube esephanga umufi isibhamu sakhe somsebenzi, wayosilahla. Kuvela ukuthi ngesikhathi uNgcongo ehambela isiteshi samaphoyisa, lapho obekusebenza khona umufi nangesikhathi ehambela endaweni yesigameko, bekusenziwa imizamo yokuthi sicingwe. Ezwelana nomndeni kamufi, uthe amaphoyisa nawo angabantu, umehluko ukuthi abeka impilo yawo engcupheni ukuze kuvikeleke umphakathi. “Sidlulisa okukhulu ukudabuka emndenini, kozakwabo, nakuwo wonke umuntu abesondelene naye. Siyazwelana kakhulu nabo ngokudlula kwakhe sesihluku,” usho kanje. Imizamo yokuthola umndeni kamufi ayiphumelelanga. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uLieutenant Colonel Paul Magwaza, uthe amaphoyisa aseRichmond aphenya icala lokubulala emva kokuthi iphoyisa ebelingekho emsebenzini lidutshulwe ngaphakathi endaweni yokucima ukoma. “Iphoyisa elingu-constable lidutshulwe ngesikhathi lizama ukuphenya ngokuqhuma kwesibhamu obekuqhamuka ngaphakathi engaweni yokucima ukoma,” kusho uMagwaza. Uqhube wathi kube sekuzwakala okunye ukuqhuma kwesibhamu kaningi ngaphakathi endaweni yokucima ukoma, kwase kutholakala ukuthi yiphoyisa selidutshuliwe. “Liphuthunyiswe esibhedlela nokuyilapho elifike lashonela khona,” kusho uMagwaza othe isigameko senzeke ezintatha zangeSonto.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UMNUZ James 'God'olulala amankankane' Mthembu owadutshulwa nyakenye UTHOLA izinsongo zokubulawa umndeni wenyanga eyayidumile KwaMhlabuyalingana, uMnuz James "God'olulala amankankane" Mthembu (61), kulandela ukubulawa komunye wabasolwa ngokuyisoconga ngeSonto. Kulesi sigameko, okuthiwa senzeke eThengani, khona eManguzi, owesilisa obegqekezelwa ngenhloso yokuthi aphucwe imoto, udubule kwafa "isigebengu", uMnuz Sifiso "Coach" Malwane. Ngokusho kwamaphoyisa, uMalwane, ubengungqondongqondo emacaleni obugebengu bokwebiwa kwezimoto endaweni, bese zeqiswa umngcele, zibhekiswe eMozambique. Kuthiwa ubulawa nje, amaphoyisa abemfunela icala lokubulawa kukaGod'olulala amankankane, owadutshulwa ngoyaba lwezinhlambu ekhaya lakhe ePhelandaba, eManguzi ngasekupheleni kuka-Okthoba nyakenye. UMalwane kuthiwa ubefunelwa necala lokudutshulwa, kubulawe uMnuz Juda Mthethwa ngoFebhuwari 2023. Umthombo ocele ukuthi ungadalulwa uthe umndeni kaGodo usuqalile ukuthola izinsongo ngoba usolwa ngokuthi ubhiyozela ukubulawa kukaMalwane. “Kuthiwa njengoba bejabula nje, nabo basazobulawa,” kusho umthombo. Uqhube wathi okwenzekayo, ukuthi kubulawe abathintekayo ekubulaweni kukaGodo, yinto umndeni obuyilindele vele njengoba ubunayo inkolelo yokuthi umufi uzozilwela nalabo abamsoconga. Ithintwa indodana kaGodo, uMnuz Mandla Mthethwa, yale yaphetha ukuphawula, yathi lolu daba lubucayi, akukho umndeni ongakuphawula. Isolezwe lihlulekile ukuthola ukuphawula komndeni kaJuda njengoba isihlobo, sithe kulukhuni ukuthi bangaphawula ngesehlakalo, kwathi ucingo lukankosikazi kamufi, lwakhala lwangaphendulwa. Osekomitini, elilwa nobugebengu obusemngceleni, uMnuz Joseph Ngubane, uthe nakuba ebulewe ungqondongqondo kodwa kusekhona ukukhathazeka emphakathini ngoba basekhona abanye abasele. Uthe bajatshuliswa wukuthi umgilwa odubule umufi ukwazile ukuzivikela, ehlaselwa. “Neyakhe impilo ibisengcupheni, nabo bebedubula bebhekise kuye,” kusho uNgubane. Uthe ithimba eliyisipesheli elasungulwa ukuze libhekane nalolu hlobo lobugebengu, lisawubambe kahle. “Kuke kuthule, ngoba izigebengu ziyalalisa, kodwa bese kubuye kubhoka ke futhi,” usho kanje, enezela ngokuthi njengoba kwenzeke isigameko nje, ikhona imoto eyiveni ethathwe kuzosa kube yizolo eBhambanana. Unxuse umphakathi ukuthi uqhubeke ubambisane namaphoyisa ekulweni nalobu bugebengu, waphinde wawuxwayisa ngokuthi uqaphele ngoba izigebengu zalolu hlobo ziyingozi. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uColonel Robert Netshiunda uthe umufi ungomunye wezelamani zakwaMalwane ezaziwayo, ezisohlwini lwabasolwa abafunwa amaphoyisa ngamacala okubulala kanjalo nawobugebengu obusemngceleni. “Phakathi kwalawo macala, kukhona nelokubulala uMnuz Juda Mthethwa,” kusho uNetshiunda. Uthe umufi udutshulwe wafa ngesikhathi kubanjwa inkunzi eThengani, eManguzi, ngeSonto. Uthe uMalwane nomunye abehamba naye bagqekeze umuzi, bephethe izibhamu, bafuna ngodli izikhiye zemoto kumnikazi womuzi. “Umgilwa usheshe wathatha isibhamu sakhe, wadubula ebhekise kubasolwa, abaphunyule babaleka. Umufi ubaleka nje, udubulekile,” kusho uNetshiunda. Uthe amaphoyisa alwa nobugebengu obusemngceleni azwe ukuthi kunesidumbu esingcwatshwe ngendlela engafanele eMgodiwemvubu ngeSonto. “Amaphoyisa athole ukuthi leso sidumbu ngesikaMalwane obedutshulwe esikhathini esingengakanani ngosuku olufanayo. Kuvele ukuthi singcwatshwe ngokuyimfihlo wumfowabo, uMnuz Musa Malwane, naye ofunelwa uxhaxha lwamacala okubulala nawobugebengu obusemngceleni,” kusho uNetshiunda. Uqinisekise ukuthi lezi zelamani zifunelwa necala lokubulawa kwenyanga edumile eManguzi, uJames ‘God'olulala amankankane’ Mthembu. Uthe isidumbu sikamufi sigcine simbiwa ngokulandela uhlelo olufanele, kanti uphenyo lwamaphoyisa lusaqhubeka. Uthe nokucingwa kusaMusa nakho kusaqhubeka, wanxusa abangaba nolwazi ngokuthi uphi, bathinte amaphoyisa.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: KUKHONA nesisebenzi kwabathathu abaqothe abomndeni abayisikhombisa bomndeni waseNewark, eMandeni KUKHONA nobeyisisebenzi kwabathathu abasolwa ngecala lokubulala ngesihluku umndeni wabayisikhombisa eNewark, KwaDukuza, ngoLwesibili. Izidumbu zabafi okuthiwa baneminyaka ephakathi kuka-20 no-83, kuvela ukuthi zikhonjwe abasolwa eMelmoth, ngoLwesithathu. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uColonel Robert Netshiunda, uthe kubasolwa okuthiwa baneminyaka ephakathi kuka-21 no-28, kukhona oyedwa obeyisisebenzi emzini wabafi. Uthe kulindeleke ukuthi bavele eNkantolo yeMantshi yaKwaDukuza, namuhla. Elandisa ngesigameko, uthe abagilwa baqale bathunjwa, besuswa ekhaya labo eliseNewark ngoLwesibili ebusuku, bayobulawa eMelmoth. “Yisisebenzi esihlanza indlu esihlabe umkhosi ngesigameko ngoLwesithathu ekuseni, kulandela ukuthi sifike ekhaya labagilwa, sathola ukuthi kugqekeziwe, amalungu omndeni ayisikhombisa wonke engekho, kanjalo nemoto ingekho,” kusho uNetshiunda. Uthe kube sekubizelwa endaweni yesigameko amaphoyisa aseNewark kanjalo namanye ama-unit amaphoyisa. Kuwona uthe kusebenzisane amaphoyisa aseNewark, abaphenyi baKwaDukuza, KwaDukuza Tactical Response Team, Provincial Counter Intelligence Unit, Provincial Counter Kidnapping Unit neProvincial Serious Violence Crimes Unit. Uthe uphenyo lwawo luqale lwawaholela KwaHlomendlini, eMandeni, lapho okufike kwaboshwa khona abasolwa ababili ngoLwesithathu. “Oyedwa wabasolwa utholwe neselula yoyedwa wabagilwa. Umkhondo ube usuwakhomba KwaDendethu, eSundumbili, amaphoyisa lapho okufike kwaboshwa khona umsolwa wesithathu,” kusho uNetshiunda. Udalule ukuthi umsolwa wesithathu yena utholwe nesibhamu. Uthe angu-11 amaselula abagilwa, atholwe kubasolwa. Uthe yilapho amaphoyisa ethole khona ukuthi oyedwa wabagilwa ubesebenzela abagilwa. Kwabe sekuvela nokuthi abasolwa ngokubambisana bagqekeze emzini wabagilwa, bababopha ngentambo. “Kuvela ukuthi oyedwa wabo uqale wadlwengula umgilwa oneminyaka engu-20 ngaphambi kokuba babalayishe emotweni yomunye wabo (abagilwa), bayikhomba eMelmoth,” kusho uNetshiunda, othe bahambe ibanga elilinganiselwa ku-200km ukusuka emzini wabagilwa kuyiwa endaweni yesigameko. Uveze ukuthi amaphoyisa athole ukuthi umsolwa obedlwengule umgilwa (20) ekhaya lakhe, uphinde wamdlwengula okwesibili sekufikwe eMelmoth. Uthe emva kokumdlwengula isibili, ube esefuna ngodli imininingwane yabagilwa abathathu yasebhange nezinombolo zakhona eziyimfihlo. “Emva kokuthola le mininingwane, babe sebebadubula bebabulala bobathathu. Laba abanye abagilwa abane, bona bagwazwe, baze bafa,” kusho uNetshiunda. Uthe uphenyo lwamaphoyisa luveze ukuthi ngoLwesibili ebusuku kanjalo nangoLwesithathu ekuseni, kube nemali ekhishwe emabhange abagilwa izikhawu eziningi. UKhomishana wamaPhoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uLieutenant General Mkhwanazi, uwashayele ihlombe amaphoyisa ngokusheshe ababophe abasolwa. Ube eseyalela abaphenyi ukuthi baqinisekise ukuthi ubulungiswa buyenzeka ukuze izihlobo zabagilwa zizothobeka amanxeba. Uthe kuyakhathaza ukuzwa ukuthi omunye wabasolwa ubeqashwe abagilwa. “Siyabanxusa abaqashi ukuthi abazikhathaze ngokuthola ulwazi ngomuntu abamqashayo, baphinde bayihlole indlela yabo yokuziphatha esolisayo,” kusho uMkhwanazi. Uthe imvamisa, ezindaweni ezingamapulazi noma ezithe qekelele, amacala enziwa ngabantu ngabagilwa ababaziyo noma abasondelene nabo.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: AMANQINA ezinye zezinkomo zikaMnuz Mthobisi Cele okuthiwa zebiwe, zabulawa emadlelweni BAFUNA amaphoyisa abhukule ekuphenyeni izigameko zokwebiwa kwemfuyo abantu baseMawuleni, ePort Shepstone, abakhala ngokuthi sebephelile amasela. Esigamekweni sakamumva, okuthiwa senzeke ngoLwesihlanu, owesilisa wendawo onguMnuz Mthobisi Cele, webelwe izinkomo eziyisikhombisa. Elandisa ngesehlakalo asifanise nesimngcwabe ephila, uthe umelusi wakhe uqaphele ngezikhathi zantambama, izinkomo sezibuya emadlelweni ukuthi eziyisikhombisa azibonwa. Uthe kuyinqubo yendawo ukuthi abelusi noma imindeni iyazivulela izinkomo ezibayeni, zizihambele ziye emadlelweni, baze bazibone ntambama uma sezibuya khona. Uthe ngesikhathi zidla emadlelweni akekho osuke ehleli nazo eziqaphile. “Kuthe uma kuyobhekwa emadlelweni, kwaficwa ngamanqina azo kanjalo nemiswani, okunye kungekho, kwacaca ukuthi zebiwe yilabo abazibulala khona lapho, maqede balayishe inyama yazo, bese bekhala amaphepha,” kusho uCele. Uthe uvukele emaphoyiseni ekuseni ngoMgqibelo, ukuyovula icala, nokuyilapho ezithele khona phezu kolwazi lokuthi ngayizolo, amaphoyisa athole imoto eyiveni, i-NP200, ebiphantshelwe yisondo esigodini saseMntentweni, bude buduze nedolobha i-Port Shepstone. “Athe le moto ayithole ingenamuntu phakathi, isele dengwane. Athi uma eyibheka ngemumva, athola kukhona inqwaba yenyama nezinhloko. Athi uma eyongikhombisa, nebala ngathola ukuthi yizo izinkomo zami lezi engithi zidukile,” usho kanje. Uthe amaphoyisa aqhubeke amtshela ukuthi athe uma ephenya ngale moto etholakele, kwavela ukuthi yayibikwe ukuthi yebiwe esiteshini samaphoyisa i-Durban Central nyakenye. "Ngiphatheke kabi ngokuthi sintshontshelwe imfuyo ngale ndlela. Sifisa amaphoyisa enze kangcono ngamacala okwebiwa kwemfuyo ngoba siyawabika ngethemba lokuthi kukhona abazoboshwa kodwa uphenyo lwakhona luphelele emoyeni,” kusho uCele. Uthe njengoba yena elahlekelwe yimfuyo, ungowesibili emndenini ukulahlekelwa esikhathini esiyizinyanga ezimbalwa. “Umalume wami ubulawelwe ezine ngasekupheleni konyaka odlule. Nezakhe zabulawa ngendlela efanayo emadlelweni. Yena-ke akazange athole namkhondo. Naye wabika emaphoyiseni kodwa icala laphelela emoyeni,” kubeka uCele. Uthe uma ekhumbula kahle, lesi yisigameko sesithathu esikhathini esingangezinyanga eziyisishiyagalombili. “Zibulawelwa endaweni eyodwa, nokwenza sicabange ukuthi amasela asicekela phansi abantu ababodwa,” kusho uCele, othe indlela okwenzeka ngayo babuye babe nakho ukusola ukuthi amasela kungenzeka kube abantu bendawo abasebenzisana nabokuhamba. Uthe lokhu bakusho ngoba abanazo izimpendulo zokuthi umuntu wokuhamba angaluthathaphi ulwazi lokuthi amadlelo endawo angakuphi. Unxuse amaphoyisa ukuthi alusukumele lolu daba ngoba nakuba omunye umuntu engayibuka incane into yokwebiwa kwemfuyo kodwa isuke iwudume lwengozi kubanikazi. Wenze umfanekiso ngaye, wathi lezi zinkomo ezebiwe zingabiza u-R120 000 uma zidayiswa. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uCaptain Ntathu Ndlovu, uthe amaphoyisa aseMehlomnyama aphenya icala lokwebiwa kwemfuyo kulandela ukuthi kwebiwe izinkomo eziyisikhombisa eMawuleni. “Uphenyo lwamaphoyisa nomphakathi luholele eNdundumeni lapho okutholakale khona ukuthi izinkomo zihlinziwe, kwasala izimpondo namanqina kuphela,” kusho uCapt Ndlovu, othe akukabi bikho muntu oseboshiwe.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UKHALA ngokwenzelwa phansi amaphoyisa umndeni wowesilisa okuthiwa wagwazwa wafa kunetiye (umsebenzi wesintu) kamakhelwane eKoki, eMzimkhulu, ngo-Ephreli nyakenye. Kulesi sigameko okuthiwa senzeka emini kwabha phambi kwawo wonke umuntu, kwabulawa ngesihluku uMnuz Ziphilele Mtambo (42). Ngokusho kukamfowabo kamufi, uMnuz Nyameko Mtambo, kwakungu-Ephreli 25, 2025, kwenzeka umshophi. Uthe isigameko senzeka egcekeni lalapho okwakwenziwe khona umsebenzi, okuyikwamakhelwane wakwamufi kanjalo nowabasolwa. Uthe isigameko senzeka lapho okwakuhleli khona wonke umuntu, okukhona kubo nezihlobo zakhe umufi kanjalo nabanye omakhelwane. “Kuthiwa ingxabano yaqala ngenxa yotshwala. Umufi wayefuna ukuphuziswa utshwala, abasolwa bengafuni aphuze. Kuthiwa baqala basukuma bamshaya, bemhlanganyela. Kwathi kusabukwa lokho, oyedwa wabo wakhipha uhalakasha lommese, wamgwaza ephindelela,” kusho uMtambo. Uqhube wathi izihlobo zikamufi ezazikhona endaweni yesigameko, zamphuthumisa esibhedlela, nokho kwamenela ngezikhathi zasebusuku, emva kokulaliswa amahora ambalwa. Uthe amaphoyisa abizwa endaweni yesehlo, afika umufi esephuthunyiswe esibhedlela, abuza imibuzo ngokwenzekile kumnikazi womuzi, kwavulwa icala, wathi abasolwa banele babona ukuthi umufi uselimele kanzima, babaleka endaweni. “Kwaphela izinsuku ezimbalwa bengekho endaweni kodwa babuye babuya. Sathi singcwaba base bebuyile, abangaboshwa,” kusho uMtambo. Uqhube wathi babelokhu belindele ukuthi bazoboshwa kodwa kwangenzeka lokho. “Okusiphatha kabi ukuthi sekuze kwaphela cishe unyaka bezihambela ngokukhululeka emphakathini, sabantu abangaze benze lutho. Thina ngapha salahlekelwa othandiweyo ngenxa yabo,” kusho uMtambo. Uthe okubaphatha kabi ukuthi bayazizwa izinkulumo abasolwa abazikhuluma emphakathini, lapho beqhosha ngokuthi akukho mnyakazo ozoke wenzeke ngecala ngoba bona bawakhokhela imali amaphoyisa. Uthe abazi ukuthi le nkulumo iyiqiniso kangakanani kodwa uma bebuka okwenzeka ecaleni, limi ndawonye, basola sengathi iyiqiniso. “Esikukhalelayo ubulungiswa. Sesifisa ukuthi kungenelele noMkhwanazi (uKhomishana wamaPhoyisa eKZN, uLt-General Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi) ngoba usizo asilutholanga emaphoyiseni ebesiwathembile,” usho kanje. Amaphoyisa athe ayiveli imininingwane eqondene nalolu daba ngokwenombolo yecala Isolezwe ebeliyinikwe umndeni.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: KUMINZE isangoma ebesiyogeza abantu emfuleni waseNanda, enyakatho yeTheku KUMINZE isangoma, okuthiwa besiyohlambulula abantu edamini laseNanda, endaweni yaseSikebheni, eMzinyathi, ngoMsombuluko. Ngokusho komthombo, umufi ongowesifazane, ubehamba nabanye abantu abambalwa beyogezwa. “Uminze engakabagezi. Bekusewuye kuphela obesangene emanzini,” kusho umthombo. Uveze ukuthi isigameko senzeke kusakhanya, nokho umufi abakwazanga ukumhlenga ebebekhona. “Asazi ukuthi bebesukaphi, kodwa akubona abendawo,” kusho umthombo. Ikhansela lendawo, uMnuz Falakhe Gcabashe, lithintwa yiSolezwe, lithe lisanda kuzwa ngodaba, lathi alikakabi nolwazi olugcwele. “Engikutholile wukuthi umufi nalabo abehamba nabo ababona abantu bendawo. Asikabi nalo ulwazi lokuthi bebesuka kuphi nendawo. Okusho ukuthi bebezokwenza lokho ebebezokwenza bese behamba,” kusho uGcabashe. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uSergeant Thenjiswa Ngcobo, uthe amaphoyisa aseNanda avule idokodo lokufa komuntu ukuze liphenywe kulandela ukuminza komuntu edamini laseNanda ngoMsombuluko. “Kusolwa ukuthi owesifazane ubegeza abantu edamini eliseSikebheni ngesikhathi eminza,” kusho uSgt Ngcobo.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UMUFI uNkk Thuli Khumalo USHAYA amakhala umndeni wowesifazane okuthiwa ugwazwe wabulawa ngesihluku kanye nendodana yakhe eNgwelezane, eMpangeni. Kulesi sigameko esenzeke ngoLwesine olwedlule, kushone uNkk Thuli Khumalo (56) nengane yakhe yomfana uMbuso Khumalo (13). Kuthiwa izidumbu zabo zitholwe ekhaya, zinamanxeba okugwazwa emzimbeni. Ngokusho kwesihlobo esicele ukungadalulwa, umndeni kawuyizwa kahle eyokubulawa kwabo “yisigebengu”. Sitshele Isolezwe ukuthi esinye isihlobo esisondelene nomufi, sitshele umndeni ukuthi isigameko senzeke sikhona naso ekhaya. Kuthiwa sithe sona besicashile ngesikhathi isigebengu sigwaza sibulala owesifazane nendodana yakhe. “Okudidayo wukuthi esitatimendeni asibhalise emaphoyiseni, uguqukile kulokhu akusho emndenini, wathi ufike isigameko sesenzekile kodwa umbonile umsolwa kancane,” kusho isihlobo. Elanda ngalokhu okuthiwa isihlobo sikutshele amaphoyisa, umthombo uthe siwatshele ukuthi sifike ekhaya sibuya emsebenzini, saqaphela ukuthi akukhanyisiwe endlini kodwa kuvuliwe. “Uveze ukuthi uthe esengaphakathi wabona isithunzi sithi shazi, wazitshela ukuthi uMbuso. Uthe uhambe wayokhanyisa ngasekhishini, lapho abone khona ukuthi akuyena uMbuso kodwa isigebengu esiphethe ijazi lakhe ne-laptop, maqede, saphuma sabaleka,” kusho umthombo. Uqhube wathi isihlobo sitshele amaphoyisa ukuthi siphumile sasijaha isigebengu, esivele seqa uthango, sawa, sashiya phansi i-laptop nejazi. “Uthe ngesikhathi esebuyela endlini, ilapho abone khona ukuthi uMbuso ulimele, wase etshela omakhelwane,” kusho umthombo. Umthombo uthe ngesikhathi kufika umndeni nomakhelwane endaweni yesigameko, lesi sihlobo besingakayikhulumi ekalona wesifazane. “Kubuze umndeni ukuthi uphi uThuli, kwayima kuqala ecingwa. Yiso sihlobo esijike samthola kuqala phansi kombhede, naye egwaziwe,” umthombo usho kanje. Uthe awekho amaconsi egazi abeconse aze ayofika ngaphansi kombhede. Uthe basola sona isihlobo lesi ngokufa kwalaba ababili ngenxa yokushintshashintsha inkulumo uma sichaza okwenzekile. Umthombo uveze ukuthi basola ukuthi lesi sihlobo sifike sagwaza lona wesifazane, sase sifihla isidumbu sakhe ngaphansi kombhede. “Sisola ukuthi uMbuso yena ubulawelwe ukuthi ubone okuthile, naye wasale esebulawa,” sisho kanje. Umthombo uqhube wathi okunye okwenza bashaye amakhala ukuthi bathole ngasekupheleni konyaka odlule, ukuthi lona wesifazane ubehlukunyezwa kuleli khaya. “Yena uMbuso uke wagijima waya emzini wesinye isihlobo, eyocela ukuthi sizolamulela unina ngoba uyashawa. Nebala waficwa eshaywa ngempela,” kusho umthombo. Uthe yena futhi uMbuso ubethi uma edlala nezinye izingane, akhiphe amazwi athi ziyajabula zona ngoba abazo omama abashaywa muntu. “Siwatshelile amaphoyisa konke lokhu nokuthi sifuna uphenyo lwawo luqale khona egcekeni ngoba aseneme ngezitatimende ezingafani,” kusho umthombo. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal uLt Col Paul Magwaza, uthe amaphoyisa aseMpangeni aphenya amacala amabili okubulala kanjalo nelokugqekeza kulandela isigameko esenzeke eNgwelezane ngoLwesine. "Kubikwa ukuthi ubaba uthole isidumbu sendodana yakhe nesomkakhe emagumbini ahlukene, benamanxeba okugwazwa emzimbeni. Utshele amaphoyisa ukuthi ngesikhathi engena endlini, owesilisa ongaziwa uphume eyinhlamvu ephethe ubhakha, okuthe uma ejomba uthango, i-laptop yaqathaka," kusho uMagwaza. Uthe akukaboshwa muntu ngesigameko.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UMBHIKISHO wamanzi uholele ekutheni izakhamuzi zaseZiqwaqweni eMlalazi zivale umgwaqo uR66 eShowe ZIFUNGE zagomela ukuthi zizoqhubeka nokuwuvala ngamathayi avuthayo umgwaqo uR66, eShowe, izakhamuzi ezingenawo amanzi eZiqwaqweni, eMlalazi. Lezi zakhamuzi esezinengekile zitshele Isolezwe ukuthi sekuphele izinyanga ezimbili zingenawo amanzi. Omunye wazo, uMnuz Ntethelelo Mpungose, uthe okubacasula kakhulu wukuthi izakhamuzi zaku-ward 9, okuyi-ward engumakhelwane wabo, zona zinawo amanzi. “Sizizwa sideleleka siyizakhamuzi zaku-ward 10. Asiqondi ukuthi kwenzeka kanjani ukuthi ku-ward 9 abekhona amanzi, kuthi kweyethu, kungaphumi ngisho iconsi kompompi,” kusho uMpungose. Uthe bezwe ngandlebenye ukuthi kukhona abasebenzi bakaMasipala wesiFunda, iKing Cetshwayo, abathengwa yiqembu elithile lepolitiki ukuthi bavale amanzi ku-ward 9. “Asazi ukuthi lezi zinsolo ziyiqiniso kangakanani kodwa zisicabangisa okuningi ngoba ngempela asinikwa thina amanzi,” usho kanje. INDLALA yamanzi iholele ekutheni izakhamuzi zaseZiqwaqweni eMlalazi zivale umgwaqo uR66 eShowe Uthe sebeze baqashe izimoto ezibabiza u-R200 ukuyobakhelela amanzi ku-ward 9. Uthe okubuhlungu wukuthi iningi alisebenzi, alinayo le mali. “Kudingeka ukuthi ukhiphe okungenani o-R200 ababili ngesonto ukuze uthole amanzi anele. Asinayo le mali. Eminye imizi iphethwe yizaguga. Ziphoqeleka ukuthi zihlephule empeshenini yazo ukuze zithole amanzi,” kusho uMpungose. Uthe ezinye izaguga zisuke zingenayo le mali, zize zingene ezibophezelweni nabezimoto eziqashwayo ukuthi abahambe bayozikhelela amanzi, zizokhokha uma sezihole impesheni. Uveze ukuthi okunye okubaphatha kabi wukuthi akhona amaloli athunyelwayo ukuthi abahlinzeke ngamanzi kodwa abashayeli bawo, bawadayisela imindeni enemali. “Amaloli afika ebusuku azokwethela abanamathangi, abawakhokhela u-R500 amanzi. Abangenamali, basala kanjalo,” kusho uMpungose, othe nalokhu bafuna kungenelelwe kukho. Esinye isakhamuzi, uMnuz Sibusiso Mkhize, sithe, bazoqhubeka nokubhikisha kuze kuphume amanzi kompompi babo. “Sikhathele wukuxhashazwa. Balokhu bebika imbiba nebuzi, thina esikufunayo amanzi,” kusho uMkhize. Okhulumela uMasipala wesiFunda iKing Cetshwayo, uNkk Rekha Naidoo, uthe akusekude ukuthi inkinga yamanzi ebhekene nomphakathi waku-wadi 10 eMlalazi ixazululwe ngokugcwele. Uthe iziphathimandla zikamasipala waseKing Cetshwayo kanjalo nowaseMlalazi, zibe nomhlangano nezakhamizi ezithintekayo. "Ukuphazamiseka kwamanzi bekudalwa ukuthikamezeka kwesiphehli samanzi Kwahlokohloko. Lokhu kulungisiwe ngoLwesihlanu," kusho uNkk Naidoo. Uthe okunye ukwenzekayo ukuthi amanzi avulelwa imiphakathi ngezikhathi ezehlukene, okwenza bangakwazi ukuwathola ngesikhathi esisodwa amanzi. "Kulezo zindawo amanzi asuke engaphumi kuzona, siwahlinzeka ngamaloli," usho kanje. Uthembise ukuthi lesi simo esibonakala eZiqwaqweni, sizoshintsha esikhathini esingamasonto ambalwa kusuka manje njengoba kukhona izinhlelo zokuqeda inkinga yamanzi kuwadi 9 no-10. Uthe projekthi yokuqala edle uR65 million esisetshenzwe cishe u-78%, ezolungela ukunikezelwa emphakathini ezinyangeni ezimbili ezizayo, izohlinzeka ngamanzi imindeni engu-1 350 yaseNkume, Gawozi naseZiqwaqweni. Uveze ukuthi eyesibili edle uR72 million, izohlinzeka isibalo esifanayo semindeni yakuwadi 9, yona uthe isiku-92% umsebenzi osuqediwe kuyona.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: ISIKOLE iMaphephetha High, eMatata, eNanda, sithungelwe ngomlilo BUSADIDEKILE ubuholi besikole imaphephetha High, ematata, enanda, kulandela isigameko sokungqongqiswa kwenye ingxenye yaso ngolwesihlanu. Emlilweni okuthiwa ubonwe omakhelwane ezintatha, kushiswe ihhovisi likathishanhloko, elephini lakhe, amane ama-head of department nekilasi elilodwa elincikene nompheme okungqongqiswe imoto ebisetshenziswa abafundi abenza izifundo zokukhenikha. Usihlalo wesigungu sesikole, umnuz Mzokhona Khumalo, uthe basashayisana ngamakhanda ngokuthi ubani lo obenesifiso sokucekela phansi isikole. “Kusobala ukuthi umlilo uthungelwe umuntu futhi sisola ukuthi ubesebenzisa ibhomu likaphethroli. Okusididayo ukuthi ukwenze lokhu nganhlosoni ngoba azikho izinxushunxushu esikoleni. Othisha bonke bayezwana, iSGB nayo iyezwana. Akukho muntu onanxa nomunye,” kusho uKhumalo. Uthe kuningi okumqoka okubalahlekele ngaphakathi emagunjini ashisiwe. Phakathi kwakho ubale ama-riphothi abafundi abequkethe imiphumela yabo yokuphela kwesigaba sokuqala sonyaka, athe bebezonikwa wona maduze. Uphinde wabala nemishini emithathu yokufothokhopha, amaphepha abalulekile abafundi, izincwadi kanjalo nazo zonke ezinye izinsizakusebenza ezisetshenziswa othisha uma befundisa. “Sife olwembiza futhi asikazi nokuthi izothini indlela eya phambili. Abahloli bafikile ngosuku lwesigameko, bafike babuka umonakalo, babhala phansi abakubonile. Thina sizoba nomhlangano sodwa kusasa (esho namuhla) bese sibiza owabazali bonke maduze,” kusho uKhumalo. Uthe ukufunda nokufundisa akukazoqhubeka ngoba umonakalo ucekele phansi zonke izinsizakusebenza zawo wonke amabanga esikole. Udalule ukuthi uthole ucingo lumbizela esigamekweni ngo-5:45 ekuseni, wathatha imizuzu engu-15 ukuthi afike khona. Uthe ufike kukhombisa ukuthi imoto isishe yangqongqa kanti kulawa amanye amahhovisi, umlilo ubusha ngaphakathi ungakaphumeli ngaphandle. Umthombo weSolezwe, uthe kwenzeka lesi sigameko nje, kunesonto kukhishwe wonke amafasitela emakilasini angomahamba nendlwana esikoleni. Uveze ukuthi ngasekuqaleni konyaka, kukhona umuntu owahamba wathwebula isikole, maqede wakhenikha isithombe nge-Artificial Interligence (AI), sakhombisa isikole sisha, wase esinameka ezinkundleni zokuxhumana. “Kwathi uma kugijinywa kuyiwa esikoleni, kwatholakala ukuthi asinalutho. Akuzange kunakwe lutho ngaleso sikhathi kodwa sekuyacaca manje ukuthi leso senzo sasixoxa indaba,” kusho umthombo, othe ayinuki ingosiwe. Uphinde wadalula eyokuthi kukhona umoya wokudayiswa kwezikhala zokufundisa kulesi sikole, okuthiwa sinezikhala zothisha ezimbili. Nokho uthe akekho ofuna ukuphumela obala ngaleyo ndaba, okusolakala ukuthi ingahle ibe yisizathu sokushiswa kwesikole. AboMnyango wezeMfundo KwaZulu-Natal - kweminye imithombo yabezindaba - baveze ukuthi banalo ulwazi ngesigameko, bathi sithikameze ukufunda nokufundisa.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UNGQONGQOSHE wemiSebenzi yoMphakathi, uMnuz Dean Macpherson noKhomishana wamaPhoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uLieutenant General Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi, besesikhungweni i-Forensic Science Laboratory, evulwe ngoLwesihlanu, eMayville Image: Leon Lestrade/Independent Newspapers ZIYIFANISE nokunqoba kwesifundazwe empini yobugebengu obubucayi, eyokuvulwa kweForensic Science Laboratory (FSL), eMayville, eThekwini, ngoLwesihlanu. Izinhlaka ezilwa nobugebengu emphakathini, zithe le laboratory enikezelwe nguNgqongqoshe wemiSebenzi yoMphakathi kuzwelonke, uMnuz Dean Mcpherson kwibamba likaNgqongqoshe wamaPhoyisa kuzwelonke, uSolwazi Firoz Cachalia, ibuyisa ithemba empini yokulwa nobugebengu esifundazweni. Phakathi kokunye okuningi okuyamaniswa nophenyo lwamacala, izoba yisikhungo esizohlola amasampula olibofuzo oluqondene namacala okudlwengula enzeka esifundazweni. Kuzokhumbuleka ukuthi phambilini, amasampula alolu hlobo abethunyelwa esikhungweni esenza umsebenzi ofanayo esisePitoli. Lokhu bekuholela ekutheni kube khona izikhalo ngamacala abucayi afana nawokudlwengula njengoba bekuhlale kuvela ukuthi uyaphela nonyaka imiphumela yolibofuzo ingabuyile. Lokhu kuthiwa bekudalwa ukuthi lesi sikhungo senza umsebenzi osuke ulethwe nangezinye izifundazwe. Umsunguli weThekwini Neighbourwood Watch, eqapha ubugebengu emalokishini ehlukene eThekwini, uMnuz Andile Jali, uthe ukuvulwa kwesikhungo kuwukunqoba eyobugebengu esifundazweni. “Lokhu kusho ukuthi uphenyo olumaqondana nokuhlolwa kolibofuzo emacaleni okudlwengula, seluzoyeka ukushaya ngonyawo lonwabu, lokhu kusho ukushesha kokutholakala kobulungiswa kubagilwa bokudlwengulwa kanjalo nemindeni yabo,” kusho uJali. Uthe indaba yokwethembela esikhungweni ebesisePitoli, bekubalahlekisela ngethemba abagilwa kanjalo nemindeni yabo. “Umuntu ubefike adlwengule, aboshwe, bathi bayabona abagilwa nemindeni yabo, usededelwe, usezihambela ngokukhululeka emphakathini, kube sengathi ezobulungiswa zibenzela phansi." Uthe uma kwenzeka okufuze lokhu imiphakathi igcina isola amaphoyisa ngokuthi ehlulekile ukwenza umsebenzi wawo ekubeni kungekho asuke angakwenza ukuphuthumisa uhlelo lokuhlolwa kolibofuzo. Uqhube wathi abakubhekile manje ukushesha kokuphothulwa kwamacala okudlwengula enkantolo njengoba kungasekho okuzoba yisithiyo ophenyweni oluqondene nokuhlolwa kolibofuzo. Isolezwe likhumbule iziwombe ezimbalwa ezike zenzeka lihambele amanye amacala ezinkantolo ezehlukene eThekwini. Kwesinye isiwombe esenzeka eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseThekwini, eminyakeni embalwa edlule, kwangena icala lokudlwengulwa kowesifazane lapho imantshi eyayilisingethe yakhombisa okukhulu ukunengeka ngokuhamba kwesikhathi eside ingabuyi imiphumela yolibofuzo. “Leli cala ngiyalihoxisa okwesikhashana. Sekuphele inqwaba yezinyanga ingabuyi imiphumela yolibofuzo. Ukuthi uhulumeni waseNingizimu Afrika uyahluleka ukulungisa inkinga yokubambezeleka kwemiphumela yolibofuzo e-laboratory, akuyona inkinga yami leyo noma ekamsolwa,” kwasho imantshi. Yaqhuba yathi ukumgcina ngaphakathi esitokisini umsolwa ngesikhathi kusalindwe imiphumela yolibofuzo okungaziwa ukuthi iyobuya nini, kuwukucindezela amalungelo akhe. Ngaleso sizathu, yamdedela, yathi necala iyalihoxisa, lobuye livulwe uma  sekubuye imiphumela yolibofuzo. Kwenzeka esifanayo eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseNtuzuma, nyakenye, lapho okwakuboshwe khona uthisha wasesikoleni iMtapo High, eLindelani, ngecala lokudlwengula umfundi, wamkhulelisa. Imantshi yavele yamdedela ngaphandle kokuthandabuza, ithi vele kusazothatha eside isikhathi ukuthi icala liqulwe njengoba kwakusazolindwa imiphumela yolibofuzo, okungaziwa ukuthi izobuya nini ePitoli.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMNTWANA uGcwalisile kaGideon Zulu-Kabanyane SEKUPHINDE kwehla omunye umshophi eNdlunkulu kaZulu kulandela ukushona kochazwa njengenqolobane, uMntwana uGcwalisile kaGideon Zulu. UMntwana uGcwalisile ubengumbhali wezincwadi, abe nenhlangano ethuthukisa abesifazane, kanti futhi uke wasebenzela izinhlaka zikahulumeni ezihlukene. UMntwana uGcwalisile uyindodakazi yowayenguMphathiswa wezokuThuthukiswa koMphakathi, uMntwana uGideon. Okhulumela iSilo neNdlunkulu, uMntwana uThulani kaGqikazi Zulu, uthe bagqenywe engeqiwantwala ngokuguqa kukaMntwana uGcwalisile. "Uzokhumbula ukuthi uMntwana ubengumbhali wezincwadi njengoba eke wabhala incwadi nangoyise. Uke wabhala incwadi yamahubo, ebhalela izikole. Ubeyinqolobane uqobo lwayo njengoba ulwazi abeluthola kuyise abelugcina. Uma uzokhumbula kahle sebebancane kakhulu abaseNdlunkulu abadala abasadla anhlamvana. Kunzima uma sibabona behamba," kusho uMntwana UMntwana uThulani uthe kuyabakhathaza ukushona ngokulandelana kwabaseNdlunkulu. "Lolu daba lubanga amahloni. Uma ukhumbula kusuka ngomhla ka- 18 Ephreli kuhlezi kunomngcwabo eNdlunkulu. Ngaleyo mpelasonto kwakungcwatshwa oSuthu (uMntwana uGibizizwe), ngelandelayo kwakungcwatshwa kithi (eZibindini, uMntwana Gcinabani Thembisile Zulu). Kule mpelasonto bekungcwatshwa uMntwana uMuziwoxolo. "Sibona sengathi kunomshophi okuyinto ejwayelekile eNdlunkulu. Kuvamile ukuthi uma kwehla umshophi bese kwenzeka ngokulandelana. Sikhalela iSilo ukuthi ngesikhathi saso bese kuhamba abantu abadala." Indodana kaMntwana uGcwalisile, uLuyanda Kabanyane, ifake umyalelzo ezinkundleni zokuxhumana lapho imemezele khona ukuguqa koMntwana. Icele ukuba banikwe ithuba lokuzila njengomndeni. Ibandla obekukhonza kulo uMntwana uGcwalisile, iMethodist Church of Sourthern Africa Paarl Valley Circuit, limchaze njengomuntu obezinikele futhi enothando. "Ubeyisibusiso ebandleni. Uzakhele igama ngokusebenzela uNkulunkulu. Sizohlezi siwakhumbula amagalelo akhe." UMntwana uGcwalisile uneziqu zobudokotela azithola eNyuvesi yaseToronto, eCanada. Ngo-2011 waklonyeliswa emcimbini wamaqhawe namaqhawekazi owawuhlelwe yiNedbank. Waklonyeliswa ngomsebenzi owenziwa yinhlangano ayisungula iQolothani Makhosikazi.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMHOLI weMKP, uMnuz Jacob Zuma, nephini lomholi weqembu, uDkt John Hlophe UMHOLI weMPK, uMnuz Jacob Zuma, uveze eyokungenisa kosomathuba abalandela ibhodwe eliconsayo eqenjini ngesikhathi enza izinguquko. UZuma uthe umbiko wocwaningo abalwenzile uthole ukuthi iqembu lisengcupheni ngenxa yokujoyina kwabantu abajahe izikhundla. Ukusho lokhu esitatimendeni esifundwe okhulumela iMKP, uMnuz Nhlamulo Ndhlela, esethulwe ngoMgqibelo. UZuma umemezele ukusungulwa kohlaka lobuholi olusha iMKP Institute nokuhlakazwa kwesigungu esiphezulu iNational High Command. Uhlaka olusha lusungulwe emva kocwaningo oluthathe izinyanga ezingu-18. Uhlaka olusha luzoholwa iPhini lomholi weMKP, uDkt John Hlophe, futhi lona luzobika ngqo kuZuma. Amanye amalungu ohlaka olusha uNdhlela, uSotswebhu weMKP ePhalamende, Nkk Mmabatho Mokoena-Zondi, oyinhloko yeHhovisi likaMengameli kwiMKP, uMnuz Lindelani Mbambo, Nkk Khanyisile Litchfield-Tshabalala, uMnuz General Manana, noMnuz Oupa Mathebula. Uhlaka olusha ilona oluzoqoka isigungu esiphezulu esisha. "Iningi labantu abazoqokelwa esigungwini esiphezulu abantu ababe yingxenye yobuholi bokuqala ngesikhathi sikhankasela ukunqoba ngamalengiso ukhetho lukazwelonke lwango-2024. Abanye abazoqokwa sizobheka ebuholini bezifundazwe nakomakadebona ukuze sizokwenza isiqiniseko sokuthi iqembu limeleleke kahle yonke indawo." Uhlaka olusha lithweswe ijoka lokuqinisekisa ukukhulula abahlwempu emaketangeni enhlupheko kanye nokulwa nokungalingani uZuma athe kudla lubi ngaphansi kukahulumeni wokubambisana. UZuma uthe angeke bavume ukuthi iqembu liphazanyiswe osomathuba abafuna izikhundla. "Umbiko uthole ukuthi iqembu lisengcupheni ngenxa yosomathuba abafuna izikhundla, izimpi zangaphakathi nokungena kwabantu abahlose ukuzophazamisa ukusebenza kweqembu. Angeke sivume ukuthi abantu abathanda izikhundla bathikameze umkhankaso wokukhulula abantu." UZuma uthe basemkhankasweni wokunqoba ngamalengiso ukhetho lohulumeni basekhaya lwangoNovemba, nokhetho lukazwelonke lwango-2029. UZuma unxuse onke amaqembu amancane ukuba ahlangane kwakhiwe inhlangano eyodwa. "Imiphumela yocwaningo ikubeka ngokusobala ukuthi abantu bakhathele amaqembu ezepolitiki. Inkohlakalo yenze ukuthi abantu bengabe besawathemba amaqembu ezepolitiki. Yonke indawo abantu baphelelwe ithemba ngenxa yokwehluleka kwezinhlelo zikahulumeni ukushintsha impilo yabantu. Senze izinguquko ebuholini beMKP ngoba nakhu sifuna ukuthi iqembu likwazi ukwemukela abantu abaqhamuka ezinhlakeni ezahlukene."

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: IKOMITI lasePhalemende elibhekelele ukusebenza kwemali yomphakathi lihlezi imbashalala uMasipala waseThekwini ngezinsolo zenkohlakalo, ukuqasha ngokwenzelela ophikweni lwamaphoyisa omkhandlu nezinsolo zocansi ezibhekiswe kwimenenja yomkhandlu. Ikomiti libhalele iMeya yomkhandlu, uMnuz Cyril Xaba, licela ukuba ichaze ngalezi zinsolo kanye nezinye. IMEYA yeTheku, uMnuz Cyril Xaba UMasipala weTheku kulindeleke ukuthi uphekwe ngebhodwe elincane uma usuvele phambi kwekomiti ukuzochaza ngalezi zinsolo. Encwadini ebhalwe usihlalo wekomiti, uMnuz Songezo Zibi, ikomiti licele ukuba uXaba achaze kabanzi ngezinsolo zenkohlakalo ekuqashweni kwamaphoyisa kamasipala. Ngo-2024, kwasuka umsindo ngesikhathi kuqashwa amaphoyisa kamasipala angu-500 emva kokuthi owesifazane wabonga wanconcoza kunobhala wegatsha le-ANC athi waba nesandla ekutheni kuqashwe umzukulu wakhe. UZibi ucele uXaba ukuba achaze ngophenyo olwenziwe ngalezi zinsolo. "Sicela uchaza ukuthi yiziphi izinhlelo ezikhona zokuqinisekisa ukuthi akubi khona ukwenzelela uma kuqashwa?" UZibi ucele uXaba ukuba alethe umbiko ogcwele ngezinsolo zocansi ezibhekene nomenenja yomasipala, uMnuz Musa Mbhele, ezenziwa yiPhini lemenenja yomkhandlu, uNksz Kim Makhathini. "Iyiphi inkampani eyaqashwa ukuba iphenye izinsolo? Ubani owaqasha le nkampani futhi yabiza malini? Ngabe ukhona omunye umsebenzi le nkampani eyake yawenza lapha emkhandlwini? Ubani owagunyaza ukuqashwa kwayo?" Image: RSA Parliament UZibi uyalele uXaba ukuba achaze ngokuqashwa kukankosikazi wesikhulu sezezimali emkhandlwini, uDkt Sandile Mnguni. "Imiphi eminye imisebenzi ake wayenza lapha emkhandlwini? Obani abagunyaza ukuqashwa kwakhe?" Ikomiti lifuna ukwazi ukuthi obani abanikazi bamaloli amanzi aqashwe umkhandlu. "Ngabe imalini asebekhokhelwe yona kule minyaka emihlanu eyedlule?" Ikomiti lifuna ukwazi ngokubambezeleka kohlelo lokwakhiwa kwezindlu eNanda olubizwa ngeNamibia 8 Housing Project. Lolu hlelo lwezigidi zamarandi lwaqala ngo-2019. Ikomiti liyalele umkhandlu ukuba uchaze ngohlelo lokufakwa kwengqalasizinda yokuthuthwa kwendle olwaqala ngo-2019. "Iluphi uhlelo olwalandelwa ngesikhathi kukhishwa ithenda yalo msebenzi? Kungani izinkampani zingakaze zikhokhelwe? Yini eyenze ukuthi uhlelo lubambezeleke? Ngabe luzoqedwa nini lolu hlelo?" Ikomiti licele uXaba ukuthi achaze ngo-R60 million owabhubhudlwa ngonyakamali owedlule. UXaba uyalelwe ukuba aphendule le mibuzo namhlanje. Okhulumela uXaba, uMnuz Mluleki Mntungwa, uthe bayitholile incwadi kaZibi kodwa wathi ngeke aphawule ngezinto okubuzwa ngazo kule ncwadi. UMntungwa uthe ubuholi bomkhandlu buzophendula kahle ngalezi zinto emhlanganweni abazokuba nawo namalungu ekomiti. "Engingakusho nje ukuthi sizokuba nomhlangano namalungu ekomiti kuleli sonto. Angikwazi ukungena kulezi zinto okubuzwa ngazo kule ncwadi."

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: no NFP new member4.jpg UMNZ Sipho Mbatha Image: NQOBILE MBONAMBI SEKUQUBUKE imvunge kwi-NFP kulandela amahlebezi okuthi osanda kuxoshwa yi-IFP kwesobukhansela, uMnuz Sipho Mbatha, ugixabezwe ngesikhundla esibalulekile kuleli qembu eligubuzelwe izimpi zangaphakathi. Amalungu eqembu anganelisekile akhala ngokunikwa kukaMbatha isikhundla sikaNational Organizer. Amahlebezi okuthi uMbatha unikwe isikhundla abhebhetheke emva kokuba kusabalale incwadi okuthiwa ibhalwe uyena lapho azisa khona amalungu eNFP ngomcimbi ozohanjelwa umholi weqembu, uMnuz Ivan Barnes. Kule ncwadi uMbatha uzibiza ngo-National Organizer. UMbatha usanda kuxoshwa ekubeni ikhansela le-IFP kuMasipala wesifunda iKing Cetshwayo. UMbatha waxoshelwa izinsolo zokuthi ubenobulungu bamaqembu amabili kanye nezinsolo zokugwazisa abantu ayebathembisa umsebenzi namathenda kwamasipala. Amalungu anganelisekile athe ukunikwa kukaMbatha isikhundla kuphambene nemigomo yeqembu. Ilungu elicele ukuba igama lalo lingadalulwa lithe imigomo yeNFP ikubeka kucace ukuthi umuntu kufanele abe ilungu leqembu iminyaka emihlanu ngaphambi kokuthi anikwe isikhundla. "Kazi kuyoze kube nini izikhundla zinikwa abantu abafikayo eqenjini? UMbatha asimazi nokuthi ujoyine nini njengoba esenikwa isikhundla. Mina ngamgcina eyikhansela le-IFP ngiyathuka namhlanje uma sengizwa kuthiwa usenikwe isikhundla esikhulu kangaka. Ingoba bebengekho yini abanye abantu abebengaqokwa?" Umholi uthe uMbatha washiya onile kwiNFP njengoba esenikwa isikhundla nje. "Ngesikhathi iNFP iphuma kwi-IFP, saphuma naye. Wasishiya simanxebanxeba, waphindela kwi-IFP. Namhlanje uzonikwa isikhundla. Kaze uzobenza njani labantu ashiye ebaqolile kwi-IFP?" Omunye umholi uthe ukunikwa kwabantu izikhundla ngendlela engaqondakali kwenza ukuthi amalungu eqembu aphelelwe umdlandla. "Icobana amathambo le ndaba yabantu abanikwa izikhundla ngendlela engaqondakali futhi yenza ukuthi kube nzima ukuthi amalungu eNFP abamukele. Nabo nje abasebenzi ngokukhululeka ngoba basuke belandelwa izinkulumo." Unobhala jikelele weNFP, uMnuz Sunset Xaba, uthe abakaze bamqoke uMbatha. UXaba uthe bayibonile incwadi okuthiwa ibhalwe uMbatha kodwa wathi abazi ukuthi ubenikezwe ubani igunya lokuthi ayibhale. "Akayena u-organizer wembu. Thina u-organizer esinaye uBawinile Mhlongo. Asikaze simqoke loyo Mbatha, angimazi nangokumbona. Angimazi ukuthi ubethunywe ubani ukuthi abhale leyo ncwadi." UXaba uthe uMbatha wayephethe lesi sikhundla ngesikhathi kusekhona umsunguli weqembu, uNkk Zanele kaMagwaza-Msibi. Imizamo yokuthola ukuphawula kukaMbatha ayizange iphumelele njengoba ucingo lwakhe belukhala lungangeni futhi engazange ayiphendule imibuzo ayithunyelwe.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMENGAMELI Cyril Ramaphosa UMENGAMELI, Cyril Ramaphosa, uvulelwe elinye icala elithinta udaba lokuntshontshwa kwezishaqane zamadola aseMelika epulazini lakhe iPhala Phala. I-ActionSA ivulele uRamaphosa icala imsola ngokuthi waqamba amanga ngesikhathi edalula isamba semali eyalahleka epulazini lakhe. USotswebhu we-ActionSA, uNkk Lerato Ngobeni, uthe kunobufakazi obukhomba ukuthi inkulu kakhulu imali eyantshontshwa kunalena eyashiwo uRamaphosa. URamaphosa wadalula ukuthi kwantshontshwa u-580 000 wamadola aseMelika, nokusho ukuthi imali elinganiselwa ku-R10 million uma ibuyiselwa emalini yakuleli. UNkk Ngobeni uthe ubufakazi bakamumva bukhomba ukuthi imali eyantshontshwa ayikho ngaphansi kuka-R15 million. UNkk Ngobeni uthe kungavela okushaqisayo ngesamba semali eyantshontshwa uma kungase kuqhubeke kuphenywe. "Siyiqaphelile imibiko ethi iNational Prosecuting Authority (NPA) nayo ishaya amakhala ngesamba esalahleka. INPA iqale ukushaya amakhala emva kokuphenya ngemali eyayiphuma ingena kwi-akhawunti yomunye wabantu ababoshelwe ukuntshontsha imali epulazini likaRamaphosa. Kuningi okungavela uma kungase kuphenywe ngemali eyangena neyaphuma kuma-akhawunti abanye abasolwa." URamaphosa uvulelwe icala lokwehluleka ukubika ngobugebengu, elokuqamba amanga efungile kanye nelenkohlakalo. Udaba lokuntshontshwa kwemali epulazini likaRamaphosa luqale phansi emva kwesinqumo seNkantolo yoMthethosiseklo sangesonto eledlule. Inkantolo yachitha isinqumo sePhalamende sokunqaba ukwamukela umbiko wethimba elalijutshwe ukuba liphenye ngokuntshontshwa kwamadola aseMelika epulazini likaRamaphosa. Umbiko wethimba elaliholwa owayeyiJaji, uSandile Ngcobo, wathola ukuthi kungenzeka ukuthi kukhona imigomo uRamaphosa ayiphula. Isinqumo senkantolo sesenze ukuthi iPhalamende liqhubeke nohlelo lokukhipha uRamaphosa esikhundleni. Amaqembu ezepolitiki afuna uRamaphosa akhishwe esikhundleni. Amalungu esigungu esiphezulu kwi-ANC abenomhlangano oyisipesheli, izolo ebusuku lapho ebhunge khona ngalolu daba. Amalungu amaningi e-ANC ayameseka uRamaphosa kodwa kukhona afuna ukuthi ehle esikhundleni.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: KWESOKUNXELE, nguMnuz Vusimuzi 'Cat' Matlala obewukhumbintethe namaphoyisa asolwa nawo ecaleni lethenda yezigidi zamaradi ayeyithole kwiSAPS. Kuvela ukuthi uMatlala angase alivume leli cala awumshungu kulo noMkhuzi wamaPhoyisa onikwe ikhefu, uGeneral Fannie Masemola ANGASE alivume icala usomabhizinisi, uMnuz Vusimuzi "Cat" Matlala, oboshwe kanye noKhomishana wamaPhoyisa omisiwe, uGeneral Fannie Masemola. UMbuso uveze ukuthi kunezingxoxo eziqhubekayo ezingaholela ekutheni uMatlala avume icala elithinta ithenda yezigidi zamarandi eyanikwa inkampani yakhe. UMatlala, Masemola namanye amaphoyisa angu-12 athinteka ekukhishweni kwethenda ka-R360 million, bavele kafushane eNkantolo yeMantshi ePitoli, izolo. Icala labo lihlehliselwe uJune 26, ukuze kuqedelwe uphenyo. Abameli bakaMatlala bacele inkantolo ukuba ikhiphe umyalelo wokuthi uMatlala aqhubeke nokugcinwa ejele elisePitoli, iKgosi Mampuru II, esikhundleni sokubuyiselwa ejele eliKwaZulu-Natal, iBongweni. Abameli bakaMatlala bathe ukugcinwa kwakhe eKgosi Mampuru II kuzokwenza ukuthi kube lula ukuthi balungiselele icala ngenxa yokuthi ijele liseduze nalapho kuqulwa khona icala. Umshushisi, u-Advocate Santhos Manilall, uthe abaphikisani nesicelo sabameli bakaMatlala. UManilall uthe ukugcinwa kukaMatlala eKgosi Mampuru II kuzokwenza ukuthi kube lula ukuqhubeka nezingxoxo. "Izingxoxo sezifinyelele kwesinye isigaba, kungenzeka siqale izingxoxo zokuthi uMatlala avume icala. Kungaba kuhle kakhulu uma engaqhubeka atoke eKgosi Mampuru." Okhulumela inhlangano yezokushushisa, iNational Prosecuting Authority (NPA), uMnuz Kaizer Kganyago, uthe kunobufakazi obusha ababutholile ngalolu daba. "Sifuna ukuqinisekisa lobu bufakazi obusha esibutholile. Sifuna ukubheka kahle izitatimende zokusebenza kwezimali." UMatlala uphinde abhekane noxhaxha lwamacala okukhona kuwo nawokuzama ukubulala. Igama likaMatlala livela ezinsolweni ezenziwa uKhomishana wamaPhoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uLieutenant General Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi. Bekumatasa ezinkantolo izolo, amacala athinta abantu amagama abo avela phambi kweKhomishini eholwa yiJaji Mbuyiseli Madlanga. Usomatekisi odumile, uMnuz Joe "Ferrari" Sibanyoni, uvele kafushane eNkantolo yeMantshi eKwaggafontein, eMpumalanga, izolo. USibanyoni uboshelwe icala lokufuna ngodli imali kusomabhizinisi. Ekhuluma nabezindaba, uSibanyoni uthe umsulwa. "Ngiyinceku kaNkulunkulu mina." USibanyoni uthe uzoshumayela ivangeli ejele njengoba eboshiwe. Uboshwe kanye noMnuz Mvimbi Masilela noMnuz Philemon Msiza. Icala labo lihlehliselwe uLwesihlanu. Imenenja kaMasipala waseKurhuleni, uMnuz Kagiso Lerutla, nesikhulu sophiko lwamaphoyisa omkhandlu esimisiwe, uMnuz Julius Mkhwanazi, bavele kafushane eNkantolo yeMantshi eBoksburg. ULerutla noMkhwanazi babhekene namacala enkohlakalo, ukukhwabanisa nokuphazamisa ukusebenza kwengalo yomthetho. Icala labo lihlehliselwe uJuni 9. Umholi weqembu iNational Coloured Congress, uMnuz Fadiel Adams, ubevele eNkantolo yeMantshi ePinetown. U-Adams ubhekene necala lokuphazamisa ukusebenza kwengalo yomthetho. Izolo uqhubekile nokufaka isicelo sebheyili, icala lahlehliselwa uLwesihlanu.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: OWAYENGUMSAKAZI oKhozini, uNgizwe Mchunu, uphonsele inselelo ubuholi be-ANC eThekwini, ukuba bulalele abantu bakuleli abakhala ngabokufika abangekho emthethweni. UMchunu uthe abaholi kufanele basukumele izikhalazo zabantu abalwa nabokufika abakuleli abangekho emthethweni. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ubuholi be-ANC esifundeni iTheku, buzomkhalisa kulandela ukungqongqiswa komuzi wakhe oseMbumbulu. Umuzi kaMchunu uthungelwe ngomlilo ngeSonto, kanti ukushiswa kwawo kusolwa ukuthi kuhlobene nemibhikisho yokulwa nabokufika, njengoba uMchunu engomunye wabantu abaphambili kule mibhikisho. Utshele abaholi be-ANC esifundeni iTheku ukuthi abantu bakuleli sebekhathele abakufika abakuleli ngokungemthetho. "Siyanicela baholi ukuthi nisilalele. Ngiyazi ukuthi izindlebe zenu ziyaphuza ukuzwa kodwa ngiyacela ukuba nisilalele. Le nto esiyenzayo lapha inokuthula. Siyazi ukuthi nonke nina baholi bezepolitiki niyaphuza ukuzwa." Abaholi be-ANC abebeyokhalisa uMchunu bebeholwa ongumdidiyeli we-ANC eThekwini ophinde abe uSomlomo kuMasipala waseThekwini, uMnuz Thabani Nyawose. UMchunu uphonsele uNyawose inselelo ukuba asukumele umonakalo odalwa ngabantu bokufika edolobheni eThekwini. "Baba ngiyazi ukuthi ngelinye ilanga ungase ube yimeya kamasipala njengoba nibekana ngale ndlela enibekana ngayo. Awukwazi ukwenza sengathi awuyiboni le nto eyenzeka edolobheni eThekwini. Amabhilidi angcolile. Abantu bokufika bagwazela izikhulu zoMnyango wezaseKhaya. Bagwazela wonke umuntu." UMchunu uthe kuyamjabulisa ukuthi i-ANC eThekwini isanda kukhipha isitatimende lapho ithe iyayeseka imibhikisho elwa nabokufika abakuleli ngokungemthetho. UNyawose uthe i-ANC ayinawo umgomo wokuvikela abantu bokufika abakuleli ngokungemthetho. "Abantu abangena emngceleni yethu bengenawo amaphepha abagunyaza ukuthi bangene eNingizimu Afrika, i-ANC iyakugxeka lokho. Lena imfundiso nje eqhutshwa abantu abafuna ukuveza i-ANC njengenhlangano ephambana nehlombe, engasabalaleli abantu." UNyawose uthe bayakugxeka ukushiswa komuzi kaNgizwe, wathi banethemba lokuthi amaphoyisa azobathola ngokushesha abasolwa. I-ANC inikele ngevawusha ka-R10 000 yokuthenga izimpahla zokwakha.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: Umengameli Cyril Ramaphosa Image: File/IOL graphics UNGOTI wezomthetho ubona lulude ukhalo oluzohanjwa njengoba uMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa, ememezele ukuthi uzophonsela inselelo umbiko wethimba elalijutshwe iPhalamende ukuba liphenye ngokuntshontshwa kwezishaqane zamadola aseMelika epulazini lakhe, iPhala Phala. Ungoti weDonda Attorneys, uMnuz Melusi Xulu, uthe uhlelo lokukhipha uRamaphosa esikhundleni lungase lunyomfe ukufakwa kwesicelo esiphonsela inselelo umbiko wethimba elaliholwa owayeyijaji, uSandile Ngcobo. UXulu uthe uRamaphosa angase afake isivimbelo esizonqanda ukuqhubeka kohlelo lwasePhalamende lokumkhipha esikhundleni. URamaphosa umemezele ukuthi uzophonsela inselelo umbiko owathola ukuthi kungenzeka ukuthi kukhona imithetho ayephula ekusingathweni kodaba lokuntshontshwa kwemali epulazini lakhe. Enkulumweni abeyibhekise ezweni, uRamaphosa uveze ukuthi ngeke asule esikhundleni. URamaphosa uthe uyasihlonipha isinqumo senkantolo kodwa wathi umbiko wethimba elalijutshwe iPhalamende unamaphutha. "Nginqume ukuphonsela inselelo umbiko wethimba. Angikwenzi lokhu ngoba nakhu ngingalihloniphi ikomiti kodwa ngenza lokhu ngoba ngikholelwa ukuthi kunamaphutha embikweni wethimba." URamaphosa uthe umbiko wethimba ugcwele izinto ezingenabufakazi. "Inzwabethi yonke lena equkethwe umbiko wethimba." UXulu uthe kungase kuthathe isikhathi eside ukuthi inkantolo inqume esicelweni esizofakwa uRamaphosa. "Kungathatha izinyanga noma unyaka. Ukhumbule ukuthi uma icala ezolifaka enkantolo enkulu, uma kuwukuthi akuhambi ngendlela afisa ngayo kungenzeka adlulele enkantolo yamacala adlulisiwe. Angaze afike eNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo. Uzokhumbula ukuthi isicelo se-EFF salalelwa ngo-2024 kodwa isinqumo size saphuma ngo-2026. Ngakho ke kunzima ukusho ukuthi icala lizothatha isikhathi esingakanani." UXulu uthe uhlelo lokukhipha uRamaphosa esikhundleni luzoqhubeka uma engasifaki isivimbelo senkantolo. "Uma engasifaki isivimbelo senkantolo bazoqhubeka nabakwenzayo. Kuzomele asifake isicelo sokuvimba ukuqhubeka kohlelo lokumkhipha esikhundleni. Uma engakwenzi lokho uzothi eqhubeka enkantolo nabo bebe beqhubeka ngapha." Amaqembu ezepolitiki afuna ukuthi luqhubeke uhlelo lokukhipha uRamaphosa esikhundleni yize ephonsela inselelo umbiko wethimba. Okhulumela i-IFP, uMnuz Mkhuleko Hlengwa, uthe iPhalamende kufanele liqhubeke nomsebenzi walo. "Uhlelo lokukhipha uMengameli esikhundleni luwumsebenzi wePhalamende okungafanele umiswe ukuthi kunecala elifakiwe. Kufanele uhlelo luqhubeke kanye necala." Okhulumela i-EFF, uMnuz Sinawo Thambo, uthe bebevele bekulindele ukuthi uRamaphosa uzophonsela inselelo umbiko. "Akananembeza. Silindele ukuthi uSomlomo (uNkk Thoko Didiza) asiphikise isicelo sikaRamaphosa. Nathi sizosiphikisa isicelo sikaRamaphosa. Yini emenze ukuthi alinde isikhathi eside ukuthi aphonsele inselelo isinqumo senkantolo. IPhalamende kufanele liqhubeke nezinhlelo zalo. Izinhlelo zePhalamende akufanele zimiswe isicelo sikaRamaphosa."

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMNUZ Melikhaya Ngcongo IBONA ukufunda kwezimeya kungaba yikhambi elingaqeda idimoni lokungalandelwa kwemigomo komasipala baKwaZulu-Natal iMeya kaMasipala waseRichmond esanda kuthweswa iziqu zemfundo ephakeme, uMnuz Melikhaya Ngcongo. UNgcongo uthe ukuncipha kwezimeya ezingaziboni izimpukane kuzokwenza ukuthi banciphe nomasipala abathola imibiko enogcobho. Ukusho lokhu engxoxweni abe nayo neSolezwe. UNgcongo usanda kuthweswa iziqu iPost Graduate Diploma in Public Management eNyuvesi yasePitoli. Umasipala awuphethe wenza kahle kakhulu ekuphathweni kwemali njengoba uyingxenye yomasipala abane baKwaZulu-Natal abathole imibiko engenagcobho ngonyaka odlule. Bekungunyaka wesibili umasipala uthola umbiko ongenawo ugcobho, kanti lona ngunyaka wesithathu uNgcongo esesihlalweni. UNgcongo uthe kuba lula ukuthi izikhulu zizenzele umathanda uma imeya ingayazi imithetho eyengamele ukusetshenziswa kwemali. "Uma uyimeya uwena ongusihlalo wekomiti lezezimali kumasipala.
