Uma imeya ingaziboni izimpukane kuzokonakala. Izikhulu zizozenzela umathanda. Ngeke sifunde sonke siyizimeya, kodwa labo ithuba elisavuma kubona kufanele baye kofunda. Uma uwumholi kufanele uwazi umsebenzi wezikhulu zomasipala kanye nemithetho ethinta ukuphathwa kwemikhandlu. Ugcina uvuma noma izikhulu sezenza izinto ezingalungile uma ungayazi imithetho." UNgcongo uthe izimeya kufanele ziqinisekise ukulandelwa kwemithetho uma zifuna ukuthola imibiko engenagcobho. "Ngeke uwuthole umbiko ongenagcobho uma ungathembekile. Kufanele uqashe abantu abawaziyo umsebenzi. Omasipala abaningi bathola imibiko enogcobho ngenxa yokuthi abayilandeli imigomo uma besebenzisa imali. Inkinga enkulu ilapha ophikweni okukhishwa kulo amathenda." UNgcongo uthe usaphokophele ukuthola ezinye iziqu zemfundo ephakeme. "Uma uwumholi kubalulekile ukuthi uzithuthukise ngolwazi. Ngesikhathi ngiqokelwa ukuphatha umasipala ngo-2023 ngabona ukuthi kuningi engingakwazi mayelana nokuphathwa komasipala kanye nokusetshenziswa kwemali yomphakathi." UNgcongo uthe uyaqhubeka nezifundo zakhe njengoba manje esenza iMasters. Ebuzwa ukuthi ngabe ufisa ukufinyelela eziqwini zobudokotela yini uthe uzofinyelela uma iNkosi ivuma. UNgcongo uthe bekungelula ukuqhuba iziqu zemfundo ephakeme. "NgesiZulu nje ngingathi ibingitibulisa, namanje ngisaqhubeka nokutibula ngoba ngisaqhubeka nokufunda. Akulula ukucaza isikhathi sakho njengoba bengifunda ngisebenza. Ukuzimisela kwami yikhona okwenze ukuthi ngigcine ngiphumelela."

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMNUZ Christo Botha obemele i-DA embangweni wesikhundla sobumeya kuMasipala waseMhlathuze KUSHONE obemele i-DA embangweni wesikhundla sobumeya kuMasipala waseMhlathuze, uMnuz Christo Botha. UBotha, obeyiphini lemeya kuMasipala waseMhlathuze, ushone emva kokuxinwa ukugula. Izindaba zokushona kwakhe zimenyezelwe ngumholi we-DA KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Sithembiso Ngema. UNgema uthe bagqemeke engeqiwa ntwala ngokushona kukaBotha. "Asilahlekelwanga nje iphini lemeya kodwa silahlekelwe umholi obesebenzela abantu. Uyena obezomela i-DA embangweni wesikhundla sobumeya eMhlathuze njengoba kuza ukhetho lohulumeni basekhaya. Angeke siwakhohlwe amagalelo akhe kuMasipala waseMhlathuze  nokulwela kwakhe abantu baseMhlathuze." UBotha ubephinde abe yikhansela lakuWard 2. USomlomo womkhandlu, uMnuz Tobias Gumede, unxuse abantu abahlala kuWard 2 abadinga usizo lomkhandlu ukuba bathinte ihhovisi lakhe namalungu ekomiti lekhansela kuWard 2 ukuze ezothola usizo. UGumende udlulise amazwi enduduzo emndenini kaBotha.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMHOLI we-IFP, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa Image: Leon Lestrade / Independent Media UMHOLI we-IFP, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa, uthe ngeke baseseke isiphakamiso sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa. UHlabisa uwachaze njengosomathuba amaqembu afake isiphakamiso sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaRamaphosa. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ekhuluma nabeNewzroom Afrika. Amaqembu iMKP ne-ATM afake isiphakamiso sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaRamaphosa. UMENGAMELI Cyril Ramaphosa La maqembu afake isiphakamiso sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaRamaphosa emva kokuba iNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo ichithe isinqumo sePhalamende sokunqaba ukwamukela umbiko wethimba elalijutshwe ukuba liphenye ngokuntshontshwa kwezishaqane zamadola aseMelika epulazini likaRamaphosa. UHlabisa uthe asikho isidingo sokuthi kulalelwe isiphakamiso sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaRamaphosa, wathi kufanele kulandelwe imiyalelo yenkantolo. "Emva kwesinqumo senkantolo sakhipha isitatimende. Sikholwa wukuthi kufanele kulandelwe umthetho njengoba naye uRamaphosa eshilo ukuthi asihloniphe isinqumo senkantolo. IPhalamende kufanele lenze lokho okushiwo yisinqumo senkantolo. Akukuhle ukuba usomathuba. Asikho isidingo sesiphakamiso sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaRamaphosa. Kunesinqumo senkantolo esishoyo ukuthi yiluphi uhlelo okufanele lulandelwe. Thina njenge-IFP asibona abantu abathanda ukubukwa. Siyavumelana ngokuthi kufanele kulandelwe imiyalelo yenkantolo." USomlomo wePhalamende, uNkk Thoko Didiza, ubengakasiphenduli isicelo se-MKP nese-ATM. Phezu kwesicelo se-MKP ne-ATM kuphinde kube nesicelo se-EFF efuna ukuthi iPhalamende lisungule ngokushesha ikomiti elizoqhuba uhlelo lokukhipha uRamaphosa esikhundleni. Umholi we-EFF, uMnuz Julius Malema, uthe uRamaphosa uzolahlekelwa okuningi uma ekhishwa esikhundleni ngohlelo abaluhlongozayo. "Uma ukhishwa ngalolu hlelo ulahlekelwa imihlomulo etholwa ababengomengameli. Lapha sibala impesheni, izimoto kanye nabasebenzi onikezwa bona uma usuthatha umhlalaphansi." UMalema uthe bazolwa nemizamo kaRamaphosa yokubambezela uhlelo lokuthi akhishwe esikhundleni. Kuvela ukuthi uRamaphosa angase aye enkantolo eyophonsela inselelo umbiko wekomiti elalijutshwe yiPhalamende ukuba liphenye lolu daba. "Noma angaya enkantolo sizoya nathi enkantolo. Sizothi lolu daba luyaphuthuma, alulalelwe ngokushesha. Uma ecabanga ukuthi uzosibambezela, uqambe eshilo. Sizofaka isicelo sokuthi udaba lulalelwe ngokushesha. Uzobizwa ukuba azoziphendulela." Ukuze uRamaphosa akhishwe esikhundleni ngalolu hlelo kufanele isiphakamiso sivotelwe u-66% wamalungu ePhalamende. UMHOLI we-EFF, uMnuz Julius Malema UMalema uthe abanandaba noma singachithwa ekugcineni isiphakamiso sokuthi uRamaphosa akhishwe esikhundleni ngoba bazobe sebemhlambalaze bamqeda ngesikhathi evele phambi kwekomiti elizobe liqhuba uhlelo lokuthi akhishwe esikhundleni. "Asinandaba nokuthi uyakhishwa yini esikhundleni. Indaba yokuvota isekugcineni. Kuyothi kufikwa lapho uRamaphosa uyobe esehlambalazeke waphela. Kuningi okuzovela. Sizombiza ezoziphendulela sibize nabasebenzi basepulazini. Kuningi okuzovela. Abasebenzi bazositshela iqiniso. Ngiyazi ukuthi kwakungekhona okokuqala bentshontsha imali lapha. Maningi amagama abantu abazovela. Uzombuleka izinqe."

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMHOLI we-EFF, uMnuz Julius Malema UMHOLI we-EFF, uMnuz Julius Malema, uthi ukuboshelwa kwakhe icala lokuqhumisa isibhamu kumenza abe sezingeni lezingqalabutho ze-ANC ezaboshelwa amacala ezepolitiki abala kuzo owayengumengameli wokuqala ngaphansi koMbuso wentando yeningi, uMnuz Nelson Mandela, owayengumholi we-ANC, uMnuz Oliver Tambo, kanye nowayengunobhala jikele we-ANC, uMnuz Walter Sisulu. UMalema uthe uma kuwukuthi ugcinwa ngempela ephoqiwe ukuthi akayodonsa isigwebo ejele kuyomele aboshwe ejele elisesiqhingini okwakugcinwe kulo uMandela nezinye izishoshovu, iRobben Island. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ekhuluma emcimbini wethimba lentsha ye-EFF elijutshwe ukuba liqhube umkhankaso wokhetho lohulumeni basekhaya. UMalema wagwetshwa iminyaka emihlanu ebhadla ejele ngecala lokuqhumisa isibhamu. Usiphonsela inselelo isigwebo sakhe. Uthe ngeke ehle esikhundleni ngoba elahlwe icala lezepolitiki. "Ngiboshelwe icala lezepolitiki. Ngiboshelwe into engayenza eqenjini lezepolitiki. Uma befuna ukungibopha kufanele bavule iRobbeni Island. Ngeke ngiyogqunywa nezigebengu ejele. Angisona isigebengu. Mina ngisezingeni loMandela, Sisulu noTambo. Angiyena utsotsi. Mina abangibambanga ngintshontsha, angibulalanga muntu. Ngenza into ephathelene nepolitiki emcimbini weqembu lezepolitiki. Manje bafuna ukungibophela lokho." UMalema uthe labo abafuna aboshwe bafuna ukumvala umlomo. "Abafuni ukuthi ngiqhubeke nokukhuluma iqiniso ngoba abezwani neqiniso." UMalema uthe uzoqhubeka nokulwa noma angaboshwa. Unxuse intsha ukuba iphume ngezinkani iyobhalisela ukuvota njengoba kuzokuba nokhetho lohulumeni basekhaya ngoNovemba. Kuzokuba nempelasonto yokubhalisela ukuvota ngenyanga ezayo. Intsha yakuleli ayimandla ekuvoteni. UMalema uthe ukuvota kwentsha okhethweni oluzayo kungenza ukuthi amaqembu amadala angaliboni elidlalayo. "Uma kuwukuthi uyaqaphela kahle i-ANC, DA ne-IFP abayingeni eyokunxenxa abantu ukuthi babhalisele ukuvota. Ingoba bafuna kungabi noshintsho ohlwini lwabantu ababhalisele ukuvota." UMalema uthe intsha kufanele isukumele izinkinga ezibhekene nemiphakathi yayo. "Akufanele nigcine kuphela ngokuba izishoshovu ezikhungweni zemfundo ephakeme kuphela. Kufanele nisukumele izinkinga ezikhungethe imiphakathi yangakini ngoba uma niyocasha ezikhungweni zemfundo ephakeme nizozifica zinilindile lezi zinkinga emakhaya uma seniqedile ukufunda."

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMENGAMELI weZwe uMnuz Cyril Ramaphosa USAZOQHUBEKA nokuqhoqhobala isikhundla uMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa, oveze ukuthi uzophonsela inselelo umbiko wethimba elalijutshwe iPhalamende ukuba liphenye ngokuntshontshwa kwezishaqane zamadola aseMelika epulazini lakhe iPhala Phala. URamaphosa uveze ukuthi uzonikela enkantolo eyophonsela inselelo lo mbiko owathola ukuthi kungenzeka ukuthi kukhona okufanele akuphendule ngalolu daba. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ethula inkulumo, ngoMsombuluko ebusuku. IPhalamende lawuchitha umbiko wethimba elaliholwa yijaji eselathatha umhlalaphansi, uSandile Ngcobo. Kepha ngoLwesihlanu iNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo ichithe isinqumo sePhalamende sokunqaba umbiko wethimba. URamaphosa uthe uyasihlonipha isinqumo senkantolo kodwa wathi umbiko wethimba elalijutshwe iPhalamende unamaphutha. "Nginqume ukuphonsela inselelo umbiko wethimba. Angikwenzi lokhu ngoba nakhu ngingalihloniphi ikomiti kodwa ngenza lokhu ngoba ngikholelwa ukuthi kunamaphutha embikweni wethimba." URamaphosa uthe umbiko wethimba ugcwele izinto ezingenabufakazi. "Inzwabethi yonke lena equkethwe umbiko wethimba." URamaphosa uthe angeke ashiye esikhundleni. "Kukhona abathi angisule esikhundleni. Akukho lapho khona inkantolo ethe nginecala. Ngizimisele ukuqhubeka ngihole abantu baseNingizimu Afrika. Muningi umsebenzi osangihlalele."

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMHOLI we-DA KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Sithembiso Ngema Image: Facebook/ DA KZN UMHOLI omusha we-DA KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Sithembiso Ngema, uyihlomise wayibhekisa kowayengumengameli, uMnuz Jacob Zuma, neqembu lakhe iMKP. UNgema uthe ufuna ukuthi baqinise kakhulu umkhankaso wabo wokhetho lohulumeni basekhaya ngakubo kaZuma, eNkandla. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ethula inkulumo engqungqutheleni yokukhetha ubuholi be-DA KwaZulu-Natal, ebingempelasonto. UNgema oyikhansela kuMasipala waseThekwini, wehlule ilungu lePhalamende, uMnuz Mzamo Billy, embangweni wokuhola i-DA KwaZulu-Natal. UNgema uthe amanzi avele asengenile endlini kuZuma njengoba sebenomholi obamele esikhungweni semfundo ephakeme esiseNkandla. "Sizokwenza isiqiniseko sokuthi siyakhula eNkandla. Kade ngikhuluma nosihlalo we-DA eNkandla, ngamtshela ukuthi kufanele sibe nabantu abazongenela ukhetho lwamakhansela khona." UNgema uthe abayesabi nakancane iMKP eyafika kwezwakala okhethweni lukazwelonke lwango-2024. "Siyazi ukuthi kukhona iqembu elisha elifaka izikibha ezimhlophe, singangalo." UNgema uthe ayikho indawo abangeke bakhankase kuyo lapha KwaZulu-Natal. "Sizokhankasa kuzo zonke izindawo zaKwaZulu-Natal, sizokhankasa kubona bonke omasipala. Kulabo abahambe bethi siyinhlangano ebandlululayo, abaqhubeke nokusho njalo kodwa thina sizoqhubeka nokuhambisa izidingo kubantu. Abanye babethi i-DA ayisoze iphathe lapha KwaZulu-Natal. Buka namhlanje sinabaphathiswa kuhulumeni waKwaZulu-Natal futhi siphethe uMasipala waseMngeni." UNgema uthe ufuna iqembu likhule kuzona zonke izindawo. Uthe bazoqhubeka nokukhuluma namakhosi nezinduna ukuze baqinisekise ukuthi iqembu liyakhula ezindaweni zasemakhaya. UNgema ukhulume ngobunzima kuhulumeni wokubambisana ophethe KwaZulu-Natal abayingxenye yawo kodwa wathi bazoqhubeka nokuyibamba ishisa kuhulumeni ababambisene kuwo ne-IFP, ANC neNFP. "Siyazi ukuthi kunezinkinga kuhulumeni wesifundazwe. Abasimele esiShayamthetho bayaqhubeka nokufuna izimpendulo kubaholi be-ANC. Ukuthi sibambisene ne-ANC akusho ukuthi sekufanele siyeke lokho esikholelwa kukhona." Abanye abaholi abaqokelwe ezikhundleni uNgqongqoshe wezeMisebenzi yoMphakathi, uMnuz Dean Macpherson, oqokelwe kwesikaSihlalo, kwathi uMphathiswa wezeMsebenzi yoMphakathi, uMnuz Martin Meyer, waqokelwa kwesePhini lomholi. Abaqokelwe kwesePhini likasihlalo yiPhini leMeya kuMasipala waseMngeni, uMnuz Sandile Mnikathi, ilungu lesiShayamthetho, uMnuz Sakhile Mngadi, nomxhumanisi we-DA neNdlunkulu kaZulu, uMnuz Swelakhe Shelembe.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMHOLI we-IFP, uMnuz  Velenkosini Hlabisa ABAHOLI be-IFP okuthiwa abezwani, okunguMengameli weqembu, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa noSihlalo weqembu KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Thami Ntuli, bakhulume ngezwi elilodwa, bekhuza uqhekeko iqembu lethula umkhankaso wokubhalisela ukhetho lohulumeni basekhaya. UHlabisa noNtuli baxwayise ngokuthi labo abadala uqhekeko bazophazamisa umkhankaso wokhetho lohulumeni basekhaya. Bakusho lokhu ngesikhathi beshiyelana inkundla emcimbini obuseMpangeni. UHlabisa uhlabe wahlikiza labo abathi ngeke bazigqoke izikibha ezinobuso bakhe kanye nalabo abathi ngeke besazigqoka izikibha ezinobuso bomsunguli weqembu, Inkosi Mangosuthu Buthelezi. Amalungu e-IFP asanda kunikezwa ilungelo lokuba agqoke izikibha ezinobuso bukaHlabisa kodwa kunamalungu eqembu angafuni ukufaka izikibha ezinobuso bukaHlabisa. Kusanda kusabalala inkulumo yelungu leqembu, uNksz Lindi Ndlovu, lapho lithi ngeke lisigqoke isikibha esinobuso bukaHlabisa ngesikhathi likhuluma nelungu lesiShayamthetho elingusihlalo wophiko lwentsha kwi-IFP KwaZulu-Natal omisiwe, uMnuz Mncedisi Maphisa. UHlabisa uthe ukuba uButhelezi usekhona ubezokuba owokuqala ukugqoka isikibha esinobuso bakhe. Image: Independent Newspapers Archives UHlabisa uthe uButhelezi wayefuna ukuthi kube nezikibha ezinobuso bakhe ngesikhathi kubhekwe okhethweni lwango-2019. Ngaleso sikhathi uHlabisa wayengakabi umholi weqembu, wayemele i-IFP embangweni wesikhundla sikandunankulu waKwaZulu-Natal. "Ngathi Shenge angikabi umholi weqembu, asikwazi ukuba nezikibha ezinobuso bomuntu ongeyena umholi weqembu. Ngathi asisebenzise ubuso obaziwa abantu." UHlabisa uthe nangokhetho lohulumeni basekhaya lwango-2021, uButhelezi waphinda wenza isicelo esifanayo kodwa bamchitha ngenxa yokuthi umkhankaso wokhetho wasuke waphazanyiswa ukubheduka kobhubhane iCorona. "Ngaphambi kokhetho lwango-2024, uMntwana waphinde wenza isicelo esifanayo. Ngebhadi ke wabe esekhothama. Sabe sesinquma ukuthi siqhubeke nokusebenzisa ubuso bakhe okhethweni lwango-2024, njengendlela yokuqhakambisa amagalelo akhe. "Umuntu othi yena akasezokusigqoka isikibha soMntwana ngoba uthanda uHlabisa, ungumkhohlisi. Umuntu othi yena wethembeke kuMntwana, akazekusigqoka isikibha sikaHlabisa, ungumkhohlisi. UMntwana wathi uzokuba owokuqala ukugqoka esikibha esinobuso bukaHlabisa. Wena ngapha uhamba utshela abantu ukuthi angeke usigqoke isikibha esinobuso bukaHlabisa." UNtuli uthe asikho isidingo sokuthi amalungu e-IFP alwe wodwa ngoba iqembu linomholi oyedwa okunguHlabisa, wanxusa onke amalungu eqembu ukuthi aseke uHlabisa. "Kubaluleliile ukuthi sonke seseke umengameli emsebenzini wakhe. Asikwazi ukwehlukana. Sinomholi oyedwa, asinabo abaholi ababili. SinePhini likamengameli elilodwa, asinawo amaphini kamengameli amabili. SinoSihlalo waKwaZulu-Natal oyedwa, asinabo osihlalo baKwaZulu-Natal ababili. "Ngiyafisa ukugcizelela lokhu. Njengoba siya okhethweni, uma silibele ukuklwebhana sodwa azosehlula amanye amaqembu. Uma silibele ukwehlukana, azosehlula amanye amaqembu. Noma ubani ohola umkhankaso wokwehlukanisa iqembu loyo muntu uyisitha seqembu. Noma ngabe ubani osebenzela ukugxeka umengameli weqembu, usihlalo waKwaZulu-Natal, noma imuphi umholi weqembu, loyo muntu uyisitha sobumbano lwe-IFP."

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: Umsunguli we-IFP, Inkosi Mangosuthu Buthelezi UFA olubonakala kwi-IFP kufanele lubakhathaze abaholi beqembu. Iqembu elinezinhlangothi ezimbili ezibangayo lijwayele ukuba inyoka ezidla yona. Uma abaholi be-IFP bengakukholwa lokho abobuza kwi-ANC. I-ANC ilahlekelwe amandla nje namhlanje kungenxa yemibango yangaphakathi. Ngesikhathi i-ANC iya engqungqutheleni yokukhetha ubuholi yango-2007 kwakunezinhlangothi ezimbili, olweseka uJacob Zuma, nolwalweseka uThabo Mbeki. Sekuwumlando ukuthi kwanqoba uZuma nokwalandela ukuthi ababeseka uMbeki bahlubuke beyoqala inhlangano entsha, iCongress of the People. Umphumela wokuhlubuka kwabeseka uMbeki kwaba ukuthi kwehle ukweseka kwe-ANC okhethweni lwango-2009. Ezingqungqutheleni zokukhetha ubuholi be-ANC ezilandele eyango-2007 kuhlezi kunezinhlangothi ezimbili ezibangayo. Abasohlangothini oluhlulwayo bayaye behlubuke beqale amanye amaqembu njengoba i-ANC isizele amaqembu afana ne-EFF ne-MKP. Umphumela wokuhlubuka kwala maqembu uzwakale kakhulu kwi-ANC okhethweni lwango-2024 njengoba yahluleka ukuthola amavoti anele ukubusa ngokuzimela kuzwelonke nasezifundazweni iKwaZulu-Natal neGauteng. Abaholi be-IFP isike yabashaya le nduku Ngesikhathi owayengusihlalo we-IFP, uNkk Zanele kaMagwaza-Msibi, esungula iNFP, i-IFP yalahlekelwa inqwaba yomasipala okhethweni lohulumeni basekhaya lwango-2011. I-IFP yasala nomasipala ababili nje kuphela. Uma abaholi be-IFP bengabhekile ingase ibaphinde le nduku. Sekunesikhathi eside ikhulunyelwa phansi eyoqhekeko kwi-IFP. Mumva nje nengane encane isiyabona ukuthi kunomfantu onqabayo ukuvaleka nodalwa abathile abafuna ubuholi obehlukile ngaphakathi kwi-IFP. Lokhu kugqame kakhulu ngesikhathi kusabalala inkulumo eqoshiwe ephehla udlame yelungu lesiShayamthetho saKwaZulu-Natal elinguSihlalo woPhiko lwentsha kwi-IFP KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Mncedisi Maphisa. Kule nkulumo uMaphisa ukhuluma nelungu le-IFP, uNksz Lindi Ndlovu, elizwakala lithi ngeke lisigqoke isikibha esinobuso bomholi weqembu, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa. Kule nkulumo uNksz Ndlovu ukhala ngokubanjwa ngophondo kohlangothi lwabo emhlanganweni yokugcotshwa kwamaziko. Yile nkulumo efakazela ukuthi kunezinhlangothi ezimbili ezinezifiso ezingefani. UNksz Ndlovu uzwakala ethi abaholi abasohlangothini lwabo bavinjwa nangamatshe emigwaqweni ukuze bengayi emihlanganweni yokugcotshwa kwamaziko. UMaphisa uphendula ngokuthi akufanele abasohlangothini lwabo bavume ukudlala abasohlangothini ababanga nalo. UMaphisa uze asho nokusho ukuthi kufanele bashaywe, 'bafokofiswe', labo abasohlangothini ababanga nalo. UMaphisa noNkk Ndlovu bamisiwe njengoba bebhekene nekomiti lokuqondiswa ubugwegwe. Akuyona eyokuqala inkulumo eqoshiwe esike yasabalala. Phambilini kuke kwasabalala enkulumo eqoshiwe okukholakala ukuthi kuyo kukhuluma usomlomo woMasipala waseNewcastle, uMnuz Thengi Zulu. Kule nkulumo lomuntu okukholakala ukuthi uZulu uzwakala ecija itulo lokuthi bazoludlisela kanjani ogageni uhlangothi ababanga nalo emihlanganweni yokugcotshwa kwamaziko. Kusukela umsunguli weqembu osakhothama, Inkosi Mangosuthu kaMathole Buthelezi, wabeka phansi izintambo ngo-2019, ibilokhu ikhulunyelwa phansi eyezinhlangothi ezibangayo kwi-IFP. Kunezinhlangothi ezimbili ezibhekene ngeziqu zamehlo olunye olubizwa ngama-AU (abusekho ubunzima) kanye nelibizwa ngamaKKK (konke kuhamba kahle). Ama-AU kuthiwa ahamba noHlabisa ama-KKK wona kuthiwa afuna kukhishwe uHlabisa esikhundleni. Izimpi zangaphakathi kwi-IFP zigqame kakhulu emva kokukhothama kukaButhelezi ngo-2023 futhi sekubona ngisho nengane encane ukuthi inkulu inkinga lapha. Iphini lomholi we-IFP, Inkosi Mzamo Buthelezi, lisanda kuxwayisa ngokuthi iqembu alikulungele ukubhekana nomonakalo ozodalwa ilaba abagqugquzela uqhekeko eqenjini. Ikhuluma emcimbini obuseNquthu, Inkosi ithe baqala into abangeke bayimele laba abagqugquzela ukwehlukana eqenjini. "Le nto yethu yokuthi sibhekane sodwa izosilimaza kakhulu. Nginganitshela mina ngingabazi ukuthi njengeqembu asikulungele ukubhekana nomphumela wale nto esiyiqalayo. Angiphinde nginichazele, njengeqembu asikakasawoti ukuze sikwazi ukubhekana nalokhu esikuqala manje ukuba sikukhande. Ngamanye amanye amagama le nto yokuthi sibhekane sodwa, silwe sodwa, izosishaya isibhuqe nya. Siyophaphama ngakusasa kungekho kwalezihlalo esinazo." Emlandweni wayo weminyaka engu-51 i-IFP ayikaze ibhekane nezimpi zalolu hlobo. Umhlaziyi wezepolitiki waseNyuvesi yaKwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Zakhele Ndlovu, uthe akwethusi ukubona izimpi zangaphakathi ezifufusa kwi-IFP. "UMntwana uyena umuntu obeyibambile, ubeyinomfi. Siyazi ukuthi ukukhethwa kukaHlabisa akuhambisananga nenqubo ejwayelekile. UMntwana nje owakhomba uHlabisa. I-IFP ibanjwe isikhathi eside uMntwana, kunguyena oyi-glue. Njengoba engasekho ayisekho leyo glue ebiyihlanganisile." UNdlovu uthe okunye okudala uqhekeko kwi-IFP ukuthi sekunezikhundla kuhulumeni. "I-IFP isemandleni komasipala, kuhulumeni waKwaZulu-Natal, nakuhulumeni kazwelonke. Izikhundla zizobangwa ngoba wonke umuntu ufuna isinkwa. Kukhona abantu abangajabule ngenxa yokuthi bona abazitholanga izikhundla." UMENGAMELI we-IFP leader uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa Image: Leon Lestrade / Independent Media

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: AMAQEMBU aphikisayo alolela izembe uMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa, kulandela isinqumo seNkantolo yezoMthethosisekelo esivuse upelepele ogqokweni ngodaba lokuntshontshwa kwezishaqane zamadola aseMelika epulazini lakhe iPhala Phala. Amaqembu amabili asefake isiphakamiso sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaRamaphosa, kuneqembu lesithathu lona elifuna kusungulwe ngokushesha ikomiti elizoqhuba uhlelo lokukhipha uRamaphosa esikhundleni. Amaqembu i-MKP, EFF ne-ATM abhalele uSomlomo, uNkk Thoko Didiza. Nakuba izicelo zala maqembu zingafani kodwa onke afuna ukuthi uRamaphosa adliwe yizembe. I-MKP ne-ATM bafuna kulalelwe ngokushesha isiphakamiso sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaRamaphosa. I-EFF yona ifuna kusungulwe ngokushesha ikomiti elizoqhuba uhlelo lokukhipha uRamaphosa esikhundleni. Lolu hlelo oluhlongozwa yi-EFF luhlukile kunesiphakamiso sokungabethembi ubuholi. Umholi okhishwa ngaphansi kwalolu hlelo akayitholi imihlomulo yakhe okubalwa nempesheni njengoba kwenzeka kowayeyinhlomo yamajaji eWestern Cape, uDkt John Hlophe, nowayengumvikeli womphakathi, u-Advocate Busisiwe Mkhwebane. Uhlelo oluhlongozwa yi-EFF luyaye luthathe isikhathi njengoba kuba nezigcawu zokulalelwa kwezethulo lapho osuke esuswa esikhundleni enikwa ithuba lokuziphendulela. Uma kunesiphakamiso sokungamethembi umengameli kuyaye kube nempikiswano ePhalamende, bese kuyavotwa. Okungaphinde kubambezele uhlelo oluhlongozwa i-EFF ukuthi uRamaphosa aphonsele inselelo umbiko wethimba lasePhalamende elaliholwa yijaji eselathatha umhlalaphansi, uSandile Ngcobo, owathola ukuthi kungenzeka ukuthi kukhona uRamaphosa okufanele akuphendule ezinsolweni zokuthi awabikelwanga amaphoyisa ngokuntshontshwa kwemali epulazini lakhe. URamaphosa wake wazama ukuwuphonsela inselelo umbiko kodwa wabuye wayeka ngenxa yokuthi iPhalamende lawuchitha. Njengoba isinqumo sangoLwesihlanu sesibuyisele umbiko ezithebeni zePhalamende, kungeza uRamaphosa abuyele enkantolo. USihlalo we-EFF onguSotswebhu weqembu ePhalamende, uNkk Nontando Noluntshungu, ubhalele uNkk Didiza ecela ukuba kusungulwe ikomiti ngokushesha. UNkk Noluntshungu uthe isinqumo senkantolo siqede nya umbango obukhona ngalolu daba. Unqumele uNkk Didiza umnqamulajuqu wezinsuku ezimbili ukuba aqinisekise ukusungulwa kwekomiti. "Uma singayitholi impendulo kulesi esisibekile, uze wazi ukuthi sinelungelo lokukuthathela izinyathelo zomthetho. Lolu daba selubambezeleke kakhulu. Asifuni kuphinde kube nokubambezeleka." Umholi weMKP ePhalamende, uHlophe, uthe abasabuthembi ubuholi bukaRamaphosa. UHlophe uthe bafuna ukuthi isiphakamiso sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaRamaphosa silalelwe lingakashoni elangoLwesithathu. UHlophe nomholi we-ATM, uMnuz Vuyo Zungula, bathe bafuna ukuthi kuvotwe ngokuyimfihlo esiphakamisweni sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaRamaphosa. Ubuholi be-ANC KwaZulu-Natal buzwakalise ukumeseka uRamaphosa. Umdidiyeli wethimba elihola i-ANC KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Mike Mabuyakhulu, uthe isinqumo senkantolo asisho ukuthi uRamaphosa unecala. Amaqembu abambisene ne-ANC kuhulumeni wokubambisana, okubalwa kuwo iDA ne-IFP. awazange afune ukusho ukuthi azophikisana yini nokuthi kukhishwe uRamaphosa esikhundleni. La maqembu ame ngelokuthi kufanele kulandelwe umthetho.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: SBHEKWE ngabomvu isinqumo seNkantolo yezoMthethosisekelo ngodaba lwePhala Phala noMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa KUNGASE kuvuke upelepele ogqokweni azithole ebhekene nohlelo lokukhishwa esikhundleni uMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa, njengoba iNkantolo yezoMthethosisekelo izokhipha isinqumo ngodaba lokuntshontshwa kwezishaqane zamadola aseMelika epulazini lakhe iPhala Phala. Inkantolo izokhipha isinqumo esibhekwe ngabomvu namhlanje ngo-10 ekuseni. Inkantolo izonquma ukuthi kwakusemthethweni yini ukuthi iPhalamende lichithe umbiko wethimba elaliholwa yijaji eselathatha umhlalaphansi, uSandile Ngcobo. Umbiko wawuthole ukuthi kungenzeka ukuthi kukhona uRamaphosa okufanele akuphendule ezinsolweni zokuthi awabikelwanga amaphoyisa ngokuthathwa ngozwane kwenkece. Ukuchithwa kombiko kwasho ukuthi uRamaphosa uyaphunyuka esiphakamisweni sokuthi akhishwe esikhundleni. I-EFF ne-ATM babe sebefaka isicelo enkantolo bephonsela inselelo ukuchithwa kombiko. Bese kunesikhathi kulindwe isinqumo senkantolo njengoba icala laqulwa ngo-2024. I-EFF ike yaba nemibhikisho ehlukene ifuna ukuthi inkantolo ikhiphe isinqumo. Amalungu e-EFF azobe ebhikisha ngaphandle kwenkantolo namhlanje uma sekuphuma isinqumo. Umhlaziyi wezepolitiki waseNyuvesi yaKwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Zakhele Ndlovu, uthe uRamaphosa angase azithole esesobishini uma inkantolo ivuna i-EFF. UNdlovu uthe uma inkantolo ivuna i-EFF kuzoba nzima kuRamaphosa njengoba i-ANC ingasenazo izihlalo ezanele ePhalamende ezingenza ichithe noma yimiphi imizamo yokumkhipha esikhundleni. UNdlovu uthe kufanele uRamaphosa athandazele ukuthi amaqembu abambisene ne-ANC kuhulumeni aphikisane nemizamo yokumkhipha esikhundleni. "Abantu bamaqembu abusa ngokubambisana yibona engibabheke kakhulu. Umbuzo uthi amaqembu angaphakathi kuhulumeni wokubambisana ngabe azozama yini ukumvikela noma azokwenza umsebenzi wawo ngobuqotho." UNdlovu uthe kuzophinde kuncike nasohlelweni oluzosetshenziswa uma kuba nesiphakamiso sokukhipha uRamaphosa esikhundleni. "Uma kuvotwa ngokuyimfihlo uRamaphosa angajikelwa ngisho nangamalungu e-ANC angahambisani naye. Uma kuvotwa ngokuvulelekile uzosinda." Okhulumela i-EFF, uMnuz Sinawo Tambo, uthe basibheke ngabomvu isinqumo senkantolo. "Bese kuphele izinsuku ezingu-521 silinde isinqumo senkantolo. Yi-EFF kuphela ebilokhu imile, ifuna ukuthi uRamaphosa aphendule. Sibe nemibhikisho eminingi saphinde sabhalela nenhloko yamajaji (Jaji Mandisa Maya) sifuna izimpendulo ngalolu daba. Ukubambezeleka kwesinqumo kwenza ukuthi abantu bengazithembi izinhlaka zomthetho," kusho uTambo. Izinhlaka eziningi ezaphenya ngalesi sigameko okubalwa kuzo ihhovisi lomvikeli womphakathi, uphiko oluqapha ukusebenza kwamaphoyisa i-Ipid, iBhange loMbuso neSA Revenue Services zamkhipha phambili uRamaphosa. Lezi zinhlaka zalahla ngecala amaphoyisa ayegada uRamaphosa asolwa ngokuthi ashaya abasolwa aphinde asebenzisa izinsiza zoMbuso eyofuna abasolwa eNamibia. Umholi we-ATM ePhalamende, uMnuz Vuyo Zungula, ukhale ngokuthi izinhlaka zoMbuso zivikela uRamaphosa. "Lapha sibhekene nomuntu ovikelwa yizinhlaka zoMbuso ezihlukene. Abantu into okufanele bayazi wukuthi akekho umuntu ongaphezu komthetho. Naye umengameli kufanele abhekane nengalo yomthetho." Okhulumela iHhovisi likaMengameli, uMnuz Vincent Magwenya, unxuse ukuba abantu balinde isinqumo senkantolo. "Kunzima ukukhuluma manje ngoba inkantolo ayikasikhiphi isinqumo. Kunzima ukuthi sengingasho ukuthi kuzokwenzekani uma isinqumo senkantolo sisho lokhu. Okungcono asilinde ukuthi inkantolo ikhiphe isinqumo."

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMntwana uMuziwoxolo Zulu ISEMANZINI iNdlunkulu kaZulu kulandela ukushona koMntwana uMuziwoxolo Graduate Zulu obesebenza nophiko obelugada iSilo uMisuzulu Sinqobile kaZwelithini. UMntwana uMuziwoxolo ubeyiphoyisa futhi wayesophikweni olwalugada iSilo uGoodwill Zwelithini kaBhekuzulu. Okhulumela iSilo, uMntwana uThulani kaGqikazi Zulu, uthe uMntwana uMuziwoxolo ushone ngempelasonto. "Ifu elimnyama seliphinde lehla futhi eNdlunkulu kaZulu. UMntwana udlule ngokukhulu ukuzuma ngoMeyi 1. Udlula nje eneminyaka engu-49. Egameni leSilo Samabandla, iNdlunkulu nesizwe sonke sidlulisa ukulila bakwethu. Siyakhala, sikhalela iNgonyama ngoba lo ohambile ungomunye wabanawayo. Sikhalela isizwe, sikhalela abaNtwana baseNdlunkulu." UMntwana uThulani uthe uMntwana uMuziwoxolo ubezinikele kakhulu emsebenzini wakhe. "Usebenze kakhulu nophiko obelugada iSilo uZwelithini kaBhekuzulu kanti nakuyo iNgonyama esesihlalweni usebenzile." UMntwana uMuziwoxolo ushona nje iNdlukulu kaZulu ibisazikhotha amanxeba kulandela ukushona kwabaNtwana ngokulandelana. Ngenyanga eyedlule kushone abaNtwana ababili. Kuqale kwaguqa uMntwana owayekhongela iMbube ekhweni layo kwaMyeni, uGibizizwe Zulu, kwase kulandela uMntwana uGcinabani Thembisile "Sister Eunice" Zulu. UMntwana uThulani uthe kuyakhathaza ukudlula ngokulandelana kwabaNtwana baseNdlunkulu. "Sinobumbuzo ongephendulwe muntu ke nokho ezinhliziyweni zethu ukuthi awu kwenzekeni eNdlunkulu? Kwanomkhonto olokhu ugwaza uphindelela. Sicela imithandazo nina beSilo. Akukho esingakwenza, sibhekisa kuye umdali. Nilale ngenxa nina beNdlovu." UMntwana uThulani uthe uMntwana uMuziwoxolo uzongcwatshwa ngoMgqibelo, KwaNongoma. "UMntwana uzobekwa lapha eMakhosini, eMahhasini, emva kwenkonzo ezokuba lapha ezinkundleni zezemidlalo esigodlweni KwaKhethomthandayo ngehora lesishiyagalolunye ekuseni."

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: ZIKHALE ngaphansi izikhulu zikaMasipala wasebaQulusini, i-DA ivimba isiphakamiso sokuthi zigixabezwe ngamabhonasi. Image: Itumeleng English/ Independent Newspaper ZIKHALE ngaphansi izikhulu zikaMasipala wasebaQulusini, i-DA ivimba isiphakamiso sokuthi zigixabezwe ngamabhonasi. Isiphakamiso sokuthi izikhulu zomkhandlu zinikwe amabhonasi sichithiwe emhlanganweni womkhandlu emva kokuba i-DA izwakalise ukungahambisani nesiphakamiso. Umasipala uphethwe ngokubambisana yi-IFP ne-DA. Ukwenqaba kwe-DA ukweseka isiphakamiso kwenze ukuthi singaphumeleli. IKhansela le-DA, uMnuz Swelakhe Shelembe, lithe banqume ukuphikisana nesiphakamiso ngenxa yokuthi abukho ubufakazi abanikwe bona obukhombisa ukuthi lezi zikhulu ebezizonikwa amabhonasi ziwenze ngendlela encomekayo umsebenzi wazo. "Ukunika umuntu ibhonasi engakhombisanga ukuthi ukwenze konke abebekelwe ukuba akwenze kufana nokuthi uyamupha nje imali yomphakathi. Kufanele kube nombiko onobufakazi bokuthi umuntu ukwazile ukukwenza konke abebekelwe khona ngaphambi kokuthi umbonge ngebhonasi." UShelembe uthe bacele izikhulu obekuhlongozwa ukuthi zinikwe amabhonasi ukuba zilethe ubufakazi obukhombisa ukuthi zikwazile ukukwenza konke ebezibekelwe khona. "Ngenxa yokuthi abuzange bulethwe ubufakazi ebesibufuna, isiphakamiso sokuthi banikwe amabhonasi asizange siphumelele. Siyalele imenenja kamasipala ukuba yenze isiqiniseko sokuthi asikho isiphakamiso esifana nalesi esizolethwa emhlanganweni womkhandlu ngaphandle uma kuwukuthi sizokube sihambisana nobufakazi." UShelembe uthe kunzima ukukhuluma indaba yokunika izikhulu zomkhandlu amabhonasi ekubeni ingqalasizinda yomkhandlu ifadabala. Uthe ukubusa ngokubambisana angeke kubenze ukuthi bavume noma yini ephakanyiswa yiqembu abambisene nalo. "Sikukhombisile lokho namhlanje ngokuthi siphikisane nalesi siphakamiso. Ngesikhathi singena kuhulumeni sazibophezela ekusebenzeni ngobuqotho saphinda futhi sazibophezela ukuthi sizoqinisekisa ukuthi abantu bazithola ngendlela izidingo. Angeke sigudluke kulezi zibophezelo esazenzayo. Ngeke sivumelane nezinqumo ezingeke zibasize ngalutho abantu basebaQulusini. Abantu basebaQulusini kufanele bazi ukuthi imali yabo isebenze kanjani."

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: KUMISWE uSihlalo we-IFP Youth Brigade (IFPYB) KwaZulu-Natal, ozwakala engxoxweni eqoshiwe ephehla udlame, uMnuz Mncedisi Maphisa. UMaphisa umiswe nelungu le-IFP, uNksz Lindi Ndlovu, elizwakala kule nkulumo lithi ngeke lisifake isikibha esinobuso bomholi weqembu, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa. UMaphisa uyilungu lesiShayamthetho saKwaZulu-Natal futhi uke waba imeya kaMasipala wasebaQulusini, ekubeni uNksz Ndlovu, yena usebenza kumasipala ophethwe yi-IFP. Isinqumo sokumisa uMaphisa noNksz Ndlovu sithathwe emhlanganweni oyisipesheli wesigungu esiphezulu kwi-IFP obizwe emva kokusabalala kwayo. Okhulumela i-IFP, uMnuz Mkhuleko Hlengwa, uthe isigungu esiphezulu sithathe isinqumo sokumisa uMaphisa noNksz Ndlovu emva kokuba uMaphisa evumile ukuthi nguyena okhuluma kule ngxoxo eqoshiwe. UHlengwa uthe uMaphisa noNksz Ndlovu bazoqondiswa ubugwegwe. "UMaphisa umiswe kuzo zonke izikhundla okubalwa kuzo ukuba uSihlalo we-IFPYB KwaZulu-Natal nokuba ilungu loMkhandlu kaZwelonke kwi-IFP. Uzomiswa esikhundleni kuze kube udaba lwakhe lulalelwa uMkhandlu kaZwelonke. UNksz Ndlovu umisiwe kuzo zonke izinto ezithinta iqembu, akavumelekile ukuba abe yingxenye yezinto ezithinta iqembu kuze kuba kuphuma isinqumo ohlelweni lwakhe lokuqondiswa ubugwegwe lulalelwa uMkhandlu kaZwelonke." UHlengwa uthe isigungu esiphezulu sizoqhubeka nokuphenya lolu daba, bese sethula umbiko ogcwele emhlanganweni woMkhandlu kaZwelonke. "I-IFP ixwayisa abaholi bayo, amalungu nezinhlaka zeqembu ukuba bagweme ukwenza izinkulumo ezidala ezibudedengu, ezifaka iqembu ehlazweni nezidala uqhekeko eqenjini. Ubuholi be-IFP buzokwenza isiqiniseko sokuthi iyalandelwa yonke imigomo yeqembu." UMaphisa noNksz Ndlovu bangene obishini emva kokuba kusabalale inkulumo eqoshiwe lapho kuzwakala khona bekhuluma ngezimpi zangaphakathi kwi-IFP. Kule nkulumo kuzwakala uNksz Ndlovu ekhalaza kuMaphisa ukuthi abantu abasohlangothini lwabo bayavinjwa uma kunemihlangano yokugcoba amaziko. UMaphisa uphendula ngokuthi uNksz Ndlovu nabanye abasohlangothini lwabo akufanele bavume ukudlala abantu abasohlangothini ababanga nalo. UMaphisa uzwakala ethi abasohlangothini lwabo kufanele bashaye abasohlangothini oluphikisayo emihlanganweni yokugcotshwa kwamaziko okuvinjwa kuyo abasohlangothini abahambisana nalo. Uma iqhubeka inkulumo kuzwakala uNksz Ndlovu ethi kade ayenikwa izikibha ezinobuso bomuntu ambize ngalo baba, nokukholakala ukuthi ubesho izikibha ezinobuso bukaHlabisa. UNksz Ndlovu uzwakala ethi yena ngeke azigqoke izikibha ezinobuso "balo baba". Amalungu e-IFP asanda kuvunyelwa ukuba agqoke izikibha ezinobuso bukaHlabisa. Phambilini, bekuvumeleke izikibha ezinobuso bomsunguli weqembu, Inkosi Mangosuthu Buthelezi.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMXHUMANISI weDA neNdlunkulu kaZulu, uMnuz Swelakhe Shelembe UMXHUMANISI weDA neNdlunkulu kaZulu, uMnuz Swelakhe Shelembe, ungenele umbango wesikhundla esibhekwe ngabomvu engqungqutheleni yokukhetha ubuholi beDA KwaZulu-Natal. UShelembe uphakanyiselwe emjahweni wesikhundla sephini likasihlalo weDA KwaZulu-Natal nokuyisikhundla esibangwa kakhulu. Bayisishiyagalolunye ababheke lesi sikhundla, kanti ingqungquthela izoba ngoMeyi 9. UShelembe uthe ukuqokelwa kwakhe kulesi sikhundla kuzoqinisa ubudlelwano beqembu neNdlunkulu kaZulu namakhosi, kuphinde kukhulise iDA ezindaweni zasemakhaya, emalokishini nasemapulazini. "Abantu abaphakamise igama lami bathe into yokuqala abayibona ibalulekile wukuthi siyibukele eduze into ethinta ubukhosi, umphakathi wasemakhaya, owasemalokishini kanye nabantu abahlala emapulazini. Mina ngisebenzile kakhulu ezindaweni zasemakhaya, emalokishini nasemapulazini. "Ngiqale ukusebenza kulezi zindawo ngo-2012. Ukukhankasa kulezi zindawo kwehlukile, akufani nasesilungwini lapho okwazi khona ukukhankasa ngokuthi ufonele abantu noma ubathumele imiqhafazo. Abantu basemakhaya badinga ukuthi usondele eduze kwabo, wakhe ubudlelwano nabo." UShelembe uthe kuningi akwenzile kusukela aqokwa ukuba axhumanise iDA neNdlunkulu kaZulu ngo-2023. Uthe wakwazi ukuhlela ukuthi umholi weDA osanda kuphuma esikhundleni, uMnuz John Steenhuisen, ayokotha iSilo uMisuzulu Sinqobile kaZwelithini. "Ngaphinde ngahlelela ubuholi beDA KwaZulu-Natal ukuba buyokotha iSilo. Ngaphinde ngahlelela ubuholi besifundazwe ukuthi buyobona uNyazi (umholi wamaNazaretha ohlangothini lwaseBuhleni. Nemeya yaseMngeni (uMnuz Chris Pappas) maningi amakhosi engimxhumanise nawo. Lokhu ngikwenza ngoba ngiyazi ukuthi iKwaZulu-Natal yakhelwe kakhulu esisekelweni samasiko nenkolo." UShelembe uwusihlalo wekomiti elibhekele ukusebenza kwemali yomphakathi kuMasipala wesiFunda iZululand, aphinde abe uSotswebhu weDA kuMasipala AbaQulusi. Bobabili labo masipala baphethwe ngokubambisana yi-IFP neDA. UShelembe uzishaya isifuba ngokuthi uvundulule inkohlakalo eningi kule mikhandlu. UShelembe uyena umvusi wenyamazane ezinsolweni ezagcina ziholela ekuxoshweni kowayeyimeya kaMasipala wasebaQulusi, uMnuz Mncedisi Maphisa. "EZululand ziningi izimenenja ezixoshiwe ezinye eziphenywayo ngenxa yomsebenzi owenziwe yikomiti engiliholayo. Kungokokuqala emlandweni ukuthi kube nosihlalo wekomiti olwa ngale ndlela nenkohlakalo," kusho uShelembe. UShelembe uke waba ngumholi wophiko lwentsha kwiDA KwaZulu-Natal, njengamanje uyingxenye yethimba eleluleka Inkosi yaseNadi, eMgungundlovu, uVusizwe Zondi. UMXHUMANISI weDA neNdlunkulu kaZulu, uMnuz Swelakhe Shelembe

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMHOLI weNFP, uMnuz Ivan Barnes UMHOLI we-NFP, uMnuz Ivan Barnes, ushiye angalazi kumholi we-EFF, uMnuz Julius Malema, amsola ngokuvikela abokufika abakuleli ngokungemthetho. UBarnes ubize uMalema ngohlanya oluhambe luvikela abantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi amukela amalungu ajoyine iqembu esifundeni uThukela. UMalema usanda kukhwela adilike ebantwini abahola imibhikisho elwa nabokufika ethe chithi saka ezweni. Imibhikisho iqale esifundazweni iKwaZulu-Natal, yabe isidlulela e-Eastern Cape. Ngeledlule le mibhikisho ingenise esifundazweni iGauteng edolobheni eliyisizinda somnotho wakuleli, iGoli, kanye nasenhloko dolobha yezwe iPitoli. UMalema uthe le mibhikisho yenzeka ezifundazweni lapho abantu abamnyama babebulalana bodwa ngesikhathi sobandlululo. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ekhuluma esidlweni sakusihlwa ebesihlelwe inhlangano engenzi nzuzo iCollen Mashawana Foundation. UMalema uthe abahola imibhikisho abazi lutho bazi ukuphuza intelezi nempesu. UMalema uthe akanendaba noma bengangayivotela i-EFF labantu abaqhuba le mibhikisho. "Anginendaba namavoti abo, iMKP ingawathatha uma iwafuna amavoti abo. Angifuni mina ukuvotelwa abantu abafuna ukuthi ngizonde abantu balapha e-Afrika." UBarnes unxuse abantu ukuthi bengamnaki uMalema. UBarnes uthe naye uyahambisana nomkhankaso wokuxosha abokufika abakuleli ngokungemthetho. "Lo ogula ngekhanda othi badla intelezi nempesu, uma bekwenza ngakubo, abahambe ngakubo ke. Thina la KwaZulu sithi umuntu nomuntu akabuyele ngakubo. La kwelikaMthaniya sithi umuntu nomuntu akabuyele ngakubo. Uma uyiSulumane buyela ngakini emaSulumaneni amanye eSomalia. Uma ungowaseNigeria hamba ngakini eNigeria. Uma ungowaseZimbabwe hamba ngakini eZimbabwe. Anisenamahloni yini ukuthi selokhu kwathi nhlo iNingizimu Afrika iyahlupheka ngenxa yenu? Sesikhathele." UBarnes uthe nabo beyiNFP bazowujoyina umkhankaso wokuxosha abokufika wanxusa abaholi imibhikisho, uNgizwe Mchunu noNkosikhona "Phakel'uthakathi" Ndabandaba ukuba babameme emkhankasweni. UBarnes ukhuluma kanjena ngoMalema nje lamaqembu ahlela ukubambisana neMKP KwaZulu-Natal ekuketuleni uhulumeni wesifundazwe. I-MKP ihola umkhankaso wokugudluza uhulumeni wokubambisana oholwa i-IFP, iNFP ingababeki benkosi esiShayamthetho saKwaZulu-Natal. Uma lingagcina liphumelela itulo leMKP lokuchitha uhulumeni wesifundazwe kungasho ukuthi izobambisana namaqembu anemibono eyehlukile odabeni lwabantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: Izimoto ezinikelwe umnyango kaCogta UTHATHWE emalini yezinye izinhlelo zoMnyango wezokuBusa ngokuBambinsana kanye neziNdaba zoMdabu KwaZulu-Natal u-R 19 million okuthengwe ngawo izingqovungqovu zezimoto ezinikwe imikhandlu yamakhosi angu-30 KwaZulu-Natal. Ingxenye yemali ethenge lezi zimoto ezingundaba mlonyeni bekuhlelwe ukuthi kuholelwe abasebenzi abebezoqashwa umnyango. Lokhu kuqukethwe empendulweni ebhalwe phansi yoMphathiswa woMnyango, uMfu Thulasizwe Buthelezi, obephendula imibuzo yelungu leDA, uNksz Marlaine Nair. UButhelezi uveze ukuthi banqume ukuthi imali bathenge ngayo izimoto ngenxa yokubambezeleka kohlelo lokuqashwa kwabasebenzi abebezoholelwa ngale mali. Enye imali bekufanele ithenge imishini yamakhompyutha. "Sithathe yonke le mali engazange isebenze sabe sesithenga izimoto, asizange sisebenzise ngokweqile isabelomali soMnyango." UButhelezi uthe bazoqhubeka nokuthenga izimoto ezizonikelwa emikhandlwini yamakhosi. Uveze ukuthi izimoto zohlobo lweFord Everest ezingu-12 ebiza u-R772 259 ngayinye, kanye nama-GWM P300 D/C angu-18 abiza u-R563 494 ngayinye. UNksz Nair uthe usephinde wabhalela uButhelezi eminye imibuzo. Uthe bafuna ukwazi ukuthi izimoto azithengangwa yini ngemali ebibekelwe ukulekelela omasipala noma ukubhekana nezinhlekelele. UNksz Nair uthe bafuna ukwazi ukuthi imikhandlu yamakhosi izokwazi yini ukumelana nezindleko zalezi zimoto okubalwa ukufaka uphethroli, ukukhokhela imishwalense, ukulungisa izimoto namasondo. UNksz Nair uthe ufuna ukuthi uMnyango uchaze kahle ukuthi yiluphi uhlelo olulandelile ngesikhathi ukhetha imikhandlu yamakhosi enikwe izimoto. Ukuthengwa kwezimoto sekususe umsindo njengoba ubuholi benhlangano yobuholi bomdabu, iCongress of Traditional Leaders of SA (Contralesa) KwaZulu-Natal busola ukuthi uButhelezi wakhetha iphela emasini ngesikhathi aba izimoto. Ngesikhathi kwethulwa izimoto uMnyango wathi zizonikwa amalungu endlu yobuholi bomdabu KwaZulu-Natal, osihlalo kanye namaphini osihlalo bezindlu zobuholi bomdabu ezifundeni. Abaholi beContralesa KwaZulu-Natal baveza ukuthi kukhona osihlalo abashiywa ngaphandle ngesikhathi kwabiwa izimoto, bathi kukhona amakhosi angebona osihlalo kodwa ahlomula. Ngokohlu lwamakhosi ahlomula oluqukethwe empendulweni kaButhelezi, bayisithupha osihlalo abathola, kwathola amaphini osihlalo amabili. Kunezifunda ezingu-11 KwaZulu-Natal. Uhlu luveza ukuthi kunamakhosi angu-14 angamalungu engeziwe ezindlu zobuholi bomdabu ezifundeni ahlomula. IContralesa KwaZulu-Natal isanda kubika izikhalazo zayo kusihlalo wekomiti elibhekelele ukusebenza komnyango ePhalamende, uDkt Zweli Mkhize.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: KUDILIZWE uSomlomo woMasipala wasoPhongolo, uNkk Celiwe Nxumalo-Sibiya, obengakaqedi nesonto eqokelwe esikhundleni. UNkk Nxumalo-Sibiya wehliswe esikhundleni yisinqumo seNkantolo eNkulu eMgungundlovu esithi umhlangano aqokwa kuwo wawungekho emthethweni. Isinqumo senkantolo siphume ngeledlule. UNkk Nxumalo-Sibiya, oyikhansela le-ANC, waqokwa emhlanganweni owawusemasontweni amabili edlule. Ukuqokwa kwakhe kwamangaza abaningi ngenxa yokuthi i-IFP iyona ephethe umkhandlu njengoba inamakhansela angu-14 kwangu-29 emkhandlwini. I-IFP ivota ne-DA enekhansela elilodwa kulo mkhandlu. UNkk Nxumalo-Sibiya wakhethwa ngo-elethu ngenxa yokuthi amakhansela ayisishiyagalombili  e-IFP awezanga kulo mhlangano ngenxa yezinsolo zokuthi ayengahambisani negama lobuholi be-IFP obabufuna ukuthi aqokelwe esikhundleni. Ubuholi be-IFP babuyalele amakhansela eqembu ukuba akhethe uMnuz Ndukisebandla Mavuso, ukuba abe usomlomo womkhandlu. Isikhundla sasikade siphethwe uMnuz Kwenzakakufani Nxumalo, owayalelwa ubuholi be-IFP ukuba asule esikhundleni. Okhulumela uMnyango wezokuBusa ngokuBambisana kanye neziNdaba zoMdabu KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Senzelwe Mzila, uthe iJaji Nontuthuzelo Mlaba lichithe zonke izinqumo ezathathwa emhlanganweni okwaqokwa kuwo uNkk Nxumalo-Sibiya njengosomlomo. "Inkantolo iyalele uMphathiswa (uMfu Thulasizwe Buthelezi) ukuba ahlele umhlangano okuzoqokwa kuwo usomlomo ukuze kungeke kuphazamiseke ukusebenza komkhandlu." Inkantolo iphinde yachitha nezinqumo ezathathwa emhlanganweni womkhandlu owawungo-Ephreli 7 kanye nowawungo-Ephreli 28. UMzila uthe le mihlangano yabanjwa ngaphandle kokulandela imigomo elawula imihlangano yomkhandlu. Inkantolo iphinde yanquma ukuthi imenenja yomkhandlu ebhekene nezinsolo zenkohlakalo, uMnuz Mntonjani Bethuel Khali, ingalubhadi emahhovisi omkhandlu. UMzila uthe inkantolo iyalele uKhali ukuba angalinge aqhubeke nokuzenza imenenja yomkhandlu noma anikeze abasebenzi bomkhandlu imiyalelo. UKhali wamiswa emva kwezinsolo zenkohlakalo kodwa wabuye wabuyiselwa emsebenzi. UMzila uthe isikhulu somnyango esajutshwa ukuba siyobamba kwesokuba imenenja yomasipala ngoMashi, uMnuz Khulekani Ngcobo, isona esizoqhubeka nokubamba isikhundla. UMzila uthe isinqumo senkantolo sizoqinisekisa ukuthi uyalandelwa umthetho kuMasipala wasoPhongolo.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UNKSZ Nqobile Khoza wuyena omncane kunabo bonke kwabathweswe iziqu e-UKZN, ngeziqu zakhe ze-Bachelor of Science Degree in Geological Sciences INTOKAZI encane kunazo zonke izitshudeni zemikhakha eyehlukene ezithweswe iziqu e-University of KwaZulu-Natal (UKZN), uNksz Nqobile Khoza, idalule ukuthi ukuqopha lowo mlando sekuyikhuthaze ukuthi iqhube imfundo ize igogode kwezesayensi. UNksz Khoza (20) uthweswe iziqu ze-Bachelor of Science Degree in Geological Sciences, okuyisigaba sempilo asichaze ngokuthi simjabulisile futhi senza ukuthi wazizwa ethobekile futhi eshisekela nokuthi angabe esaphelela kusona - kepha aqhubeke nemfundo yakhe. “Ngijabule kakhulu ngakho futhi kwenza ukuthi ngizizwe ngithobekile kakhulu kozakwethu, ngakho ngiyaziqhenya ngokuthi ngikwaze ukuqopha umlando omuhle kangaka - nengibona ukuthi uzongikhuthaza kakhulu ukuqhubeka ngisebenze kanzima empilweni,” usho kanje. Eqhuba, uthe okumkhuthaze ukwenza lezi zifundo wukuthi unothando lokushisekela ukwazi kabanzi ngomhlaba nakho konke okukuwona, nokuthi kusebenza kanjani. “Bengihlale nginentshisekelo yokwazi ukuthi umhlaba usebenza kanjani, nakho konke okwenzekayo kuwona nangawo ukuthi kwenzeka kanjani nomthelela wakho ezigigabeni zansuku onke esingenawo amandla okuzivimba nokuzilawula. “Uthando lwami lwalo mkhakha lukhuliswe wukufuna ukuqonda imvelo nokusebenza kwayo ngendlela ejulile, ngase ngigxila kwi-geology ngoba ngifuna ukuqonda kabanzi ngamatshe, amadalwa, imikhiqizo embiwa phansi nomhlabathi okusuka kuwona,” kulanda uNksz Khoza. Uthe ngenkathi esenza lo mkhakha, ubethanda kakhulu izifundo zawo ebezimxukuza ugebhezi futhi zenza ukuthi uthole ulwazi olunzulu lomlando wokudaleka kwezinto esizibonayo emhlabeni okubalwa kuzona i-Structural Geology, Palaeontology, Geochemistry, Sedimentology ne-Geological Evolution of Southern Africa. “Manje sengivele ngiqhubeka ne-honours degree in Geology, kanti izinhlelo zami ngekusasa wukuthi ngiqhubeke ngikhule kwezemfundo yalo mkhakha engikuwona, njengoba sekuvele kusezinhlelweni zami ukuthi uma ngiphothula i-honours, ngiqhubeke futhi nocwaningo lwe-Master's ezogxila kwi-structural geology, geophysics ne-GIS application in geology,” kusho yena. UNksz Khoza uthe wethemba ukuthi ulwazi azogcina enalo lwemfundo luzosiza ukuza nomehluko emkhakheni wezokumbiwa phansi, wase ekhuthaza abeza ngemva kwakhe ukuthi baphokophele ukufeza amaphupho abo kungakhathalekile ukuthi bangakanani ngokweminyaka.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UMCULI kamaskandi uGqizile Khanyile nomngani wakhe uMlondi Msweli - sebezakhele ugazi ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ngama-video abo begconana UKUGCONANA sakuxabana uma behlezi ndawonye, okuhambisana namancoko avame ukuphetha ngempikiswano sekwakhele idumela nogazi umculi kamaskandi uGqizile Khanyile nomngani wakhe uMlondli Msweli owaziwa ngeShoshozela. Abaconsi phansi kubalandeli ngenxa yama-video abavame ukuwenza behlezi ndawonye, kokunye baqophe bedla bebanga ukudla noma bexoxa futhi bephikisana ngezinto ezehlukene. Ukuthandwa kwabo kufakazelwa wukukhula kwezinombolo zabantu ababalandelayo manje njengoba uGqizile esenabalandeli abangaphezu kuka-378 000 kwiFacebook, abawu–190 000 nama-like awu-3 million kwiTikTok. UMsweli yena ulandelwa abantu abangaphezu kuka-175 000 kwiFacebook, abawu-26 000 nama-like awu-353 000 kwiTikTok. UMCULI kamaskandi uGqizile Khanyile nomngani wakhe uMlondi Msweli - sebezakhele ugazi ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ngama-video abo begconana Kuxoxwa noGqizile, owaziwa ngokuthi uBende - uthe lokho kwaqala sakudlala kwathi ngelinye ilanga baqopha i-video okwathi bangayifaka emakhasini abo kwiFacebook, abantu bakhombisa ukuyithakasela kakhulu. “Into yethu iqale ngokuthi umngani wami uMsweli vele uwumuntu onamancoko kakhulu, okuthi noma sizihlalele sixoxa into ebalulekile yena alokhu encokola. Kuqale lapho-ke ngokuthi uma ekhuzwa, angakhuzeki - kuze kusize ukuthi kungenelele mina uma kukhona esikuxoxayo  sizihlalele nezinye izinsizwa esizwana nesazana nazo,” kusho uGqizile. UMCULI kamaskandi uGqizile Khanyile nomngani wakhe uMlondi Msweli - sebezakhele ugazi ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ngama-video abo begconana Abaningi abake babone ama-video alezi zinsizwa bazokhumbula futhi bazi ukuthi zivame ukuphikisana ngamancoko azo okuthi uma kukhuzwa omunye, okhuzayo athi: “awukahle, awukahle wena” - osekuphenduke itemu elisetshenziswa nangabalandeli babo. “Yinto esizoqhubeka siyenze ngoba siyabona ukuthi abantu bayayijabulela kakhulu, futhi iyasiza ngokuthi isigcine sisematheni ebantwini - okungisiza kakhulu-ke mina njengoba ngibuye ngigxile emculweni ukuthi ngingalibaleki kubalandeli bami,” kulanda uGqizile. Lezi zinsizwa zineminyaka emithathu zazana manje. UGqizile udabuka KwaCholwane, eNkandla, kuthi uMsweli yena kube ngowaseCinci, eMpangeni. Okwamanje bahlala ndawonye KwaMashu, eThekwini.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: KUVUKE umunyu kuNksz Thembile Biyela ekhumbula ubunzima adlule kubho empilweni ngenkathi ethweswa iziqu zobuthishela e-UKZN UKUTHUKWA ngapha nangapha, namagama angemahle ayebhekiswe kuyena ekhulelwe esemncane efunda emabangeni aphezulu, ukusebenzisele ukuthi kube yisikhuthazi sokuthi afeze okuhle nabekufisa ngempilo yakhe, wathweswa iziqu zobuthishela enyuvesi. Lowo uNksz Thembile Biyela waseNdwedwe, ongesinye sezitshudeni ezithweswe iziqu zemikhakha ehlukene e-University of KwaZulu-Natal kuleli sonto. Emukela lezi ziqu uNksz Biyela, uvukwe wumunyu ekhumbula bonke lobo buhlungu adlule kubo, wakhumbula unyaka owawunzima kakhulu kuyena u-2016 lapho akhulelwa khona esafunda uGrade 11, abaningi bemgxeka ngephutha alenza. “Izenzo zabantu kimina ngenkathi ngibhekene naleso simo zazenza ukuthi ngizizwe sengathi impilo yami ngeke isaya phambili. Babengihleka, bengihleba futhi bengiphatha kabi kangangokuthi ngisho nangenkathi sengibuyela esikoleni ngangizizwa ngingamukelekile,” usho kanje. KUVUKE umunyu  kuNksz Thembile Biyela, ekhumbula ubunzima adlule kubo empilweni ngenkathi ethweswa iziqu zobuthishela e-UKZN Eqhuba, uthe okunye okwafana nokuthela usawoti esilondeni wukuthi ukhulele ekhaya ebelingamile kahle emalini, kangangokuthi kwesinye isikhathi ubeya esikoleni engadlile. “Impilo ibe nzima ngokuphindiwe sengifeyila u-matric, okwenza ngazizwa ngiyisahluleki futhi kwenza ukuthi ngiqale nokukholwa yizinto ezimbi ezazishiwo abantu ngami.  Konke lokho kwacishe kwaqeda nya ngempilo yami,” kusho uNksz Biyela. Uthe emva kwalokho wahlala ekhaya iminyaka embalwa, esakhulisa umntwana  futhi ezama nokukhokha umoya. Wagcina ebuyele esikoleni waze waphasa u-matric ayesewenza okwesibili ngo-2020. Lokho kwamsiza ukuqhubeka nemfundo yakhe enyuvesi. Nalapho bekungelula neze njengoba bekumele ukuthi abhekane nomthwalo wokufunda, ebe ekhulisa umntwana. Ukubhimba kwemali kwakungamnike thuba kodwa waphokophela ngoba efisa ukusebenzisa imfundo ukucaba indlela yekusasa elihle. “Ngifuna ukuthi izingane zami zikhule zazi ukuthi noma ngabe kunzima kangakanani empilweni yakho, kepha akumele ukuthi uphonse ithawula - futhi ngifuna nokukhombisa abantu ukuthi ukuzala usemncane akukuhle kodwa akukuvimbi ukufeza amaphupho akho,” usho kanje.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UNKSZ Lwandile Nkwanyana, othweswe iziqu ze-Diploma in Public Management e-DUT UKUNGAFELI ngaphakathi kukaNksz Lwandile Nkwanyana, owasebenzisa izinkundla zokuxhumana ukuzwakalisa ukukhathazeka kwakhe ngokuchithwa kwesicelo sokufunda enyuvesi ngendlela engaqondakali, kumnike umvuzo nezithelo ezibonakalayo. UNksz Nkwanyana (26) waseBhanganomo, KwaNongoma, enyakatho yeKwaZulu-Natal - wacishe wangaqhubeka nemfundo yakhe enyuvesi ngenkathi ehambela ubala eDurban University of Technology (DUT), ophikweni iNdumiso, eMgungundlovu, echithwa esefikile. “Kwaba yisimo esibuhlungu kakhulu kimina leso ngoba ngase ngilinde isikhathi eside ukuthi ngithole ithuba lokufunda emva kokuphothula u-matric ngo-2017, kepha ngingabi nenhlanhla yokwamukelwa kwesicelo sami emanyuvesi ehlukene. “Kuthe ngo-2022 kwamukelwa isicelo sami sokwenza izifundo ze-Diploma in Public Management e-DUT, kodwa ngajabha sengifikile khona ngiyobhalisa ngoJanuwari ngo-2023, sebengitshela ukuthi isikhala sami sesinikwe omunye umuntu,” kusho yena. UNKSZ Lwandile Nkwanyana, othweswe iziqu ze-Diploma in Public Management e-DUT Nokho sekuwumlando manje ukuthi uNksz Nkwanyana usethweswe iziqu zalo mkhakha ngenxa yokuthi  ngenkathi echithwa kanjena, akafelanga ngaphakathi - kunalokho wanikela ekhasini leFacebook iLadies House, waneka usizi lwakhe, echaza okumehlele. “Ngachaza ukuthi kwenzekeni, ngizwakalisa nokuphoxeka kwami ukuthi ngase ngihambe ibanga elide kangaka ngisuka eGoli lapho ebese ngihlala khona nomama ongasebenzi, ngithi ngiyofunda eMgungundlovu ngenhloso yokushintsha isimo sasekhaya. “Nangempela ngaba nenhlanhla, ngathintwa uNksz Zama Mncube owayesesigungwini esiphethe izitshudeni ngaleso sikhathi. Wathembisa ukungisiza ukulungisa inkinga yami. Kwaba njalo, wangithinta sekulungile konke ngakusasa. Ngaphindela khona ngayofunda futhi baba baningi nabangizwela, bangipha nemali,” kusho uNksz Nkwanyana. Eqhuba, uthe nokho akubanga lula konke njengoba kwathi esaqhubeka nokufunda ngonyaka wokuqala, washonelwa wubaba wengane yakhe eneminyaka emihlanu manje, owashona ngokudutshulwa. “Konke lokho kwangiphazamisa kakhulu emoyeni nasenhliziyweni yami, kepha ngaphokophela ngoba ngangifisa ukuthi ngiphumelele ngemfundo yami. Kuphela ngizwela laba engangichithwe nabo ngalowa nyaka. Iningi labo lagcina lingalitholalanga ithuba elatholwa yimina ngoba nami ngasukuma, ngangafela ngaphakathi,” kusho uNksz Nkwanyana okumanje uqhubeka nemfundo yakhe njengoba esenza i-Advanced Diploma in Public Management and Administration khona e-DUT.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: INTOKAZI ewunobuhle uDkt Lungile Ngcobo, ithweswe iziqu ze-Doctor of Philosophy in Business and Information Management e-DUT INTOKAZI eyathweswa isicoco sika-Miss DUT wango-2016, uDkt Lungile Ngcobo,  isiphonsele inselelo onobuhle abasebasha nabeza emva kwayo ukuba bangathembeli ebuhleni kuphela ukuze bafike empumelelwei, kepha bakhuthale baqinise kakhulu olwazini lwemfundo. UDkt Ngcobo usho njalo emva kokuthweswa iziqu ze-Doctor of Philosophy in Business and Information Management emcimbini wokwethweswa iziqu izitshudeni zemikhakha ehlukene eDurban University of Technology (DUT), obukuleli sonto eMgungundlovu, KwaZulu-Natal. Lo zime kumanje ufundisa khona e-DUT lapho eqeqesha abafundi kwezezimali nezamabhizinisi ophikweni lwayo oluseMidlands. Uthe ubheke ukuqhubeka azihlomise ngolwazi lwezemfundo ukuze akhuthaze abanye onobuhle ebe ezisiza naye ngalolo lwazi empilweni yakhe. “Ukuthola lezi ziqu zobudokotela kungaphezu kokuphumelela ngemfundo kimina. Ngikufanisa nokufeza isithembiso seminyaka engasenza kimina uqobo ngo-2016 ngenkathi ngithola iziqu zami zokuqala ze-Diploma in Management, lapho engazitshela khona ukuthi akusekho lutho okungase kuphazamise uhambo lwami lwezemfundo,” kusho uDkt Ngcobo. INTOKAZI ewunobuhle uDkt Lungile Ngcobo, ithweswe iziqu ze-Doctor of Philosophy in Business and Information Management e-DUT Lesi singqazu siqale ukufunda e-DUT ngo-2012 emkhakheni we-National Diploma in Management, okuthe ngo-2017 saqhubekela kwi-Bachelor of Technology in Management, kwase kuthi ngo-2021 senza iMaster of Management Sciences in Administration and Information Management. “Emva kokuphothula iMaster’s yami ngo-2023, ngashiya konke engangikwenza eNorth West ngaleso sikhathi, ngabuyela eMgungundlovu ngiyofunda, okwaba yisinqumo esingelula neze ngoba ngashiya phansi umsebenzi wami owawungiphethe kahle ngenzela ukufeza iphupho lami lokufunda ngigogode,” sisho kanje. Elandisa ngocwaningo lwezifundo zakhe, uDkt Ngcobo uthe ubegxile kakhulu ekubhekeni ukuthi ukunikezela ngolwazi oluseqophelweni eliphezulu kwabezikhungo zemfundo ephakeme kungazisiza kanjani futhi kangakanani izitshudeni ukuze zicijeke emqondweni futhi zikwazi ukuthatha izinqumo eziphusile ngempilo yazo. UDkt Ngcobo ubonge kakhulu abeHlomisa Skills Academy ngethuba abamnike lona lomfundaze omsize ukuphothula izifundo zakhe zobudokotela.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: OWAYENGUMSAKAZI woKhozi FM uNgizwe 'Sinqa Semfene' Mchunu UKUTHULA emoyeni nokuphila impilo engenamsindo kubukeka kusazoqhubeka kube ngabakhwekazi empilweni yowayengumsakazi woKhozi FM uNgizwe ‘Sinqe Semfene’ Mchunu, obhekene notalatiya lwezinkinga okubonakala zingamnike thuba lokuphefumula. Lokhu kungenxa yokwanda kwezinkinga ezibhekene noMchunu njengoba kumanje nje kusabatshazwa isihluku esenzeke kushiswa umuzi wakhe oseMbumbulu, ogwini oluseNingizmu yeTheku ngeSonto - wasala uwumlotha, kusha yonke into. Evikini elilodwa kwenzeka konke lokho, inhlangano engenzi nzuzo i-Ahmed Kathrada Foundation nayo isizwakalise ilaka layo, yagxeka uNgizwe ngenkulumo ayenze kwesinye seziqephu zohlelo lwakhe olusesitshini sikaMacG kwiYouTube oluthi Bhinca Nation. Le nhlangano ikhale ngokuthi enye yezinkulumo zikaNgizwe nasuke ebameme ohlelweni lwakhe iwukucwasa ngokwebala futhi yagxeka kakhulu ukuvama kwabo ukusebenzisa igama eliwukucwasa amaNdiya ngokwebala elithi “amakula”. I-Ahmed Kathrada ixwayise nangokuthi iyabona umthelela omubi odalwa yizinkulumo zikaMchunu ezinokucwasa ngokwebala, ekhale ngokuthi kuphehla nokubhebhethekisa izenzo zodlame emphakathini, kangangokuthi uma kunganqandwa kungagcina kudala ukuthi lesi simo singalawuleki. OWAYENGUMSAKAZI woKhozi FM uNgizwe 'Sinqa Semfene' Mchunu Kuleso siqephu uNgizwe waphawula wathi: “Uyabona nje amaChina anomqondo ofanayo nowamak**la. AmaNdiya asehlale kuleli zwe iminyaka engaphezu kuka-150, ehlukumeza abantu bakithi ezimbonini nasezinkampanini ezahlukene ahola kuzona.” Owayeyisihambeli sakhe ngalelo langa, uNota Baloyi, yena waphendula wathi: “Uqinisile, futhi amaNdiya ayenalo ithuba lokuthi aphindele ezweni lawo, kwakumele akwenze lokho kusukela ngabo-1924 kuya ku-1931.” Khona lapho futhi, kuleli sonto iNkantolo ePhakeme yasePitoli ivale uNgizwe ukuthi aqhubeke akhulume izinkulumo ezihlambalazayo ngomholi we-Economic Freedom Fighters (EFF), uMnuz Julius Malema - obemvulele icala lokuhlambalaza nelokumcekela phansi isithunzi. Lokhu kusukela ekutheni uMchunu ubesolwa ngokuthi wathi ekhuluma kwesinye sezithangami zabezindaba, waveza izinsolo zokuthi uMalema wathola imalii ewu-R60 million kubantu bokufika baseNigeria abashushumbisa izidakamizwa kuleli zwe. Wadalula nokuthi uMalema angenza noma yini ukusiza ukuvikela abantu bokufika abakuleli zwe ngokungemthetho ngoba kukhona abamfumbathisa khona. Isinqumo ngaleli cala kube wukuthi uNgizwe angaphinde akhulume noma abhale, aze ashicilele noma yini engaba yinkulumo ewukuhlambalaza ngoMalema. Ube eseyalelwa nokuthi akhokhe zonke izindleko zabameli bakaMalema kuleli cala, futhi wabekelwa nomnqamlajuqu wokuvela eNkantolo ngoLwesibili oluzayo ukuzoveza ukuthi kungani kumele kuqhutshekwe ngalezi zinqumo ezikhishwe kuleli cala. Kuphinde kwazamazama izinkundla zokuxhumana ngoLwesithathu ntambama ngenkathi intandokazi yomculi kamaskandi uKhuzani ‘Indlamlenze’ Mpungose, ebhala ekhasini lakhe likaFacebook ukuthi ufuna ukuthi kungaphinde kukhulunywe lutho ngegama lakhe kulolu hlelo lukaNgizwe iBhinca Nation. Indlamlenze ithe isikhathele wukuthi kulokhu kuhlanjalazwa igama lalo kulolu hlelo, yase yesabisa ngokuthi uma ekucelayo kungenzeki, izoluvala thaqa lolu hlelo.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: IBANDLA i-Morning Star Ministries linandisa kwiZion Worship Experience, ebiseFaith in The Word Ministries, eKenville, eThekwini ngoMgqibelo Image: SIMANGALISO NTSHANGASE NGOKUJWAYELEKILE amabandla aseZayoni ahlangana uma kunemincintiswano yomculo, nezinkonzo zemishado okusuke kumenywane kuzona ngenhloso yokuqhoshelana ngokuthi wubani onikele kakhulu, nokuthi yiliphi ibandla elihlanzekile nelicula kangcono kunelinye. Kepha kwenzeke okwehlukile nokungajwayelekile kwi-Zion Worship Experience, umbuthano obuseFaith in The Word Ministries, eKenville, eThekwini ngoMgqibelo - obekuhloswe ngawo ukwakha ubumbano emabandleni ehlukene aseZayoni nokudumisa uNkulunkulu ndawonye. Lo mbuthano, obuqala ukwenziwa kulo nyaka - ubuhlelwe ngokubambisana amabandla amahlanu aseZayoni angamanye anedumela kakhulu okuyi-CCAC Ministries, Throne of Grace, River of Mercy Ministries, Enyonini Amaphiko Ayisithupha ne-Burning Fire of God. IBANDLA i-River of Mercy Ministries linandisa kwiZion Worship Experience, ebiseFaith in The Word Ministries, eKenville, eThekwini ngoMgqibelo Image: SIMANGALISO NTSHANGASE Isasasa nokuthakaselwa kwalo mbuthano kufakazelwe wukugcwala phama kwezihambeli ebeziwuthamele ebeziphuma ezindaweni ezihlukene, nakwezinye izifundazwe imbala. Umcimbi uvulwe ngomculo webandla i-Morning Star Ministries, ebelingekho ohlwini lwalawa amahlanu, kodwa okuvele ukuthi lizicelele ukweseka lo mcimbi ngokunandisa kuwona, futhi lanikela ngoR25 000 wokuthenga amathikithi awu-100 ukusiza ukuxhaseka komcimbi. IBANDLA i-eNyonini Amaphiko Ayisithupha linandisa kwiZion Worship Experience, ebiseFaith in The Word Ministries, eKenville, eThekwini ngoMgqibelo Image: SIMANGALISO NTSHANGASE Emva kwayo kuqhubeke uhlelo lo mcimbi lokunandisa kwala mabandla amahlanu abehlele lo mcimbi, engena ephuma esteji ejabulisa abantu ngomculo onomyalezo wethemba, futhi oveza noqhakambisa ubukhona bukaNkulunkulu; kwagwatshwa, kwakuhle kwanjeyana. IBANDLA i-CCAC Ministries linandisa kwiZion Worship Experience, ebiseFaith in The Word Ministries, eKenville, eThekwini ngoMgqibelo Image: SIMANGALISO NTSHANGASE Omunye wabahleli balo mcimbi, uMnuz Mhlengi Ntshapha weRiver of Mercy Ministries, uthe bekuhlale kubakhathaza ukuthi ayikho imibuthano lapho amaZayoni ehlangana khona nje kungonakele lutho - ukuzodumisa uNkulunkulu nokukhulisana kubhekwe phambili. “Yingakho sibone kusemqoka ukuthi sihlangane kanjena ukuthi ngenhloso yokwakha ubunye, futhi siqinise ubudlelwano emabandleni ehlukene aseZayoni - ukusiza ukubulala ubutha, ukubukelana phansi nokuqhoshelana okuphakathi kwethu,” kusho uNtshapha. IBANDLA i-Throne of Grace linandisa kwiZion Worship Experience, ebiseFaith in The Word Ministries, eKenville, eThekwini ngoMgqibelo Image: SIMANGALISO NTSHANGASE Umholi webandla i-CCAC Ministries, u-Archbishop Mlamuli Zondo yena uthe bafisa ukuthi lokhu abakwenzile manje kukhuthaze amanye amabandla aseZayoni ukweseka nokulandela umbono wabo ukusiza ukuthi kukhule amaZayoni futhi kwande ukubumbana kuwona. UNtshapha uthe manje sebebheke ukuthi bakhele kulokhu abakwenzile ukusiza ukuthi i-Zion Worship Experience ingabi ngeyamabandla athile kuphela, kepha ikhule ize igcine yenziwa ezindaweni ezinkulu njengako-ICC, eThekwini - bese inabela nakwezinye izifundazwe. IBANDLA i-Burning Fire of God linandisa kwiZion Worship Experience, ebiseFaith in The Word Ministries, eKenville, eThekwini ngoMgqibelo Image: SIMANGALISO NTSHANGASE

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: KUSUKELA kwesokunxele woSiyamthanda Nxumalo, Samkelo Ndlovu, Kay Sibiya noSimphiwe Ngema - abalingisa phambili emdlalweni omusha wakwiMzansi Magic othi Kuningi UBUHLUNGU nesilonda esisala komama abondla izingane ngabodwana ngenxa yobaba abangondli yikhona okuzogqama kakhulu emdlalweni omfishane ozokhonjiswa kwiMzansi Magic othi Kuningi, ozoqala ukukhonjiswa ngoMsombuluko ngo-7 kusihlwa. Kulo mdlalo ozokhonjiswa iziqephu ezintathu kuzogqama uMbali olingiswa wuSamkelo Ndlovu, ongumama okhulisa umntwana womfana ngayedwana. UMbali unebhizinisi lokuhlela imishado, okuthi ngokuqhubeka kwesikhathi ahlangane noyise wengane yakhe ongondli. Kuthi esemaphakathi nezinhlelo zokuhlela umshado, athole ukuthi ozoshada uyise wengane yakhe uMandla, olingiswa wuKay Sibiya, ozoshada noSophie - olingiswa uSimphiwe Ngema. Exoxa ngokulingisa kulo mdlalo, uSamkelo uthe iKuningi ixoxa indaba yobaba abangazondli izingane zabo, bese futhi ubeka obala ukuthi lokhu kubahlukumeza kangakanani abantu besifazane abasuke bebhekene nomthwalo wokukhulisa izingane zabo ngabodwana. USAMKELO NDLOVU, omunye wabalingisi abazogqama emdlalweni omusha wakwiMzansi Magic othi Kuningi “Kuzovela futhi kucace ngokusobala ukuthi le nkinga inomthelela omubi kangakanani emphakathini, ikakhulu ngoba sekwaze kwajwayeleka ukuthi umuntu wesifazane okhulisa umntwana yedwa kuthiwa unamandla ekubeni elimala ngaphakathi,” usho kanje. Eqhuba uthe okunye akuthanda ngalo mdlalo wukuthi uveza futhi ugqamise ukuthi abantu besifazane kumele bazikhulumele, bangavumeli izimo ezinjena zibacindezele. “Baningi abesifazane abanjengoMbali emphakathini esiphila kuwona abalwela ukuthi abantwana babo baphile impilo engcono ngakho ngithemba ukuthi lo mdlalo uzokhuthaza nabanye ukuthi benze okufanayo ukuze kunqotshwe le nkinga ezweni,” usho kanje.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UDJ Tira, oqhulula inqwaba yezingoma zeGqom - okuvela ukuthi yilona elingase ligcina lihamba phambili ngokulalelwa kakhulu ezweni eminyakeni ezayo INDLELA okulalelwa nokuthengwa umculo ngayo nsuku zonke ikhomba ukuthi umculo weGqom yiwona ozogcina uqengeleza phambili ngokulalelwa nangokuthengwa kakhulu eNingizimu Afrika. Lokho kushiwo yiNhloko yoPhiko lwezamaCiko nokuSebenzisana eSpotify, uMnuz Henco Harmse - akusho ngenkathi ekhuluma kwesinye sezigcawu zokucobelana ngolwazi lwezobuciko ebesenzwe yile nkampani eGoli kuleli sonto. UHarmse uthe lokhu kudalwa wukwanda kwabantu abathakasela lo mculo minyaka yonke, okufakazelwa wukukhula kwezibalo zokulalelwa kwawo ngo-92% kusuka eminyakeni emihlanu edlule kuze kuzoba yimanje. UMCULI we-pop uTyla wuyena osazihola phambili ngokulalelwa kakhulu kwiSpotify “Okunye futhi esikuqaphelayo ngezibalo zabantu abalalela umculo kwiSpotify wukuthi eminyakeni emihlanu edlule kuze kuzoba yimanje kukhule ngo-450% ukulalelwa komculo nje jikelele emazweni ehlukene ase-Afrika, okuyisimo esihle nesizosiza kakhulu amaciko, usho kanje. Eqhuba, uthe okunye abakuqaphelile wukuthi umculo wama-piano nawo ungeminye yemiculo elokhu yenza kahle kakhulu njengoba kule minyaka emihlanu ukhombe ukwenyuka ngo-98%, okukhomba ukuthi ukhula ngokuphindaphindiwe njalo ngonyaka. “Singekushiye ngaphandle nokuthi umculo wesintu umaskandi nawo ugila izimanga emakethe njengoba ikhule ngo-174% indlela olalelwa ngawo kwiSpotify kule minyaka emihlanu edlule kuze kuzoba yimanje,” kusho uHarmse. UMCULI kamaskandi Umafikizolo ngelinye lamaciko okuvela ukuthi enze kahle kakhulu kwiSpotify ngonyaka odlule IMenenja yoPhiko lwezamaCiko, iziTebele zomCulo nokuSebenzisana eSpotify, uNksz Jodie Tabisher, yona idalule ukuthi okunye okugqamile ngenkathi becwaninga izibalo zabo wukuthi umculi kamaskandi Umafikizolo ugile izimanga nyakenye ngengoma yakhe ethi Uyoncengwa Unyoko edobe abantu abangaphezu kwa-15 million ukuyilalela. UNksz Tabisher udalule nokuthi umculi we-pop uTyla wuyena olokhu ehambe phambili njalo ngokulalelwa nokuthengwa kakhulu komculo wakhe kusuka ngo-2023 kuze kuzoba yimanje, okufakazelwa wukuthi ingoma yakhe yango-2023 ethi Water, isilalelwe ngaphezu kwa-100 million. “Okunye esikuqaphelile nesikushayela ihlombe elikhulu wukukhula kwesibalo sabantu abalalela umculo weRn’B yakuleli zwe, obekukade kungavamile ukwenzeka kule minyaka edlule njengoba abantu bebethanda ukulalelwa amaciko aphesheya kwezilwandle enza lolu hlobo lomculo, osekujikile manje njengoba sebegxile kowamaciko abo,” kusho yena.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: INHLOKO yoPhiko lwezaBathengi nokuThuthukisa amaBhizinisi eStandard Bank, uNkk Naledzani Mosomane OSOMABHIZINISI abasafufusa nabafisa ukuchuma kwezamabhizinisi banengqayizivele yethuba lokufeza lokho ngohlelo lwe-Standard Bank lokufukula osomabhizinisi abangakachumi lwaminyaka yonke i-Standard Bank Kasi SME Pitch Challenge. I-Standard Bank iqinisekise ukuthi nakulo nyaka luyabuya lolu hlelo olukhuza ibuya ihlandla lesine, luhambisana nesamba somklomelo ka-R1 million - osekuvele kuvuliwe ukungenela kulona okuzoze kuvalwe ngoMeyi 22. Kanjengaminyaka yonke, nakulo nyaka kuzoqokwa osomabhizinisi abawu-10 isifundazwe ngasinye, abazonikwa ithuba lokukhuluma nokudayisa amabhizinisi abo emajajini azobe ehlunga, bese kuqokwa abathathu kubona isifundazwe ngasinye - bese abanqobayo kubona bakhale bemuke no-R50 000, bese abaphume isibili nesithathu baduduzwe ngo-R10 000. Akupheleli lapho, njengoba kuzothi labo somabhizinisi abayisishiyagalolunye abazobe benqobe ezifundazweni, bazobe sebeqhubekela kwi-Standard Bank Kasi SME Natonal Pitch Challenge, lapho bezobe sebebanga khona isamba somklomelo ka-R1 million wozonqoba. INhloko yoPhiko lwezaBathengi nokuThuthukisa amaBhizinisi eStandard Bank, uNkk Naledzani Mosomane, ithe okunye okuhle ngalokho wukuthi osomabhizinisi abangu-10 abahambe phambilini bazothola nethuba lokufakwa ohlelweni lokubacebisa nokubachushisa ngamasu nezindlela zokubasiza ukuthuthukisa amabhizinisi abo kubhekwe phambili. “Lokhu kuyingxenye yezindlela esizibophezela ngazo ukuqinisekisa ukuthi osomabhizinisi abehlukene bayathuthuka ezweni lethu nokuphendla indlela yamathuba okufukula umnotho, ngoba siqonda ukuthi osomabhizinisi abasafufusa baneqhaza elimqoka abalibambayo emphakathini ngakho akumele ukuthi sibayekelele bezabalaze ngabodwana,” usho kanje. Imigomo ezolandelwa kwabazongenela kulo nyaka imi kanjena: Osomabhizinisi abafisa ukungenela bengangena kwi-website yaseStandard Bank ukuthola imininingwane efanele yokumele bakwenze ukuze bangenele.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UMCULI we-house ne-deep house uSboniso L Musician usematheni kulezi zinsuku ngecwecwe lakhe elisha elithi Loss & Love EP “YIQINIISO elingenakuphikwa ukuthi akuwona wonke umuntu ojatshuliswa wuthando ngakho ngibone kukuhle ukuthi ngisebenzise ubuciko bomculo ukuzwakalisa ilaka lalabo abaphoxekile othandweni, ngibe ngiveza futhi ubuhle nobumnandi bokuthandwa.” Usho kanjalo umculi we-house ne-deep house, uSboniso L Musician elandisa ngecwecwe lakhe elisha elisihloko sithi Loss & Love EP, eliphume ngenyanga edlule nelididiyele izingoma ezinhlanu eziqukethe umyalezo owehlukene oweyamene nomuzwa wothando. USboniso waKwandengezi, eThekwini, udalule ukuthi kulo msebenzi usebenzisane nabaculi oDa Alto noBrandon Dhludhlu; kanjalo noDa Gifto - ofake isandla ekuphrojuseni izingoma zawo. “Lo msebenzi uyinhlanganisela yezingoma ezikhuluma ngobuhlungu bokuthanda umuntu kepha yena engakuthandi ngale ndlela omthanda ngayo, futhi iveza obala ukuthi ukuphoxwa ngabantu obathandayo kungenza ukuthi ugcine ungasakholelwa othandweni. Zikhona futhi izingoma ezimbalwa eziveza ukuthi nakuba kunjalo, kodwa lukhona uthando lweqiniso,” usho kanje. UMCULI we-house ne-deep house uSboniso L Musician usematheni kulezi zinsuku ngecwecwe lakhe elisha elithi Loss & Love EP Eqhuba, uthe okunye abhale nacula ngakho kwi-Loss & Love EP kusukela ezimweni abhekane nazo okwangempela empilweni yakhe, nabone kukuhle ukusebenzisa ubuciko ukuzelapha ngokukhipha ubuhlungu abuzwayo ngaphakathi enhlizweni yakhe. “Kungithathe cishe izinyanga ezimbili ukwenza lo msebenzi ngiwuqede, engisizwe kakhulu nawukuthi vele ngiwumuntu ohlale ese-studio isikhathi esiningi ngipheka umculo engihlela ukulokhu ngiwukhipha kancane, kancane ngize ngichume kule ndima,” kusho yena. Leli ciko igama lalo lokuzalwa wuSiboniso Msweli. Ligqame emculweni ngecwecwe lalo lokuqala eliphume nyakenye elithi The Weight of Silence; kanti ngale kwalokho selisebenze namanye amaciko esingabala kuwona oMngomezulu, uLance Hebron noKnightSA.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UPAPA Penny usule isigubhukane ekubeni yilungu leMK Party nasekubeni yilungu laleli qembu ePhalamende UMAKADEBONA emculweni nezikaqedisizingu obesegxile kwezepolitiki, uGezane Eric Kobane, odume ngelikaPapa Penny - ukhale ngobunyoka ebuholini beqembu lezepolitiki uMkhonto Wesizwe Party (MK) ngenkathi esula isigubhukane kulona ngoLwesihlanu. Encwadini yakhe yokwesula ayibhekise kumholi weqembu uMnuz Jacob Zuma, uPapa Penny uthe ukwesula ekubeni yilungu le-MKP nasekubeni yilungu layo ePhalamende kube yisinqumo esingelula neze nesimphule inhliziyo. Uthe wajoyina i-MK Party ngokwakhe ngoba efuna ukukhulula abantu bakuleli zwe, kodwa lokho kwaphazamiseka ngenxa yengxenye ethile yobuholi baleli qembu eLimpopo - akhale ngokuthi idale ukuthi abe nyamanambana emalungwini eqembu. Ukhale nangokuthi ubebhekene nezimpi ebeziqondiswe kuyena, ehlukunyezwa futhi kwenziwa isiqiniseko sokuthi uhlale ezizwa ecindezelekile. Wengeze nangokuthi bekuze kusetshenziswane nabezindaba ukucekela phansi isithunzi sakhe negama lakhe akusebenzele kanzima. UPAPA Penny usule isigubhukane ekubeni yilungu leMK Party nasekubeni yilungu laleli qembu ePhalamende Image: VUYILE MADWANTSI Njengoba ngiwumuntu okhathalele inhlalakahle yabantu neyomphakathi, bengingazibekezelela lezi zimo ukube beziyimbangela yabanye abantu abaseceleni. Manje inkinga yami wukuthi ziqhamuka ngaphakathi eqenjini ebengikulona okwenza ukuthi kube nzima ukuzishaya indiva sengathi angiboni ngibe ngibona kahle,” kusho uPapa Penny. Nokho uthe nakuba kunjalo, uyazibongela kuZuma ngokumnika ithuba lokuthi amele iqembu ePhalamende futhi amele nabantu baseNingizimu Afrika esebenzisa amandla eMK Party. Leli qembu eliholwa wuZuma owayengumengameli wezwe, lilokhu liqhubeke njalo nokubhekana nezinkinga ezilizamazamisayo selokhu langenela ukhetho lukazwelonke eminyakeni emibili edlule, okufakazelwa wukuhlale kushintsha izinto ngaphakathi kulona. Sekuvamile ukuthi lihlale lipheka lithulula ezikhundleni ezihlukene. Ukwesula kukaPapa Penny kulindeleke ukuthi kushaye kuzwele kuleli qembu eLimpopo, ikakhulu kuMasipala wesifunda iMopani naseGiyani, okuyilapho enabalandeli kakhulu khona. UPapa Penny uke waba nohlelo kwiMzansi Magic obeluthandwa kakhulu oluthi Papa Penny Ahe - nolwakhonjiswa amasizini amane. Wafungiswa ukuba yilungu lePhalamende le-MK Party emva kokhetho lukazwelonke ngo-2024.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UMCULI we-house nama-piano uDe Rose ufike kwezwakala emculweni UMA kubalwa izintokazi ezifike kwezwakala emculweni nyakenye, alisali ngaphandle igama lentokazi yaseMlaza, eningizimu yeTheku - uDe Rose ongelinye lamaciko afike kwezwakala, egila izimanga ngengoma ethi Lutho ekwi-albhmau kaDJ Jaivane ethi Onkgopotse. Ngale kwe-Lutho edayise ama-stream angaphezu kwa-50 million, uDe Rose ungenise futhi ngengoma yakhe noSfarzo ethi Hello, nayo eyenze kahle idayisa i-platinum eliphindwe kabili, futhi wenza kahle nange-albhamu yakhe yokuqala ephume ngoNovemba nyakenye ethi 925. Elandisa ngokumsize ukufeza konke lokhu esikhathini esifishaane esemculweni futhi eyiciko lesifazane, uthe usizwe wukuthi uziveze ngendlela ehlukile kunamanye amaciko njengoba yena ecula ngesigqi esiyinhlanganisela yeRn’B ne-Hip-Hop, okwenza ukuthi ehluke kwabanye. “Lokho kwenza ukuthi ngizwakale ngendlela eyehlukile kokujwayelekile, kangangokuthi baningi abantu abavame ukungibuza ukuthi ngake ngaba wumrepha yini, okukhomba ukuthi indlela engicula ngayo ayifani nhlobo nabajwayele ukukulalela emculweni,” usho kanje. UMCULI we-house nama-piano uDe Rose ufike kwezwakala emculweni Eqhuba, uDe Rose uthe okunye akuqikelelayo wukuthi noma ngabe ucula ingoma enomyalezo ongaqondene nye ngqo, kepha kumele umyalezo wayo uqine futhi ube nesisindo - okuthola indawo ekhethekile endlebeni nasemqondweni womlaleli. “Kufana nakule ngoma ethi Lutho, equkethe umyalezo ongangithinti kangako, kepha ngoba ngangazi ukuthi kukhona umuntu ozomthinta - ngavumela ukuthi ngibe sesimweni salowo myalezo ewuqukethe ukuze ngizokwenza ubulungiswa kuyona,” kulanda yena. Uthe uzimisele ukuqhubeka akhele kulokhu asekuzuzile manje ngomculo wakhe ukusiza ukucaba indlela yokufeza okunye okukhulu, nokuzomsiza ukukhula nokuchuma endimeni. UDe Rose igama lakhe lokuzalwa wuThandeka Cele, kanti kumanje usematheni ngengoma yakhe entsha eshaya ngesigqi seHip-Hop ethi Easy, apike kuyona oBlue Pappi noLowfeye. Usesebenze nenqwaba yamaciko okubalwa kuwona oFrank Mabeat, uTycoon, uBabalwa M, uSino Msolo, uKelvin Momo, uNomfundo Moh, uTyler ICU, iMurumba Pitch, uSoa Mattrix, uCnethemba Gonelo, uStixx, uSam Deep no-Omit ST ukukha nje phezulu.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UMCULI kamaskandi Umafikizolo, ngelinye lamaciko agile izimanga ngokulalelwa kakhulu kwiSpotify ngonyaka odlule KUKHUTHAZWE amaciko aseNingizimu Afrika ukuba aqhubeke asebenzise izilimi zawo ezehlukene zebele nezomdabu ukukhombisa ubuciko bawo, nokuzigqamisa ngendlela ehlukile kunejwayele ukusetshenziswa amaciko akwamanye amazwe. Lokho kungenxa yokugqama komculo wesintu umaskandi, ongeminye yemikhakha yomculo elalelwe kakhulu kwiSpotify. Izibalo ezikhishwe yile nkampani zikhombe ukuthi ikhule ngo-37% indlela okulalelwa ngayo umculo oculwa ngolimi isiZulu, okusho ukukhula ngo-120% kule minyaka emibili edlule. INhloko yoPhiko loMculo e-Afrika eseNingizimu kwiSpotify, uPhiona Okumu, idalule ukuthi lokhu kukhomba ukuthi abantu bayawuthakasela umculo ovutshelwe kusetshenziswa izilimi zomdabu, okuwuphawu lokuthi inkulu imakethe yawo emhlabeni. U-Okumu usho njalo ekhuluma kwesinye sezigcawu zokucobelana ngezobuciko saminyaka yonke ebesenziwe yiSpotify emahhovisi ayo amasha aseRosebank, eGoli, ngoLwesithathu. “Lokhu kukhombisa ukuthi akuphoqelekile ukuthi uze usebenzise izilimi zakwamanye amazwe ukugqamisa ubuciko bakho, ngakho sikhuthaza namanye amaciko asafika endimeni ukunganqeni ukucikoza esebenzisa izilimi zawo zebele ezehlukene,” usho kanje. Lezi zibalo zifakazelwe wukuthi umculi kamaskandi Umafikizolo ugile izimanga kwiSpotify nyakenye ngengoma yakhe ebishisa izikhotha ethi Uyoncengwa Unyoko, okuvela ukuthi idobe abantu abangaphezu kuka-15 million bayilalela. U-Okomu uthe okunye okubajabulisile wukuthi ibalelwa ngaphezu kuka-R504 million inzuzo yemali engeniswe wukulalelwa komculo wamaciko akuleli zwe ngonyaka odlule, nokuthi abe wu-67% amaciko akuleli zwe okube nezingoma zawo ebezingena zishintshana ohlwini lweziwu-50 ezisuke zihamba phambili ngenkathi kuqhubeka unyaka odlule. “Ngale kwalokho, sithole nokuthi ungaphezu kuka-74% umculo ovutshelwe eNingizimu Afrika ofinyelele emazweni omhlaba ahlukene nyakenye, okube yisibalo esikhulu kakhulu nesingakaze sifinyelele kusona phambilini,” usho kanje.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: KUSUKA kwesokunxele usomabhizinisi ne-podcaster u-Amahle-Imvelo Jaxa, umculi weRn'B uLloyiso Gijana, uPhiona Okumu noBryan Johnson beSpotify bekwesinye sezigcawu zokubhunga ngomculo nobuciko ebesiseRosebank, eGoli ngoLwesithathu Image: SIMANGALISO NTSHANGASE ILOKHU ikhule njalo inzuzo yemali eyenziwa amaciko akuleli zwe ngokulalelwa komculo wawo kwiSpotify. Izibalo zangonyaka odlule zikhombie ukuthi ukulalelwa komculo wawo kungenise imali ebalelwa ngaphezulu kuka-R504 million, okusho ukwenyuka ngo-28%. Lezi zibalo zihlaluke esigcawini seSpotify saminyaka yonke sokucobelelana ngolwazi lwezomculo nezobuciko  i-Loud & Clear, ebesisemahhovisi amasha eSpotify eRosebank, eGoli kuleli sonto. Njengoba iSpotify igubha iminyaka ewu-20 yasungulwa, okuhlanganisa neyisishiyagalombili yethulwa kuleli zwe kusuka ngo-2018, lezi zibalo zikhombise ukukhula okukhulu okukhomba ukuthi amaciko akuleli enza kahle ngokulalelwa komculo wawo. I-Loud & Clear iwuhlelo lwale nkampani eyisizinda sokulalela umculo wamazwe ehlukene emhlabeni, nolwaqala ngo-2021 ngenhloso yokuveza obala izibalo ezikhomba ukuthi umculo wamaciko ulalelwa kangakanani nokuveza ukuthi inzuzo yenziwa kanjani ukuze kungabi nakudideka emacikweni afaka umculo kuyona. Okugqame embikweni walezi zibalo yilokhu okulandelayo: Umqondisi omkhulu weSpotify kwiSub-Saharan Africa, uJoceleyne Muhutu-Remy, uthe lezi zibalo zikhomba ukuthi amaciko akuleli awagcini ngokukhula nje ngobuciko, kepha alokhu engenise njalo emhlabeni wonke. “Ukuphumelela kwawo kukhomba ukuthi ayinyama kangakanani emhlabeni jikelele, okuzothi uma kuqhubeka kanjena agcine esenezigidigidi zabalaleli emhlabeni jikelele futhi kuwavulele amathuba amakhulu,” usho kanje. UNgqongqoshe wezokuXhumana nezobuChwepheshe, uMnuz Solly Malatsi, esitatimendeni asithumele ukuze sifundwe kulo mbuthano - ubonge iSpotify ngokukhetha iNingizimu Afrika nangokukholelwa kuyona nasemacikweni emikhakha ehlukene enza kahle.
