text: UMDLALI wasesiswini weKaizer Chiefs, uSibongiseni "Ox" Mthethwa, ubalwa nabaphelelwa yizinkontileka eNaturena ngenyanga ezayo Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX ABADLALI beKaizer Chiefs abaphelelwa yizinkontileka banengcindezi yokukhombisa abaphathi ukuthi kukhona abasengakwenzela leli qembu elizodlala kwiCaf Confederation Cup ngesizini ezayo. Amakhosi azibekisele indawo kulo mqhudelwano kusasele imidlalo emibili kuphele isizini yeBetway Premiership ka-2025/2026. Anamaphuzu angu-51 emidlalweni engu-28 okuyinto osekuneminyaka agcina ukuyenza. Leli qembu eliholwa ngabaqeqeshi, uKhalil Ben Youssef no-Cedric Kaze, linethuba lokuqeda isizini linamaphuzu angu-57. Namuhla ngo-3 ntambama eMoses Mabhida Stadium, eThekwini, iChiefs izobhekana naMaZulu emdlalweni wePremiership ingasenayo ingcindezi yokunqoba kwazise alisekho iqembu elingayigudluza endaweni yesithathu kwi-log. Emdlalweni wokugcina wesizini, iChiefs izobhekana neChippa United eMabhida ngoMeyi 23. Nokho ingcindezi ikubadlali abambalwa abaphelelwa yizinkontileka eNaturena ngenyanga ezayo. Laba badlali basenalo ithuba lokujika umqondo abaphathi beqembu okungenzeka ukuthi sebezithathile izinqumo ngekusasa labo. Kulaba badlali kukhona uSibongiseni "Ox" Mthethwa oyibamba enkabeni yenkundla, Dillan Solomons, Pule Mmodi, Gaston Sirino noTashreeq Morris, UBrandon Petersen kunamahlebezi okuthi usegixabezwe ngenye inkontileka. Kuvele ukuthi  uNkosingiphile Ngcobo, Glody Lilepo noReeve Frosler banikezwe ezinye izinkontileka ezizophela ngo-2027. Nakuba iChiefs yenze kahle kule sizini kodwa kungabe izigwaza ngowayo uma ingazitshela ukuthi akusekho ekudlalelayo kwazise aMaZulu afuna ukuqinisekisa ukuthi awasuki endaweni yesine kwi-log ukuze kufezeke isifiso sikamengameli wawo, uSandile Zungu. UNgcobo uthe balindele umdlalo onzima eMabhida. "Senza okujwayelekile ukulungiselela umdlalo, sicija neqhinga lethu nabaqeqeshi. Kufanele sisebenze kanzima ngoba ngeke kube wumdlalo olula. Siyazi ukuthi AmaZulu angaba yingozi kangakanani njengoba ephekwa ngumqeqeshi u-Arthur (Zwane). Ngakho silindele umdlalo onzima futhi sikulungele ukulwela ukuwina," kusho uNgcobo kwi-website yeChiefs. Nakuba Amakhosi ezoqeda isizini engawinanga neyokubika indebe, okubalwa iNedbank Cup ebiyivikela, kodwa akubuzwa ukuthi abalandeli banelisekile ngokubuyela kweqembu labo kwiCaf. Ngesizini edlule, iChiefs izibekisele indawo kwiCaf Confederation Cup ngokunqoba iNedbank Cup. "Kumnandi ukwazi ukuthi sizophindela emqhudelwaneni weCaf ngesizini ezayo. Yinto ebesifuna ukuyizuza siyiqembu futhi sijabule ngokuthi sikwenzile lokho kusasele imidlalo emibili. Ngiyajabula kakhulu ngalokho. Kuzoba nzima kodwa sizozuza ngokudlala khona," kusho uNgcobo.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: URELEBOHILE Mofokeng we-Orlando Pirates ezama ukudlula nebhola kuThabo Nodada weDurban City emdlalweni weBetway Premiership e-Orlando Amstel Arena, eSoweto, ngoMgqibelo Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX UMQEQESHI we-Orlando Pirates, u-Abdeslam Ouaddou, uyikhombe eMbombela Stadium imibhiyozo kulandela ukubajwa kwezakhe yiDurban City emdlalweni obekufanele bawunqobe ukuze bezoqukula isicoco seBetway Premiership phambi kwezinkumbi zabalandeli e-Orlando Amstel Arena, eSoweto, ngoMgqibelo ntambama. IPirates iphume nephuzu emdlalweni ophele ngo 0-0 obekubhekwe ukuthi izoqoqa kuwona amathathu, ilingane neMamelodi Sundowns esesicongweni se-log yePremiership ngamaphuzu angu-68. EZimnyama zisendaweni yesibili ngawu-66. Emdlalweni wokugcina wesizini, zizobhekana ne-Orbit College, evika izembe, eMbombela Stadium, eMpumalanga, ngoMgqibelo ngo-3 ntambama. Lo mdlalo usushintshe kwaba yiwona ophethe injabulo nezinyembezi zabalandeli bePirates abagcina ukubona iqembu labo liqukula isicoco seligi ngo-2012. Umdlalo ne-Orbit bekubhekwe ukuthi uzoba ngowokuyojabula nokunika abanye abadlali ithuba lokuzibonakalisa. Emuva komdlalo, u-Ouaddou, uthe uyakholwa ukuthi nakanjani bazowuqedela eMbombela umsebenzi ngempelasonto ezayo. "Ekuqaleni kwesizini ngasho ukuthi umbango weligi uzoqhubeka kuze kube wusuku lokugcina. Angikhathazekile kodwa ngijabhile ngoba asiwinanga. Kodwa masiyeni emdlalweni wokugcina siyoqukula indebe. Sekuphele iminyaka eminingi iPirates ingayiwini iligi futhi lokho kubonakele ngamatata enkundleni. Kubafana bami ngifuna ukuthi hambani niyothatha isicoco ngempelasonto ezayo,"kusho u-Ouaddou kwiSupersport. Enkundleni, iPirates ifake ingcindezi kusukela ekuqaleni komdlalo kodwa ukuqina kodonga lwasemuva lweCity lwenze abagadli beZimnyama bathwala kanzima.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: U-ABDESLAM Ouadoou ongumqeqeshi we-Orlando Pirates, uzothembela kubafana bakhe ukuthi bahlule iDurban City emdlalweni weBetway Premiership e-Orlando Amstel Arena, eSoweto, namuhla ukuze ezongena emlandweni Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX UMQEQESHI we-Orlando Pirates, u-Abdeslam Ouaddou, usethubeni lokungena emlandweni okhethekile kuleli qembu uma enqoba isicoco seBetway Premiership. IPirates izobhekana neDurban City emdlalweni owandulela owokugcina wePremiership e-Orlando Amstel Arena, eSoweto, namuhla ngo-3 ntambama. Owokusonga isizini izowudlala ne-Orbit College eMbombela Stadium, eMpumalanga, ngoMeyi 23. EZimnyama zidinga ukwehlula iCity ukuze zizochonywa uphaphe lwegwalagwala. Zagcina ngesizini ka-2011/2012 ukuba ngompetha bwePremiership beqeqeshwa ngu-Augusto Palacios wasePeru owanikwa umsebenzi sekuyophela isizini. Lesi sicoco zasisheba nendebe yeMTN8 neyeTelkom Knockout. IPirates yayikwenzile lokhu ngesizini ka-2010/2011 iqeqeshwa nguRuud Krol waseNetherlands. Lokhu kusho ukuthi nakulokhu zinethuba lokudla izindebe ezintathu ngesizini kwazise sezifake ekhabetheni indebe yeMTN8 neyeCarling Knockout. U-Ouaddou waseMorocco usethubeni lokuzifaka emlandweni wokuba ngumqeqeshi wesibili wasezwenikazi, i-Afrika (ngaphandle kowaseMzansi), ozowina isicoco seligi nePirates kusukela kwasungulwa iPremier Soccer League (PSL) ngo-1996. Uma engasiphakamisa, uzolandela ezinyathelweni zikaRoy Barreto waseZimbabwe owasiwina neZimnyama esuka kwiQwaqwa Stars ngesizini ka-2002/2003. Uzoba ngumqeqeshi wesihlanu emlandweni weZimnyama owine isicoco seligi okukhona kubona uPalacios, Krol, Barreto no-Gordon Igesund owasiwina ngesizini ka-2000/2001. Ngaphezu kwalokho, uzongena emlandweni wokuba ngumqeqeshi wesibili onqobe iligi kwiPirates ngesizini yakhe yokuqala okuyinto eyenziwa nguBarreto kuphela kusukela kwasungulwa iPSL. Abukho ubufakazi bokuthi u-Ouaddou uyawazi umlando angase angene kuwona uma abafana bakhe bengaqeda ngeCity namuhla kodwa uchithe isonto lonke egcizelela ubumqoka bokungabhiyozi umsebenzi ungakapheli. Iqiniso wukuthi kunemizuzu engu-90 okufanalele bayidlale e-Orlando ezobe ingcwele ichichima kwazise amathikithi adayiswe aphela. Imidlalo yeBetway Premiership Namuhla ngo-3 ntambama: AmaZulu v Kaizer Chiefs (Moses Mabhida Stadium); Chippa United v Golden Arrows (Nelson Mandela Bay Stadium); Orlando Pirates v Durban City (Orlando Amstel Arena); Polokwane City v Marumo Gallants (Old Peter Mokaba Stadium); Richards Bay v Sekhukhune United (Mhlathuze Sports Complex); Siwelele v Magesi FC (Dr Petrus Molemela Stadium); Stellenbosh FC v Orbit College (Danie Craven Stadium)

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: USANELE 'Tornado' Msimang waseNtshanga, okungenzeka ahoxe empini okulindeleke axhimfane kuyona nowayengumpetha womhlaba, uXolisani 'Nomeva' Ndongeni waseMthatha Image: Isithombe:SITHUNYELWE KUBANJWE umoya ngokulungela impi komshayisibhakela waseNtshanga, uSanele "Tornado" Msimang, okuvele ukuthi ushiswe ngamanzi abilayo ngeSonto. UMsimang ongumpetha we-WBF International Super Lightweight uzobhekana noXolisani "Nomeva" Ndongeni owayeyingqwele kwi-International Boxing Organisation (IBO) Lightweight eJan Smuts Stadium, KuGompo City, ngoMeyi 23. Le mpi okungeyokuvalelisa kwezamankomane kaNdongeni, ingeyosuku kwezihlelwe yiGround Up Boxing Promotions. UMsimang usayine isivumelano sokubhekana noNdongeni emuva kwesikhathi eside lo mshayisibhakela waseMthatha engayitholi imbangi azoxhimfana nayo empini yokuvalelisa phambi kwabalandeli bakhe endaweni aqala kuyona isibhakela esikhokhelayo ngo-2010. UMsimang utshele leli phephandaba ukuthi ushiswe ngamanzi abilayo esandleni nasesiswini, waphuthunyiswa esibhedlela ngeSonto ebusuku. Lo mshayisibhakela osehlulwe kabili ezimpini zesicoco saseMzansi, usehlala kwaPata, eMgungundlovu, lapho enesitolo khona. "Ngisola ukuthi le nto ihlangene nombango oqhubekayo ngendaba yesitolo. Kukhona umuntu owayenesitolo ngaphambi kokuthi ngisivule nami kodwa wasiyeka. Emuva kwesikhathi, wabuya wasivula futhi kodwa abantu bangayingena indaba yakhe, baqhubeka nokuthenga kwesami. NgeSonto ebusuku bengibilisa amaqanda amathathu. Esebilile ngesehlisile isitofu. Emuva kwalokho, ngizwe iqanda liqhumisa okwesibhamu, amanzi angithela esandleni nasesiswini. Inyama yakulezi zindawo ibizihambela. Bangishaye ngovutha," kusho uMsimang. "Namuhla (izolo) udokotela ungibuzile ukuthi ngifuna kanganani ukuyolwa le mpi, ngamtshela ukuthi ngizimisele kakhulu. Uthe uzonginika kusuka namuhla kuze kube ngoLwesithathu, abone ukuthi isimo sami sinjani. Emuva kwalokho, uzobe esekhipha incwandi eqinisekisa ukuthi ngeke ngikwazi ukulwa uma isimo singesihle. Ungiyale ngokuthi ngingangcweki nabanye abashayisibhakela okwamanje kuze kube kuyaphola kahle esandleni." Kulezi zimpi, umpetha we-SA Featherweight uLindelani "TWT" Sibisi uzovikela ibhande kuBongani Fule wase-Eastern Cape. Kwenye impi ebhekwe ngabomvu, uNhlakanipho "GTI" Kunene uzobanga ibhande le-IBO Minimumweight noNhlanhla "Kilimanjalo" Tyirha wase-Eastern Cape.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UMGADLI weKaizer Chiefs, uTashreeq Morris, okungenzeka anikwe inkontileka entsha eNaturena Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX KUNGENZEKA iKaizer Chiefs iphoqeleke ukushintsha umqondo ngomgadli, uTashreeqa Morris, ebihlele ukumchitha ekupheleni kwesizini. UMorris ushaye igoli emdlalweni wakhe wokuqala wesizini elibeke phambili iChiefs ngesikhathi ibhekene neSekhukhune United emdlalweni weBetway Premiership ngempelasonto. Amakhosi agcine enqobe ngo 2-0, aqinisekisa indawo yawo kwiCaf Confederation Cup. UMorris ngomunye wabadlali ezingakavuselelwa izinkontileka zabo eNaturena. Amakhosi asezame izikhawu ukumchitha kodwa kugcina kungenzekanga. Ngasekuqaleni kwesizini ubefunwa nguGavin Hunt esengumqeqeshi weDurban City kodwa wenqaba ngoba ethi ufuna ukudlalela iqembu eliseGauteng. Nakuba iChiefs ifuna ukumchitha kodwa kungenzeka ehlelwe yinhlanhla njengoba izodlala kwiCaf Confederation Cup okuwumqhudelwano odinga abadlali abaningi. UMorris ubanga ijezi noFlavio da Silva otakule Amakhosi ezikhathini ezinzima, Ashley Du Preez, Khanyisa Mayo oshaye into ephansi ekubeni ebolekiwe no-Etiosa Ighodaro ohlale isikhathi eside engadlali ngenxa yokulimala. Umqeqeshi weChiefs, uKhalil Ben Youssef, uncome uMorris ngokungena ashaye igoli emdlalweni omqoka. "UMorris ngomunye wabadlali bethu futhi ubesebenza kanzima eziqeqesha. Besilinde isikhathi esifanele sokumfaka futhi ngicabanga ukuthi lesi bekuyiso sokumfaka esikimini. Sikuxoxile naye ubumqoka balo mdlalo. Kuyakhombisa ukuthi umdlali ngamunye esimbizayo ukulungele ukusebenzela iqembu," kusho uBen Youssef. IChiefs isalelwe yimidlalo emibili ngaphambi kokusonga isizini yePremiership ka-2025/2026, ngemidlalo emibili yaseThekwini. NgoMgqibelo izobhekana naMaZulu eMoses Mabhida Stadium, isonge kuyona le nkundla neChippa United ngoMeyi 23. Emuva kwalokho, kulindeleke ukuthi izikhulu zimemezele izinguquko kubadlali nakubaqeqeshi.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UMQEQESHI we-Orlando Pirates kwiDStv Diski Challenge, uRoscoe Krieling, ejabula nomdlali wasemuva uJabu Mokone emuva kokuwina iligi ngempelasonto edlule Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX 'I-ORLANDO Pirates ingaba nenqanawe yenkulisa uma inganquma ukuyivusa.' Lawa ngamazwi omqeqeshi weqembu leZimnyama elingompetha beDStv Diski Challenge, uRoscoe Krieling, oqophe umlando ngokuphakamisa le ndebe okokuqala selokhu le ligi yasungulwa ngo-2014. IPirates yehlule iSundowns ngo 2-0 emdlalweni wokugcina wesizini eDobsonville Stadium, eSoweto, ngempelasonto. Kulindeleke ukuthi leli qembu liyodlala phesheya kwezilwandle okuwuhambo oluhambisana nokuba ngompetha beDiski. EZimnyama zihlale esicongweni se-log amasonto angu-21. Eminyakeni edlule, iPirates ibihlala esicongweni kodwa igcine igudluziwe. IPirates idla umhlanganiso kwiDiski nje, ayisenayo inkulisa kwazise yavalwa eminyakeni edlule kulandela izinsolo zokukokotela iminyaka kwabadlali. Abadlali abayibamba kwiDiski bathungathwa njalo ngaphambi kokuqala kwesizini. IKaizer Chiefs neMamelodi Sundowns ngamanye amaqembu ashaya ngabadlali abakhuliswe ezinkulisa zawo. UKrieling owayeyiphini likaThabo Septhemba ngesikhathi bewina iligi yeDiski ngo-2023, uncome umsebenzi weqembu namalungiselelo esizini aseqophelweni. "Lokhu kuwuphumela wokuhlela izinto okwenziwa ngaphambi kokufika kwami eqenjini. Ngesonto lami lokuqala ngicabanga ukuthi kwakunabadlali abangu-45 engabahlola. Nganikwa umbandela wokuhlanganisa iqembu. Ngalehlisa ngasala nabadlali abangu-29, sasayinisa ababili phakathi nesizini sagcina sesinabangu-31. "Ngesikhathi ngilungiselela ukuqala kwesizini, abaningi abadlali babengakaze bakwenze lokho ngendlela engenza ngayo. Babemangele. Sasingagijimi kodwa kwakusebenza ibhola kakhulu. Ngabatshela ukuthi nizokhumbula ukuthi nanikhala silungiselela isizini, senithi siyiqembu eliqine kunawo wonke kule ligi. Ngingasho ukuthi bekunjalo, besiqine kunawo wonke amaqembu. Iqembu lisengakwazi ukuthi ukukhula. Ngicabanga ukuthi iPirates ingabumba enye yezinkulisa eziqinile eMzansi," kusho uKriel. "Noma ngabe iqembu likhetha ukwenzani. Ngisebenzela iqembu futhi ngingathanda ukuhlala. Njengomqeqeshi ngiyafisa inselelo yokuqeqesha esigabeni esiphezulu. Kodwa ngiyakwazi ukubekezela. Engikudingayo yikhefu neholidi, kuningi engikwenzele iqembu."

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: U-ADEN McCarthy weKaizer Chiefs evimba uThemba Zwane weMamelodi Sundowns emdlalweni weBetway Premiership eLoftus Versfeld Stadium, ePitoli, ngoLwesithathu ebusuku Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX IKAIZER Chiefs iqinise ithemba le-Orlando Pirates lokuwina isicoco seligi ibambana neMamelodi Sundowns ngo 1-1 emdlalweni weBetway Premiership eLoftus Versfeld Stadium, ePitoli, ngoLwesithathu ebusuku. IChiefs ibekwe phambili nguFlavio da Silva esiwombeni sokuqala, waphendula uBrayan Leon weSundowns kwesesibili. IChiefs ingene enkundleni izolwela ukubambelela endaweni yesithathu kwi-log ukuze izongena kwiCaf Confederation Cup ngesizini ezayo. Ngakolunye uhlangothi, iSundowns ibibheke ukunweba igebe lamaphuzu esicongweni njengoba imiswe kabi yiPirates esisele ngamathathu ekubeni isele nangomdlalo. Ukubamba iSundowns kweChiefs kusize yona kwayisondeza kwiCaf kodwa kuhlomulise kakhulu iPirates esidinga ukuwina imidlalo yayo emithathu, izibeke ethubeni elihle lokuwina isicoco seligi osekuneminyaka siyiphunyuka. Uma iSundowns, enamaphuzu angu-65, iwina imidlalo emibili eyisalele, izogcina inamaphuzu angu-71 okuyisibalo esifanayo iPirates, elandela ngawu-62, engafinyelela kusona uma ingaqoqa amaphuzu ayisishiyagalolunye emidlalweni emithathu yokugcina. Lokhu kusho ukuthi kungagcina kubalwa amagoli ukuze kutholakale umakhonya wesizini ka-2025/2026. Enkundleni iChiefs ilicacise zibekwa iqhinga layo lokuvimbela iSundowns ukuthi ingaliqali ibhola emuva. Lokhu kuthele izithelo ngomzuzu ka-25 ngesikhathi unozinti weSundowns, uRonwen Williams, ephasela iChiefs ibhola esiswini lagcina lifike kuMduduzi Shabalala, walidlulisela kuDa Silva olibeke phathi. ISundowns ilinyalelwe nguKeanu Cupido odlalise kabi nguSiphesihle Ndlovu, wakhishwa ngohlaka. Indawo yakhe ithathwe nguGrant Kekana. Kwenzeke esifanayo kuShabalala weChiefs odlaliswe kabi nguJayden Adams, kwangena uGaston Sirino. Esiwombeni sesibili, iSundowns ibuye yacindezela ngomfutho. Kuyilungele ngomzuzu ka-54 ngesikhathi uLeon eqobela phakathi ibhola ebeligotshwe nguThapelo Morena kwesokudla. Nokho, kuyomfeke izinhlelo ngesikhathi u-Adams ethola ikhadi eliphuzi lesibili ngenxa yokwenza sengathi udlaliswe kabi. Lokhu kuholele ekutheni iChiefs ithole intuba yokuphefumula, yakha amathuba angcono kodwa yahluleka ukuwasebenzisa. U-ADEN McCarthy weKaizer Chiefs evimba uThemba Zwane weMamelodi Sundowns emdlalweni weBetway Premiership eLoftus Versfeld Stadium, ePitoli, ngoLwesithathu ebusuku Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: U-EVIDENCE Makgopa we-Orlando Pirates ejabula nozakwao uMakhehleni Makhaula emuva kokushaya elinye lamagoli abahlule ngawo iStellenbosch FC emdlalweni weBetway Premiership e-Athlone Stadium, eKapa, ngoLwesibili ebusuku Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX I-ORLANDO Pirates eqhubekile 'nokufaka ukushisa' kwiMamelodi Sundowns embangweni wesicoco seligi yeBetway Premiership ngokuwola amaphuzu agcwele kwiStellenbosch FC e-Athlone Stadium, eKapa, ngoLwesibili ebusuku. Amagoli aweze iPirates avalelwe phakathi ngu-Evidence Makgopa noPatrick "Tito" Maswanganyi esiwombeni sokuqala. Ukucosha amaphuzu amathathu kwePirates kuyenze yanciphisa igebe lafinyelela kwamabili phakathi kwayo neMamelodi Sundowns ezodlala neKaizer Chiefs ngoLwesithathu ebusuku. EZimnyama zisendaweni yesibili kwi-log ngamaphuzu angu-62 emuva kwemidlalo engu-27. Zilandela amaBrazilians aseqoqe awu-64 emuva kwemidlalo engu-27. ISundowns idinga ukuyiwina yonke imidlalo emithathu ukuze izowina isicoco seligi yePremiership ihlandla lesishiyagalolunye kulandelana. Nokho lokhu kuzoncika ekutheni eZimnyama ziyaqhubeka yini nokucosha amaphuzu emidlalweni emithathu ezisalele. IPirates ilwela ukuqeda ukucanasa kweSundowns kwiligi yaseMzansi nokuqeda ishobolo leminyaka lokwehlulwa yiligi. KoweStellies, iPirates ikhombise zibekwa ukuthi izimisele ngothola amagoli zibekwa kodwa ibihluleka ukugqobhoza udonga lwasemuva obelwakhiwe nguMosa Lebusa ohlukane neSundowns no-Olisa Ndah ochithwe ngeZimnyama. Nokho kugcine kubhidlike konke ngomzuzu ka-41 ngesikhathi uMakgopa ephakama phakathi kwazo lezi zitobha engqofela phakathi ibhola ebeligotshwe ngakwesokudla. Emuva kwaleli goli, iPirates ibuye ngamandla nokuphethe ngokuthi uMaswanganyi avalele phakathi elesibili ngemuva kwemizuzu emine. Esiwombeni sesibili, iStellies izamile ukubuya emdlalweni emuva kokwenza izinguquko kodwa yagcina ihlulekile ukushaya igoli. Emdlalweni olandelayo, iPirates izobhekana neMagesi ePeter Mokaba Stadium, ePolokwane, ngoMgqibelo ngo-8 ebusuku.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UMSHAYISIBHAKELA waseDundee, uNhlakanipho "GTI" Kunene, uzimisele ngokuwinela iKwaZulu-Natal ibhande le-IBO Mini-Flyweight azolibanga noNhlanhla "Showtime" Tyirha e-East London ngoMeyi 23 Image: Isithombe:SITHUNYELWE AKAYINGENI eyokuhlonipha iqhawe lakhe eringini umshayisibhakela waKwaZulu-Natal, uNhlakanipho "GTI" Kunene ozobanga ibhande le-International Boxing Organisation (IBO) Mini-flyweight noNhlanhla "Showtime"" Tyirha e-East London ngasekupheleni kwenyanga. Impi kaKunene (8-0-0) noTyirha (12-3-0), ikwezihlelwe yiGround Up Promotions ezizoba seJan Smuts Stadium ngoMeyi 23. Kulezi zimpi, umakadebona owayengumpetha we-IBO Lightweight, uXolisani "Nomeva" Ndongeni waseMthatha, uzoxhimfana noSanele Msimango waseNchanga njengoba esephanyeka amagilavu emgibeni. Kwebhekwe ngabomvu, uLindelani "TWT" Sibisi waseDundee uzovikela ibhande le-SA featherweight kuBongani Fule. UKunene (24), ongumpetha we-WBF Intercontinental Minimumweight, uthe uzimisele ngokuwina ibhande kumshayisibhakela akhule ebukela kuyena. "Ngiyamazi uTyirha kusukela ngisalwa esigabeni sama-amesha. Ngikhule ngibukela kuyena, eyiqhawe lami. Ungumshayisibhakela osebenza kanzima futhi ozinikelayo. Kumele ngigqame nami kule mpi," kusho uKunene. Ithuba elitholwe nguKunene lokulwela ibhande lomhlaba esisindweni seMini-Flyweight liyivela kancane kwazise akekho umshayisibhakela waseKZN owake wawina ngisho ibhande laseMzansi kulesi sisindo. "Leli thuba lifike kahle ngisesimeni esihle nangokomoya, kungekho okungikhathazayo futhi ngisanda kuwina ibhande le-WBF ngoMashi. Ngiyazi ukuthi KwaZulu-Natal akekho umshayisibhakela owake wawina ibhande lomhlaba esisindweni esincane. Ngiyajabula kakhulu ukuthi ngithole leli thuba ngoba ibhande le-IBO yibhande lomhlaba. Leli thuba lizoshintsha impilo yami futhi alehleli noma ngubani. Ngaphezu kwalokho, lizoletha ushintsho eKZN futhi lizongakhela igama emphakathini eDundee. Okukhulu wukuthi ngizoba yisibonelo entsheni yangakithi ukuze ibone ukuthi kuyaphileka ngezemidlalo,"usho kanje. Nakuba uKunene egcwele ukuzeithemba kodwa kumele agawule abheke kuTyirha owawina ibhande le-SA light Flyweight empini yesine eqale isibhakela esikhokhelayo ngo-2018. "Ngiyazi ukuthi bona bazitshela ukuthi bathole ibhokisa elisezingeni eliphansi abazozenzela kulona. Lokho ngeke kwenzeke. Ifulegi leKwaZulu-Natal ngizoliphakamisela phezulu, iDundee ngifuna ukuyibeka phezulu. Ngizokubeka eceleni ukuthi ngikhule ngibukela kuyena. Ayikho inhlonipho engizomnika yona eringini. Ngiyazi ukuthi ngizoba ngcono kunaye eringini ngosuku lwempi," kusho uKunene.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UMQEQESHI weMamelodi Sundowns, uMiguel Cardoso, owine umklomelo wenyaka, iBetway Premiership Coach of The Month, okwesithathu kulandelana Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX UMQEQESHI weMamelodi Sundowns, uMiguel Cardoso, uzobhekana neKaizer Chiefs ekhaya ngoLwesithathu eshayela phezulu kulandela ukudla umklomelo womqeqeshi ovelele wenyanga, iBetway Premiership Coach of The Month, okwesithathu kulandelana. Lo mqeqeshi wasePortugal osebuyisele iSundowns esicongweni se-log yeBetway Premiership, uqokwe njenge-Coach of The Month ngenyanga ka-Ephreli. Kule nyanga iSundowns iwine imidlalo emithathu, yadlala ngokulingana kwemibili kwemihlamu eyidlalile. Kulo mklomelo, uCardoso wehlule u-Abdeslam Ouaddou we-Orlando Pirates beChiefs, uCedric Kaze noKhalil Ben Youssef abawine imidlalo emithathu kweyisithupha ngo-Ephreli. ISIBABULI se-Orlando Pirates, u-Oswin Appollis, siwine umklomelo womdlali ovelele, iBetway Premiership Player of The Month, nowegoli elivelele, iBetway Premiership Goal of The Month Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX Umklomelo womdlali wenyanga, iBetway Premiership Player of The Month, udliwe ngu-Oswin Appollis wePirates, owushebe nowegoli elihambe phambili, iBetway Premiership Goal of The Month. U-Appollis uwine ngegoli elishaye ngesikhathi bebhekene naMaZulu ngo 3-0 emdlalweni weBetway Premiership e-Orlando Amstel Arena. Emidlalweni emine, u-Appollis ushaye amagoli amane, wakha elilodwa. UCardoso uzohola iSundowns uma isibhekene neChiefs eLoftus Versfeld Stadium, ePitoli, ngoLwesithathu, ngo-7.30 ebusuku.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX UBRIAN Baloyi, owayengunozinti weKaizer Chiefs, ukholwa wukuthi ukudonsa kanzima kwaleli qembu kudalwa yizinkinga eziningi okubalwa kuzona ukungabikhona kwesikhulu esiphezulu esizokwenza umsebenzi oshiywe ngusihlalo, uKaizer "Chincha Guluva" Motaung, osededele izingane zakhe ekuphathweni kwaMakhosi. UBaloyi owadlalela iChiefs phakathi kuka-1993 no-2004, ubekhuluma kwi-podcast, i-soccerbeat, kuleli sonto. Sekungumlando ukuthi iChiefs yayibalwa namaqembu okwakungapheli isizini engawinanga neyokubika indebe. Empeleni Amakhosi, asungulwa ngo-1970, ahamba phambili ngezindebe ebholeni laseMzansi ngeziwu-93. Nokho isomiso esiwahlasele kule minyaka, sesiwaqhathe nabalandeli. Eminyakeni eyishumi edlule, iChiefs iqukule iNedbank Cup kuphela, eyiwine nyakenye yehlula izimbangi i-Orlando Pirates eThekwini. Kule sizini isiphunyukwe yizona zonke izindebe futhi akubukeki isenalo ithuba lokuwina iligi yeBetway Premiership. Abalandeli bagxeka abaphathi beqembu, ikakhulukazi uKaizer Motaung Jr. UBaloyi uthe inkinga isekuphathweni kweqembu kusukela kwaqhela uMotaung, waliyekela ezinganeni zakhe, uMotaung Jr, Jessica Motaung, Kemiso Motaung noBobby Motaung. "Ngokwami umuntu owayephethe iqembu, asivaleki isikhala sakhe. UChincha Guluva kusukela ekulisunguleni nasekuliphatheni, kuze kuba uyalishiya manje. Akulula (ukuvala isikhala sakhe). Eminyakeni edlule, iChiefs ibisebenza ngaphandle kwesikhulu esiphezulu, bekuhlala kungusihlalo nabaqondisi ezindaweni ezihlukene. Ngicabanga ukuthi okungaxazulula izinkinga wukuba nesikhulu esiphezulu esizokwengamela konke, nabo bonke abasebenzayo," kusho uBaloyi ekhuluma ekhasini leSoccerbeat kwiYouTube. "Kuphakathi kokuthi omunye wabo, uMotaung Jr, Jessica, Kemiso noBobby, ukusithatha lesi sikhundla ngoba ngicabanga ukuthi kunesikhala esikhona esidinga ukuvalwa... Kungaba ngowesilisa noma owesifazane othatha isikhundla sokuba yisikhulu esiphezulu, bonke basebenze ngaphansi kwakhe ngoba okwamanje kunesikhala esingabonakali ngamehlo enyama uma ungaphandle. Kodwa uma uqala ukubheka ukuthi yini inkinga kwiChiefs, uyabona ukuthi lena ngenye yazo, yisikhala esashiywa ngusihlalo ongasekho ngokugcwele njengoba bekwenzeka. Omunye wabo kufanele athathe isikhala sesikhulu esiphezulu, bonke babike kuyena. Lowo muntu uyena ozodlulisela izinto ebhodini, kubalandeli nakubona bonke abantu." IChiefs izobuyela enkundleni ngoMgqibelo isiyobhekana ne-Orbit College emdlalweni wePremiership eNelson Mandela Bay Stadium, eGqeberha.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: IQHAWE le-Orlando Pirates, uRelebohile Mofokeng, lijabula nozakwabo emuva kokushaya elinye lamagoli amathathu ngesikhathi bexebula iTS Galaxy emdlalweni weBetway Premiership eMbombela Stadium, eNelspruit, izolo Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX I-ORLANDO Pirates yesule izinyembeni umqeqeshi, u-Abdeslam Ouaddou, ibhubhudla iTS Galaxy emdlalweni weBetway Premiership eMbombela Stadium, eNelspruit, ngeSonto. Amagoli eZimnyama ashaywe nguRelebohile Mofokeng (amathathu), Tshepang Moremi, Kamohelo Sebelebele noMlungisi Mbunjana okube wumkhonto ogwaze ekhaya. Ngalokhu, iPirates yehlise iMamelodi Sundowns ezicongweni se-log yePremiership, yavula igebe lephuzu. Ukunqoba kwePirates nokushaya kwayo amagoli ayisithupha kuyinselelo kumaBrazilians abedlala oweCaf Champions League. ISundowns sekufanele ikhokhe isikweletu ngokuqoqa amaphuzu, enyuse nesibalo samagoli. Akubuzwa ukuthi ukuwina ngale ndlela kweZimnyama kwesula izinyembezi u-Ouaddou ubekhihla esikaNandi ngokuyeka amathuba kwabadlali bakhe kwazise kungenzeka kugcine sekubalwa amagoli ekugcineni. "Lena yimpendulo ebheke kubantu abangabaza ukuzinikela kwabadlali. Ngihlala ngisho ukuthi akekho eqenjini lami ongena enkundleni efuna ukuhlulwa noma adlale ngokulingana. Sithumela umyalezo oshubile wokuthi akukapheli ngathi futhi sizolwa kuze kube sekugcineni," kusho u-Ouaddou emuva komdlalo. Kulo mdlalo, iPirates ihlasele zibekwa, yathola igoli ngomzuzu wesine ngesikhathi u-Oupa Motaung weGalaxy edlalisa kabi uMoremi ngaphandle kwebhokisi eseyobhekana nonozinti, wathola ikhadi elibomvu. I-free kick edaleke lapho uyibeke phakathi uMofokeng. Emuva kwalokho, iPirates ibisiphungwa ngezithebe. Sekusele imizuzu emine kuyiwe ekhefini, uMoremi ushaye phakathi ibhola ebelisuka kwikhona kaDeon Hotto. Leli goli lelanywe wumkhonto ogwaze ekhaya kaMbunjana obethi uphasela unozinti wakhe. Esiwombeni sesibili, iPirates iqhubeke lapho ibigcine khona, uMofokeng eshaya igoli lesibili emuva kwemizuzu eyisishiyagalombili. Ngomzuzu ka-64, uSebelebele uqobele phakathi elesihlanu, lalandelwa ngelikaMofokeng emuva kwemizuzu emine.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UNOZINTI weKaizer Chiefs, uBruce Bvuma, onengcindezi yokulenza elakhe ijezi kuleli qembu laseNaturena Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX PHEZU kokuba unozinti weKaizer Chiefs, uBruce Bvuma, eseyoqeda iminyaka eyishumi edlalela leli qembu kodwa usabhekene nomqansa wokulenza elakhe ijezi eNaturena. UBvuma (30) waqala ukudlalela Amakhosi ngo-Ephreli 2017, eneminyaka engu-21 ebanga ijezi nonozinti abasezingeni eliphezulu okubalwa kubona u-Itumeleng Khune olenze elakhe ijezi iminyaka eminingi eNaturena. Nokho kuze kube manje usadlale imidlalo engu-90 kuyona yonke imiqhudelwano. Ngesikhathi iChiefs imemezela ukuthi uKhune ngeke esadlala, bekubhekwe ukuthi uBvuma oyena ozoqhubeka lapho agcine khona. Nokho ugcine esedliselwa ogageni ngabanye onozinti okunguBrandon Petersen noFiacre Ntwari owathengwa kwiTS Galaxy. Kwamangala abaningi ngesikhathi uBvuma esala ngaphandle esikimini seChiefs esadlala umdlalo wamanqamu weNedbank Cup ne-Orlando Pirates eThekwini nyakenye, ekubeni kukade kunguyena owayevimba njalo. Sekungumlando ukuthi indawo yakhe yathathwa nguPetersen, wasiza Amakhosi aqukula indebe. Njengoba uPetersen engadlali ngenxa yokugula ekuholele ekutheni ahlinzwe, uBvuma unikwe ithuba lokuzibonakalisa. Ukubuya kwakhe kuqondane nomdlalo wabakhaya neZimnyama, wangenelwa ngamagoli amathathu ezakhe zakhala ngaphansi ngo 3-0. Ngaphandle kokuthi uBvuma unethuba lokukhombisa abaqeqeshi baMakhosi ukuthi ijezi limfanele noma eseluleme uPetersen, unomthwalo wokujulukela inkontileka entsha. Inkontileka kaBvuma neChiefs izophela ngoJuni kodwa leli qembu linombandela wokuyivuselela ngonyaka. Abanye abadlali abaphelelwa yizinkontileka kwiChiefs nguPetersen, Dillan Solomons, Sibongiseni Mthethwa, Nkosingiphile Ngcobo, Thabo Cele, Pule Mmodi noTashreeq Morris. UBvuma ebhekene nobunzima bokulenza elakhe ijezi njengabanye onozinti abakhulele kwiChiefs abagcine bengamaqhawe eNaturena. Kubona kubalwa uKhune noBrian Baloyi owagcina esedlalela iMamelodi Sundowns. UKhune ucashunwe yi-Soccer Laduma ethi uBvuma kufanele ayozama kwelinye iqembu. "Kungaba kuhle ukumbona eya lapho ezodlala khona. Uyakhula, uma engakwenzi lokho...akadlali njalo. Kade elindile ukuthola ithuba. Yebo, lokho kwenzekile kodwa ngebhadi akalibambanga ngezandla zombili. Yingakho ehliselwe endaweni yesibili," kusho uKhune. Emidlalweni emithathu ebuyele aseyidlale kwiChiefs, uBvuma ungenelwe ngamagoli amane. Nakuba kunjalo kodwa ungomunye wabadlali okulindeleke basize iChiefs icoshe amaphuzu amathathu kwiMagesi FC emdlalweni weBetway Premiership eMoses Mabhida Stadium, eThekwini, ngoMgqibelo ngo-6 ntambama.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX ISINGENWE ngamanxusa aseMzansi indaba yokuboshwa komqeqeshi wakuleli, uRulani Mokwena, ezimkhalele ngeSonto e-Algeria. UMokwena wehlukane neqembu lase-Algeria. iMC Alger ngempelasonto, kwasabalala izindaba zokuthi useqashwe yi-Al Ittihad yaseLibya edlalelwa nguThembinkosi Lorch ayemqeqesha kwi-Orlando Pirates, Mamelodi Sundowns nakwiWydad Casablanca. Kuvele ukuthi uMokoena uboshiwe esikhumulweni sezindiza sase-Algeria, iHouari Boumediene Airport kulandela ukwephula umthetho owengamele imali yakhona, Kuthiwa ubezama ukuphuma nayo ngaphandle kwezwe. Iziko lezindaba, i-SABC, libike ukuthi uMokwena uthola usizo kwabamele iNingizimu Afrika e-Algeria. Lo mqeqeshi oneminyaka engu-39, oshiye i-Alger emuva ngempelasonto edlule kwezinyanga eziyishiyagalombili eyiqeqesha, kubikwa ukuthi ngokwemali azoyithola kwi-Ittihad, uzobalwa nabaqeqeshi abayikha ngamafosholo e-Afrika. UMokwena ushiye i-Alger esicongweni se-log kodwa ukukhishwa kwiCaf Champions League kubukeka kumdalele amazinyo abushelelezi kubaphathi beqembu.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UMQEQESHI weMamelodi Sundowns, uMiguel Cardoso, okubhekwe ukuthi aqhamuke neqhinga lokuqoqa amaphuzu kwi-Orbit College abazobhekana nayo kusasa emdlalweni weBetway Premiership Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX KUBUKEKA sezidlulile izivunguvungu ebezihlasele umqeqeshi weMamelodi Sundowns, uMiguel Cardoso, othwale kanzima emasontweni adlule abalandeli bemfuna ukumthela isibhaxu ngenxa yokubhimba kwezinto kuleli qembu laseChloorkop. Ukuhluleka kweSundowns ukuwina izindebe ezimbili zokuqala zesizini okuMTN8 neCarling Knockout kubadinile abalandeli. Enye intukuthelo idalwe wukuba sengcupheni yokuphuma kwamaBrazilians kwiCaf Champions League. Nokho sekungumlando ukuthi leli qembu lidlulele kuma-quarterfinal emuva kokwehlula iMC Alger yase-Algeria. Empeleni lo mdlalo yiwona oshintshe konke kwiSundowns, yabuyela endleleni yokudlala eyaziwa ngayo, yathela isibhaxu i-Orlando Pirates. Nokho emasontweni adlule, ikhishwe yiTS Galaxy kwiNedbank Cup. KwiBetway Premiership, isiwine imidlalo eyisithupha ilandelana. AmaBrazilians asesicongweni se-log lapho ebambene khona ngamaphuzu angu-44 nePirates. UCardoso uvumile ukuthi udlule ebunzimeni ezinyangeni ezedlule. Lo mqeqeshi wasePortugal uwine umklomelo weBetway Premiership Coach of the Month kaJanuwari noFebhuwari. "Angikaze ngizizwe sengathi sekungilahlekele ukulawula iqembu. Kuyaziwa ukuthi uma ungawini, imimoya ayifani kunoma sindawonye (siwina). Kodwa siyakhumbula, siyakwazi esakwenza. Silahlekelwe yizindebe ezimbili kumaphenathi, ngebhadi lokho akusinikanga izindebe. Komunye wayo abangenanga ngisho kanye ebhokisini lethu noma bekhahlelele ipali. Kodwa ibhola linjalo," kusho uCardoso. "Kunzima ukuvuka ngosuku olulandelayo uma ulahlekelwa yizindebe kanjalo. Kodwa abadlali bayazi lapho okufanele babheke khona futhi abantu abaseqenjini bayasisiza ukuthi sihlale sibumbene. Njengoba ngihlale ngisho ukuthi iminyango yaseChloorkop iqinile. Okwenzeka  ngaphandle, kungaphandle. Okwenzeka ngaphakathi, olunye udaba. Kuningi okungenziwanga ngendlela efanele ezintweni eziningi kodwa ubungibona ukuthi bengihlala ngiwehlisile umoya. Angifuni ukubuyela emibuzweni yasekuqaleni kwesizini. Bekungelula kithina. Bekunzima. Kudingeke silwe, silwele yonke into." ISundowns izobhekana ne-Orbit College emdlalweni weligi ngoLwesibili ngo-7.30 ebusuku e-Olympia Park, eRustenburg. Lokhu kuyibeka ethubeni lokuvula igebe lamaphuzu amathathu esicongweni se-log phakathi kwayo nePirates ezodlala neRichards Bay ngoLwesithathu ngo-7.30 ebusuku, e-Orlando Amstel Arena. Emuva owe-Orbit, iSundowns izodlala neStade Malien yaseMali kuma-quarterfinal eChampions League ePitoli ngoLwesihlanu. "Ebholeni kufanele ucabange ngekusasa. Angicabangi ngemuva. Engikwaziyo wukuthi ngoLwesibili sizodlala ne-Orbit. Yileyo inselelo esinayo. Kusuka lapho, sizobona ukuthi simelwe yini ngaphambili kodwa okwamanje yi-Orbit. Akekho eqenjini ocabanga okunye ngaphandle kwe-Orbit," kusho uCardoso.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UNOZINTI we-Orlando Pirates, uSipho Chaine, ngomunye wabadlali abamqoka njengoba isembangweni weligi yeBetway Premiership Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX UKUHLALA esicongweni se-log yeBetway Premiership kwe-Orlando Pirates kukhomba ukushintsha kwezinto kule ligi esiphathwe yiMamelodi Sundowns iminyaka. IPirates ishaya amaphiko kwiPremiership lapho ibambene khona neSundowns ngamaphuzu angu-44 emidlalweni engu-19. Lokhu akusajwayelekile ebholeni laseMzansi kwazise iSundowns ijwayele ukuzidlela amahlanga, iwine iligi kusasele imidlalo eminingi kuphele isizini. AmaBrazilians asewine iligi amahlandla ayisishiyagalombili elandelana. Kungenzeka ukuthi ukumiswa kabi kwayo yiPirates kuwubeka engcupheni umbuso wayo ngeligi eyiwine ngaphansi kwabaqeqeshi abahlukene. Ngesizini edlule ka-2024/2025, iSundowns ibivule igebe lamaphuzu angu-15 phakathi kwayo nePirates emuva kwemidlalo engu-19 nakuba eZimnyama bezisele ngemidlalo emine. Ibinamaphuzu angu-51, iPirates inangu-36 emuva kwemidlalo engu-15. Sekungumlando ukuthi iPirates igcine ihlulekile ukuyifica iSundowns. Ngesizini ka-2023/2024, iSundowns yayiqhwakele ngamaphuzu angu-53 emuva kwemidlalo engu-21. Emuva kwayo kwakuhlezi iStellenbosch FC ngawu-39 emuva kwemidlalo engu-22. Lokhu kwakusho ukuthi idinga amaphuzu angu-11 emidlalweni eyisishiyagalombili ukuwina iligi. Nokho kule sizini itshe ligaya ngomunye umhlathi kwiSundowns njengoba isembangweni oshisa phansi nePirates. Umqeqeshi weZimnyama u-Abdeslam Ouaddou, uthe kuhle ebholeni laseMzansi ukuthi alikho iqembu elivule igebe lamaphuzu esicongweni se-log. "I-PSL iyiligi eqinile, ikakhulukazi kule sizini. Sikubonile lokho, wumjaho webanga elide. Emjahweni awuwehlisi umgqigqo wokuwina ngakho emidlalweni esisalele sizokwenza konke okusemandleni, sibone okwenzekayo," kusho u-Ouaddou. "Siyabona ukuthi lithakaselwa kakhulu ibhola. Kuhle lokho ebholeni nakubalandeli. Uma iqembu lihamba phambili ngamaphuzu angu-15 phakathi nesizini, yini engakwenza uthande ukubuka imidlalo? Ngicabanga ukuthi yilokhu okufunwa ngabalandeli. Ngamaqembu amabili adlala kahle alwayo. Lokhu kuhle ebholeni laseNingizimu Afrika." NogLwesibili kungenzeka kulalwe iSundowns isivule igebe lamaphuzu amathathu njengoba izobhekana ne-Orbit Collenge e-Olympia Park, eRustenburg, ngo-7.30 ebusuku. IPirates izothola ithuba lokulinganisa uma isigijimisana neRichards Bay FC e-Orlando Amstel Arena ngoLwesithathu ebusuku. Njengoba amaBrazilians eseyoqhubeka nemidlalo yeCaf Champions League, iPirates izothola ithuba lokuyikweletisa. Nakuba iPirates ihlezi esicongweni se-log kodwa ngesonto eledlule, umqeqeshi weLamontville Golden Arrows, uManqoba Mngithi uthe ubona iSundowns izophinda isidle isicoco seligi. Emasontweni adlule, lokhu kushiwo ngu-Eric Tinkler oqeqesha iSekhukhune United.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX UMQEQESHI wePolokwane City, uPhuti Mohafe, uyayingabaza i-Orlando Pirates embangweni wesicoco seligi yeBetway Premiership. UMohafe ubekhuluma emuva kokuthi ezakhe zikhale ngaphansi ngo 2-1 kweZimnyama e-Old Peter Mokaba Stadium, ePolokwane, ngoLwesithathu ebusuku. Amagoli ePirates ashaywe nguRelebohile Mofokeng noPatrick Maswanganyi. EleRise and Shine libekwe enethini nguBonginkosi Dlamini. IPirates isesicongweni se-log ngamaphuzu angu-44 lapho ibambene khona neMamelodi Sundowns esele ngegoli kuleli qembu laseSoweto. Ukuhlala embangweni kwePirates kwenyuse ithemba kubalandeli bayo abakholwa wukuthi izoyiketula iSundowns esiwine iligi amahlandla ayisishiyagalombili elandelana. Nokho uMohafe uyihlabile indlela ezidlala ngayo eZimnyama, wathi kungenzeka ziphinde ziyikhombe iligi. "Angiyiboni iPirates iba ngompetha beligi yePremiership. Angibaboni bewina iligi uma bedlala ngendlela abadlale ngayo namuhla,"kusho uMohafe. "Anginaso isiqiniseko, mhlawumbe iqhinga lethu lisebenzile, mhlawumbe sibahlelele kahle. Bathwale kanzima kithina. Kodwa ngokwendlela abadlale ngayo namuhla, angibaboni beba ngompetha." UMohafe ukhuluma kanjena nje, iPirates ihlulwe yinqwaba yamagoli abengenza ihlale ngokunethezeka esicongweni.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UMDLALI weKaizer Chiefs, uGlody Lilepo ecela indlela ku-Omega Mdaka weStellenbosch FC emdlalweni weBetway Premiership eFNB Stadium, eNasrec, ngoLwesibili ebusuku Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX IKAIZER Chiefs iphunyukwe yithuba lokubhekana ne-Orlando Pirates ishayela phezulu ngokwehlulwa yiStellenbosch FC emdlalweni weBetway Premiership eFNB Stadium, eNasrec, ngoLwesibili ebusuku. IChiefs ihambe phambili ngegoli likaFlavio da Silva esiwombeni sokuqala emdlalweni obekubukeka izowunqoba ngendlela ebigeleza ngayo. Nokho bakucishe konke lokho uLangelihle Phili noDevin Titus beshayela iStellies amagoli esiwombeni sesibili. Ngaphandle kokuthi iChiefs iphunyukwe yithuba lokwenyukela endaweni yesithathu kwi-log yePremiership, ukuwina bekuzoyenza ibhekane nePirates emdlalweni wabakhaya eFNB Stadium ngoMgqibelo inomfutho. IPirates isazikhotha amanxeba kulandela ukukhala ngaphansi kwiCasric Stars emdlalweni we-Last 16 yeNedbank Cup ngempelasonto edlule. Lokhu kusho ukuthi inengcindezi yokwehlula iChiefs ukuze izobuyisa ithemba kubalandeli kwazise isishaywe emidlalweni emibili ilandelana. Ngemuva kowehlulwa yiStellies, umqeqeshi weChiefs uKhalil Ben Youssef, uthe bekufanele baqede ngeStellies esiwombeni sokuqala. "Uma uwuphethe umdlalo esiwombeni sokuqala, kufanele uqede. Uma ungakwenzi lokho kwenzeka lokhu okwenzeke kwesesibili. Ngicabanga ukuthi kufanele siwavume amaphutha kwesinye isikhathi. Kufanele sixolile kubalandeli. Sinezinsuku ezintathu ukucabanga ngomdlalo olandelayo. Uma uthola amathuba ayisikhombisa uwashweba wonke, ngisho kungekho muntu epalini uhlulwa wukushaya igoli, sizokwenzani emuva kwalokho?," kusho uBen Youssef oqeqesha ngokubambisana noCedric Kaze. Laba baqeqeshi bazohlala ebhentshini kowabakhaya okokuqala engasekho uNasreddine Nabi abebengamaphini akhe. Ngesikhathi iChiefs igcina ukubhekana nePirates emdlalweni wamanqamu weNedbank Cup ngoMeyi, inqobe ngo 2-1.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UMDLALI omusha weStellenbosch, u-Olisa Ndah Image: Isithombe:STELLENBOSCH FC UMQEQESHI weStellenbosch FC uGavin Hunt ugxibhe iPremier Soccer League (PSL) ngokungsukumi ngendlela efanayo uma amaqembu ayo eyidinga ikakhulukazi ngasekubhalisweni kwabadlali abasha. UHunt ukusho lokhu kwiSuperSport ngesikhathi ebuzwa ngomdlali wakhe omusha u-Olisa Ndah osanda kubajoyina esuka kwi-Orlando Pirates. Lo mqeqeshi oseke wasebenza kwiChiefs phambilini ubekhuluma ngaphambi komdlalo weBetway Premiership nawo Amakhosi ngoLwesibili ebusuku e-FNB Stadium, eNasrec. “Kunezinto esengafunda ukungazixaki ngazo ngoba i-PSL kayisukumi ngendlela efanayo uma amaqembu angaphansi kwayo eyidinga ukuze asheshe abhalise abadlali abasha. Kumaqembu athile izinto zenzeka kalula kodwa kwamanye kuthatha isikhathi ekubeni kusobala ukuthi kasikho isidingo,” kusho uHunt ngaphandle kokuqagula amagama. Kusukela ngoDisemba, iStellies iqinise isikwati sayo ngabadlali abanamava okubalwa kubona uMosa Lebusa obedlalela iMamelodi Sundowns, Wayde Jooste owachithwa ngaMaZulu ekupheleni kwesizini edlule noTshegofatso Mabasa obeyibamba kwiPirates. Laba badlali uHunt uthembele kubona ukuthi basize ezakhe zisuke ngasemsileni we-log njengoba sezigxile kwiPremiership kulandela ukukhishwa kwiCaf Confederation Cup.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UMSHAYISIBHAKELA waseMpangeni, uTholumusa 'Mfundisi' Ngema nesikhulu seBoxing South Africa, uMandla Ntlanganiso Image: Isithombe:FACEBOOK UHLOSE ukubuyisa isithunzi sebhande laKwaZulu-Natal uphromotha wesibhakela, uSandile Vilakazi, oqoke ukuthi libangwe abashayisibhakela abangomakadebona. UVilakazi ongumphathi weSiyathaba Boxing Promotions, uhlele izimpi ezizoba ngoFebhuwari 28, e-APN Portuguese Hall, eThekwini. Impi yosuku izoba ngeyebhande leKZN Featherweight phakathi kukaTholumusa "Mfundisi" Ngema (6-3-3) waseMpangeni noSithembiso Maduna (13-6-0) waseMnambithi. Bobabili laba bashayisibhakela sebebuya ezimpini zamabhande aseMzansi nawaphesheya kwezilwandle lapho bexhimfane khona nezimbangi ezaziwayo kwezamankomane. Ngaphezu kwalokho, akhona amabhande asebeke bawawina okubalwa kuwona awesifundazwe. Okufanayo ngalaba bashayisibhakela ukuthi babobili babhekane nembangi eyodwa, uKhanyisani Mbokazi waseMandeni, ezimpini zabo zakamuva. UMaduna ukhale ngaphansi kuMbokazi ngo-Okthoba nyakenye, Eshowe. UNgema wagcina ukungena eringini ngoMashi 2024 ekhala ngaphansi kuMbokazi eMtshezi. UVilakazi uthe uqoke ukuqhatha uMaduna noNgema ngoba efuna ukubuyisa izimpi ezidonsa abantu esibhakeleni saseKZN. "Ngifuna ukukhombisa ukuthi ibhade laseKZN linaso isithunzi, yingakho ngiqhatha abashayisibhakela abanesipiliyoni. Kufanele kucace ukuthi ibhande lesifundazwe akuyona into enikwa abashayisibhakela abasezingeni eliphansi. Lisenaso isithunzi. Ngifuna ukubuyisa loya mbango wokufuna ukukhipha inkunzi kubashayisibhakela basesifundazweni. Yikho ngikhethe abashayisibhakela asebeqinile," kusho uVilakazi. Ngaphandle kwempi kaMaduna noNgema, kukhona enye ebhekwe ngabaningi ezoba phakathi kukamakadebona, uPrince Dlomo (17-15-1) waseMgungundlovu owayengumpetha we-SA Junior Welterweight noPhumelele Ngcobo (4-0-0) wasePinetown, osekuyikluma kwezamankomane. UDlomo waphatha ibhande laseMzansi phakathi kuka-2021 no-2023, walivikela amahlandla ambalwa kubashayisibhakela abahlonishwayo okubalwa kubona uXolani Mcotheli wase-East London. Walephucwa nguNtethelelo Nkosi waseMtubatuba, emqingqa ngo-2023. "Ngifuna ukumhlola uPhumelele ukuthi usekuliphi izinga ngesibhakela. Le mpi izokwenza ngikubone lokho ngoba uzolwa nebhokisa ebelingumpetha waseMzansi futhi elalivikela ibhande kaningi. Akusizi ukuhlala nebhokisa, ulokhu ulivikela ngokulinika izimpi ezilula. Akulisizi lokho. Sibheke ukuthi uPhumele asiphase lesi sivivinyo," kusho uVilakazi.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: ABADLALI beLamontville Golden Arrows bejabulela elinye lamagoli abawashaye ngesikhathi behlula iMamelodi Sundowns emdlalweni weDStv Diski Challenge ePolokwane, izolo Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX I-LAMONTVILLE Golden Arrows inyomfe izinhlelo zeMamelodi Sundowns iyehlula emdlalweni weDStv Diski Challenge eSeshego Stadium, ePolokwane, ngeSonto. Abafana Bes'thende abangenelwe yigoli kuqala, bagcine benqobe ngo 3-2. Ngalokhu baphazamise iSundowns obinethuba lokunciphisa igebe lamaphuzu phakathi kwayo ne-Orlando Pirates esesicongweni se-log yeDiski ebingadlali. EZimnyama eziqhwakele ngamaphuzu angu-44 emidlalweni engu-18, zithole "iholidi" ngenxa yokuthi bekufanele zidlale neStellenbosch FC ebiyofihla umdlali wayo oshone emasontweni adlule. Lokhu kusho ukuthi zizobuya lisenjalo igebe lamaphuzu ayisihlanu ezilivule phakathi kwazo neSundowns esendaweni yesibili ngawu-39 emidlalweni engu-19. Njengoba sekusobala ukuthi umbango wesicoco seligi uzoba phakathi kweSundowns, Pirates, iSiwelele neStellies, kuzocaca ekugcineni ukuthi amaBrazilians azowakhalela yini amaphuzu ehluleke ukubathola kwi-Arrows emdlalweni obekubhekwe ukuthi iwunqobe. Ukungadlali kweStellies kuholele ekutheni yeqiwe yiSiwelele ecoshe amaphuzu agcwele kwiPolokwane City emdlalweni ewunqobe ngo 3-0. ISiwelele isinyukele endaweni yesithathu kwi-log ngamaphuzu angu-34 emidlalweni engu-19. IStellies, eshaya ngabadlali abasha kule sizini, yehlele endaweni yesine ngawu-34. IKaizer Chiefs, ebolekise ngenqwaba yabadlali ewine ngabo iligi ngesizini edlule, iphinde yathola isibhaxu. Ikhale ngaphansi ngo 1-0 kuMaZulu ePolokwane, izolo. Imiphumela yemidlalo yeDStv Diski Challenge: Magesi 0-2 Marumo Gallants; Sekhukhune United 3-0 Orbit College; Polokwane City 0-3 Siwelele; Richards Bay 1-0 Durban City; TS Galaxy 2-0 Chippa United; AmaZulu 1-0 Kaizer Chiefs; Golden Arrows 3-2 Mamelodi Sundowns

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: ABADLALI beKaizer Chiefs uGlody Lilepo noMduduzi Shabalala bejabula noFlavio Da Silva oshaye igoli lokuqala ngesikhathi behlula i-Al Masry emdlalweni weCaf Confederation Cup ePeter Mokaba Stadium, ePolokwane, ngeSonto Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX UMQEQESHI weKaizer Chiefs, uKhalil Ben Youssef, udalule ukuthi kudingeke bahlale phansi nabadlali ngabodwa ukuze bakudlulise ukwehlulwa kwabo yiStellenbosch FC kwiNedbank Cup ngaphambi kokubhekana ne-Al Masry yase-Egypt kwiCaf Confederation Cup. IChiefs yehlule i-Al Masry ngo 2-1 emdlalweni wesihlanu kaGroup D, yahlala esicongweni  ngamaphuzu angu-10. Isidinga ukubuya nephuzu kwiZamalek emdlalweni wokusonga isigaba samaqoqo ekuhambeni ngeSonto ukuze idlulele kuma-quarterfinal. IChiefs idlale ne-Al Masry ikade iphoxe abalandeli bayo maphakathi nesonto eledlule ikhishwa yiStellies kwi-Last 32 yeNedbank Cup okuwumqhudelwano ewunqobile ngesizini edlule. UKhalil opheka iChiefs ngokubambisana noCedric Kaze, uthe basebenze kanzima ukuze abadlali badlale oweCaf sebesesimeni esihle ngokomqondo. "Bekuwumdlalo onzima kithina ngoba besithole umphumela omubi. Bekunzima emiqondweni kubadlali futhi sithathe isikhathi eside sixoxa nabadlali ngabodwana sibagqugquzela. Manje sesiwuqedile umdlalo futhi siseqhulwini eqoqweni. Ukuze sidlulele phambili sidinga ukuya e-Egypt siyolwela amaphuzu amathathu noma elilodwa. Bonke abadlali bayabazi ubumqoka balo mdlalo. Sidlala yonke imidlalo njengeyamanqamu. Kufanele siqhubeke nokusebenza kanzima, sibuye sidlulele kuma-quarterfinal," kusho uKhalil. Ukuphuma kweChiefs kwiNedbank kusho ukwehla komthwalo kuleli qembu elilwela ukuzuza okungcono kule sizini. Amakhosi asezogxila kwiConfederation Cup nakwiBetway Premiership. UKhalil ukhale ngokuxinwa ngemidlalo kwaMakhosi ekubeni kukhona amaqembu athize abecatshangelwa ngesikhathi edlala imidlalo yeCaf ngesizini edlule. Uthe abasakwazi nokuziqeqesha ngenxa yokudlala njalo. "Simele iNingizimu Afrika…yini engiyicelayo? Sikwenzile lokhu ngesizini edlule, amanye amaqembu agcina ukudlala imidlalo eyisihlanu, eyisithupha ngoMeyi. Kule sizini sidlale imidlalo engu-15. Elinye iqembu engingeke ngilisho igama lalo lidlale engu-15 futhi alidlali (kwiCaf).Uma simele iKaizer Chiefs, simele iKaizer Chiefs kodwa uma simele iNingizimu Afrika, simele iNingizimu Afrika,"usho kanje.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UMDLALI weMamelodi Sundowns, uSiyabonga Mabena, ngomunye wabathwele leli qembu kwiDStv Diski Challenge Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX IMAMELODI Sundowns iqhubekile nokukhombisa ukuthi yilona iqembu okungathenjelwa kulona ekuphazamiseni i-Orlando Pirates eshosholozayo emjahweni weligi yeDStv Diski Challenge. ISundowns icoshe amaphuzu amathathu kwiSiwelele FC emdlalweni obuse-UJ Soweto Campus izolo, ewunqobe ngo 2-1. Lo mphumela uqinisekise ukuthi iSundowns isahleli endaweni yesibili kwi-log ngamaphuzu angu-36 emuva kwemidlalo engu-17. IPirates, exebule iSekhukhune United ngo 2-1, izihola phambili ngamaphuzu angu-43 emuva kwemidlalo engu-17. Ukuvula kwayo igebe lamaphuzu ayisikhombbisa esicongweni se-log akubuzwa ukuthi kuyibeka ebuhleni njengoba sekuqale umzuliswano wesibili wesizini yeDiski. Nokho, iSundowns isalokhu iqhubekile nokuhlala eduze, igade ukuqhuzuka kweZimnyama ezisemkhankasweni wokuwina iligi okokuqala emlandweni weDiski eyasungulwa ngo-2014. Nakuba iSundowns ibukeka izoyifaka ingcindezi iPirates kodwa kunzima ukuziba iStellenbosch esiyiwine kabili iligi yeDiski. Leli qembu, eliphekwa ngu-Evangelos Vellios, linyukele endaweni yesithathu kwi-log ngamaphuzu angu-34 ngemuva kokwehlula iMagesi ngo 4-1 e-Idas Valley, eStellenbosch, ngoMgqibelo. Akubuzwa ukuthi ukwenyuka kweStellies, esele ngamaphuzu amabili kwiSundowns, kuzoyinika ithemba lokuthi isengafika esicongweni uma kuqhuzuka iPirates ejwayele ukwehluleka ekugcineni. Womabili amaqembu alandela iPirates anaso isipiliyoni sokuwina iligi kodwa eZimnyama zishaya ngomqeqeshi, uRoscoe Krieling, owayiphakamisa indebe kwiSuperSport United eyiphini likaThabo Septhemba. Okudingwa yiPirates wukuqhubeka nokuqoqa amaphuzu ukuze ingaphindwa okujwayelekile, okuwukulahla iligi emidlalweni yokugcina yesizini. Imiphumela yemidlalo yeDStv Diski Challenge: Kaizer Chiefs 0-0 TS Galaxy; Orlando Pirates 2-1 Sekhukhune United; Stellenbosch FC 4-1 Magesi; Richards Bay FC 3-4 Golden Arrows; Chippa United 0-2 Durban City; Siwelele FC 1-2 Mamelodi Sundowns; Marumo Gallants 0-1 AmaZulu; Polokwane City 0-0 Orbit College.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UMDLALI wasezinhlangothini, uSanele Barns, obuyela kwiRichards Bay FC emuva kwesizini nesigamu egijima kwiStellenbosch FC Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX USIHLALO weRichards Bay, uSifiso "Jomo" Biyela, uveze ukuthi uSanele Barns ubevele efuna ukubuyela kuleli qembu elamdayisela iStellenbosch FC  ngo-2024. Lo mdlali oyibamba ezinhlangothini, wadayiswa yiBay ngo-R5 million maphakathi nesizini ka-2023/2025 kodwa waze wayifulathela emuva kokuyivikisa izembe ngokunqoba imidlalo yokuhlunga eyayidlala namaqembu eMotsepe Foundation Championship kulandela ukuqeda endaweni ka-15 kwi-log yeBetway Premiership. Emuva komdlalo wokugcina eyawudlala neBaroka eKing Zwelithini Stadium, eMlaza, uBarns wenganywa wusizi evalelisa kubalandeli beBay. UBiyela uveze ukuthi bebefuna ukumboleka uBarns kwiStellies kodwa leli qembu lafuna ukubadayisela okuyinto abayivumile. "Sesibheke ekutheni simthenge ngoba le nto yokuboleka abadlali iyahlupha. Sifuna umdlali azazi ukuthi ukuphi, abe ngowethu ukuze sibashaye ngaye uma befika lapha," kusho uBiyela. KwiStellies, uBarns udlale imidlalo engu-68, washaya amagoli ayisikhombisa, wakha ayisithupha emiqhudelwaneni ehlukene. Ekuqaleni kwesizini iBay isayinise inqwaba yabadlali abasebancane, yanyusa nabebedlala kwiDStv Diski Challenge abangenaso isipiliyoni sokudlala kwiPremiership. UBiyela uthe kuzobasiza ukubuya kukaBarns. "Ubelokhu esho ukuthi ufuna ukubuyela eqenjini. Nathi sikuvumile lokho ngoba vele akahambanga ngoba engumdlali obhedayo kodwa sasinezinkinga zemali ngaleso sikhathi. Ngaphandle kokuthi ungumdlali osezingeni eliphezulu, ungumuntu okukuhle ukuba naye eqenjini. Uzosisiza kakhulu ngesipiliyoni sakhe ngoba sinabadlali abasebancane eqenjini," kusho uBiyela. IBay isendaweni yesishiyagalolunye kwi-log yePremiership ngamaphuzu angu-18 emidlalweni engu-15. Izobhekana neLamontville Golden Arrows emdlalweni wePremiership wabakhaya baKwaZulu-Natal eMhlathuze Sports Complex, eRichards Bay, ngo-7.30 ebusuku.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX I-MILFORD FC neCape Town City bazibekisele indawo kumaPSL Promotion Play-Offs ngokuthola amaphuzu amqoka abebewadinga emidlalweni yokusonga isizini ka-2025/26 yeMotsepe Foundation Championship edlalwe izolo, ezinkundleni ezahlukene. IMilford ibambane ngo 0-0 neHungry Lions eMxolisi Dicky Jacobs Stadium, e-Upington, ngenkathi iCity ibhaxabula iLeceisterford City ngo 4-2 eDobsonville Sadium, eSoweto. IMilford ibidinga iphuzu kulo mdlalo wayo neLions ukuqinisekisa indawo yayo kumaPlay-Offs. Iqede isizini isendaweni yesithathu ngamaphuzu awu-54 okuyisibalo esifanayo neseCity eqede endaweni yesibili ngenxa yomehluko wamagoli. ICasric Stars nayo ebingelinye lamaqembu abesembangweni wokuzibekisela indawo kumaPlay-Offs, akuyisebenzelanga ukunqoba kwayo ngo 3-1 kwiGomora United eSolomon Mahlangu Stadium, KwaMhlanga. IKruger United edlale ngokulingana ibambana ngo 2-2 ne-The Bees, KaNyamazane Stadium, eNelspruit, inikwe ngokusemthethweni indebe yayo nezindondo ngokuba ngompetha baka-2025/26 beMotsepe Championship. Ngesizini ezayo isiyogijima kwiBetway Premiership ICity neMilford sebelinde iqembu lePremiership abazodlala nalo kumaPlay-Offs azoqala ngoMeyi 26, asongwe ngoJuni 13. Leli qembu kulindeleke ukuthi liphume emaqenjini amane emuva kwemidlalo yokusonga isizini yePremiership ngoMgqibelo, okuyi okuyiMagesi FC, Orbit College, Marumo Gallants neChippa United. IMilford eqeqeshwa nguXanti Pupuma, kungokokuqala izibekisela indawo kumaPlay-Offs. Nakuba igcine iphunyukwe yisicoco seligi ngemuva kokuhlala esicongweni se-log isikhathi eside kodwa akubuzwa ukuthi kuzoyithoba ukuthola elinye ithuba ngamaPlay-Offs. Leli qembu laseRichards Bay lihambe ibanga elide emqhudelwaneni weNedbank Cup, laguqiswa yi-TS Galaxy kowandulela owamanqamu. Ukuphumelela kweStallions ukungena kwiPremiership kuyobe sekusho ukwanda kwesibalo samaqembu aseBay kulesi sigaba esikhulu kwazise iRichards Bay FC yilona kuphela iqembu lakule ndawo elisayibambe kulesi sigaba. Ngakolunye uhlangothi, i-The Citizens eqeqeshwa uJan Vreman negqishe ngeningi labadlali abanamava amaPlay-Offs, yithuba layo lokuzabalazela ukubuyela kwiPremiership njengoba ngesizini edlule igawulwe yizembe idlala wona amaPlay-Offs kulandela ukuqeda kwayo endaweni ka-15 kwi-log. Imiphumela yeMotsepe Foundation Championship: Casric Stars 3-1 Gomora United; Kruger United 2-2 The Bees; Leicesterford City 2-4 Cape Town City; Hungry Lions 0-0 Milford FC; Venda FC 1- 2 Highbury; Lerumo Lions 4-0 Black Leopards; University of Pretoria 6-2 Midlands Wanderers; Baroka FC 0-0 Upington City

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UNOZINTI weKaizer Chiefs osefomini enhle othishwa ngumqeqeshi waleli qembu ngokufanele ukubizwa eqenjini lesizwe eliya kwiNdebe yoMhlaba yeFifa UMQEQESHI weKaizer Chiefs, uCedric Kaze, uphumele obala ngokuchoma uphaphe lwegwalagwala unozinti wakhe, uBrandon Petersen, akholwa wukuthi kumfanele ukungena endizeni yeqembu lesizwe, iBafana Bafana, ebheke koweNdebe yoMhlaba ngenyanga ezayo. UKaze ukusho lokhu ngemuva kokuba uPetersen ephinde washaya into ecokeme ezintini, wagcina oqokwe njengomdlali ovelele iChiefs iguqisa AmaZulu ngo 1-0 emdlalweni weBetway Premiership ngoMgqibelo, eMoses Mabhida Stadium, eThekwini. UPetersen (31) osefomini enhle kule sizini, akangenelwanga yigoli emidlalweni ewu-18 kwengu-35 kuyo yonke imiqhudelwano kule sizini. Yize uKaze eqale ngokukucacisa ukuthi akafuni ukugxambukela ekuqokeni abadlali komqeqeshi weBafana, uHugo Broos, kodwa uthe ukholwa wukuthi uPetersen kumfanele ukubizwa eqenjini lesizwe ngenxa yefomu yakhe enhle kule sizini. “Angifuni ukuphawula ngokuthi yibaphi abadlali okufanele babizwe nabangafanele babizwe ngoba sizokwazi maduze ngabazobizwa futhi umqeqeshi weBafana Bafana uyakwazi akudingayo eqenjini lakhe,” kusho uKaze, oqeqesha ngokubambisana noKhalil Ben Youssef. Maduze kulindeleke uBroos amemezele isikwati sokugcina okuyisona azogadla ngaso kwiNdebe yoMhlaba ezoqala ngoJuni 11 kuya kuJulayi 19 e-USA, Canada naseMexico. “Nathi sidinga ukumnika ithuba lokukhetha abadlali abafunayo ngendlela engafihliwe. Ngifisa ukubona uBrandon Petersen eya kwiNdebe yoMhlaba ngoba kumfanele ngenxa yokwenza kahle kwakhe futhi ulokhu eqhubeka nokuba sefomini eyodwa isizini yonke,” kuqhuba uKaze. Ebuzwa ukuthi yini eshintshile ngalo nozinti kule sizini, uthe ukudlala kwakhe njalo kumsize kakhulu kule sizini. Uphinde wancoma indlela yokuziphatha kwalo nozinti ngisho nangaphandle kwenkundla ngaphambi kokuba ngumdlali ozinikelayo enkundleni. “Ngingasho ngithi yilokho okushintshile kuyena (ukudlala njalo) kule sizini ngoba akadlalanga imidlalo eminingi ngesizini edlule. Udlalile kowamanqamu eNedbank Cup (ngesizini edlule), kule sizini udlale imidlalo eminingi futhi ungumdlali osebenza ngokuzikhandla, oziqeqesha zonke izinsuku ngomoya ofanayo nomfutho ofanayo futhi ngiyathanda ukusho kubadlali ukuthi izinto ezinhle zenzeka kubantu abenza kahle. Ngijabule ngokwenzeka kuyena futhi kumfanele konke lokhu okwenzekayo kuyena," kusho uKaze. Amakhosi asezibekisele indawo kwiCaf Confederation Cup ngesizini ezayo, azosonga isizini ngokudlala neChippa United ngoMgqibelo, ngo-3 ntambama eMoses Mabhida Stadium.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithome OYISIQONGQWANE sasemuva kwiBafana Bafana, uMbekezeli Mbokazi, ungomunye wabadlali abamqoka leli qembu elizothembela kubona kwiNdebe yoMhlaba ka-2026 e-USA, Mexico naseCanada OWAYENGUMDLALI wasesiswini kwiBafana Bafana, uBennet Mnguni, ukholwa wukuthi leli qembu linalo ithuba lokuqopha umlando ngokudlula esigabeni samaqoqo okokuqala kusukela iNingizimu Afrika yaqala ukudlala kwiNdebe yoMhlaba yeFifa. IBafana ezodlala okwesine koweNdebe yoMhlaba kusukela ngo-1998, iqhathwe neMexico, South Korea ne-Czech Republic kuGroup A kulo mqhudelwano ezobanjelwa e-USA, Mexico naseCanada kusukela ngoJuni 11 kuya kuJulayi 19. Izodlala neMexico kowokuvula ngoJuni 11, e-Estadio Azteca, eMexico City. Kusukela iBafana idlala okokuqala kwiNdebe yoMhlaba ngo-1998, eFrance, ayikaze idlule esigabeni samaqoqo. Kanti ngo-2010 kwiNdebe yoMhlaba eyayidlalelwa eMzansi, yaqopha umlando omubi wokuba yizwe lokuqala emlandweni weNdebe yoMhlaba elaphuma esigabeni samaqoqo. “Ngicabanga ukuthi leli qembu leBafana Bafana eliqeqeshwa nguHugo Broos linabadlali abasezingeni nabanamava okuzibamba ziqine kwiNdebe yoMhlaba yakulo nyaka. Ngokwami iqoqo esikulona akulona iqoqo elinzima kangako ukuthi singakwazi ukudlula esigabeni samaqoqo. Angiyithathi kancane iCzech Republic neSouth Korea kodwa ngokwami akuwona amazwe anomlando ophathekayo kwiNdebe yoMhlaba, ngakho leli yithuba lethu lokuqopha umlando ngokuthi sidlule okokuqala esigabeni samaqoqo. Kanti nayo iMexico akulona izwe eselike lasinika inkinga,” kusho uMnguni owayeseqenjini leBafana eladlala kwiNdebe yoMhlaba eyayiseKorea-Japan ngo-2002. “Okuhle ngaleli qembu likaHugo Broos wukuthi selidlale ndawonye isikhathi eside futhi likwazile nokudlala kwi-Africa Cup of Nations iminyaka ilandelana obekuyinto ebaluleke kakhulu. Ngaphandle kwalokho sinabadlali beSundowns (Mamelodi) abadlalile kwiFifa Club World Cup, ethi ayibe sezingeni elifanayo neleNdebe yoMhlaba. Leli yiqembu engingabazi ukuthi lizokwenza okungcono kunamanye amaqembu esizwe aphambilini, elikwaze ukuzibekisela indawo kwiNdebe yoMhlaba ngezikhwepha zalo okokuqala kusukela ngo-2010.” IBafana isadlale kanye neCzech Republic emlandweni emdlalweni owawungo-1997 kwiFifa Confederations Cup, zabambana ngo 2-2. Ayikaze idlale neSouth Korea, kanti isadlale amahlandla amathathu neMexico, yanqoba kabili, yadlala ngokulingana kanye koweNdebe yoMhlaba ka-2010.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UDECLAN Rice ongomunye wabadlali abamqoka kwi-Arsenal esethubeni lokuqeda ishobolo lamasizini awu-21 esicoco se-English Premier League YIZE besekubukeka i-Arsenal FC isiphunyukwe yisicoco se-English Premier League ibhinciselwe nxanye yizimbangi iManchester City, kodwa ukulahla amaphuzu kweCity ibambana ne-Everton ngeledlule kuphinde kwanika leli qembu laseLondon elinye ithuba. Njengoba womabili la maqembu ehlukaniswe ngamaphuzu amabili, i-Arsenal iqhwakele ngawu-79, iCity isendaweni yesibili ngawu-77. Imidlalo emibili esele yiyona esizocacisa ukuthi isicoco siya eLondon noma eManchester. Kusukela iguqiswe yizimbangi, iMan City ngo 2-1 ngo-Ephreli 19, i-Arsenal ivuke yazithatha njengoba isiyinqobe yomithathu ilandelana imidlalo eyidlalile okubalwa noweWest Ham ewunqobe ngo 1-0 ngeSonto eledlule. Isalelwe yimidlalo emibili ezoyidlala neBurnley, edlalelwa ngumgadli weBafana Bafana uLyle Foster, neCrystal Palace. Izodlala neBurnley ngoMsombuluko ngo-9 ebusuku e-Emirates Stadium, eLondon. Isonge nePalace ngoMeyi 24 eSelhurst Park. ICity ezodlala owamanqamu weFA Cup namuhla ngo-4 ntambama eWembley Stadium, eLondon, isalelwe yimidlalo yePremier League ezoyidlala neBournemouth ne-Aston Villa. Izodlala neBournemouth ngoLwesibili ngo-8.30 ebusuku. Ukuhlala amaphuzu kwe-The Gunners emidlalweni emqoka kwenza kubhekwe ngabomvu ukuthi izokwazi yini ukuzibamba ziqine kule midlalo emibili esele igweme ukuphoxeka. Yize izobhekana neBurnley esivele igawulwe yizembe kodwa kungaba wukuzigwaza ngowayo ukuthatha kancane leli qembu okungangatshazwa ukuthi abadlali balo bazodlalela isithunzi nokuzidayisa emaqenjini ePremier League kule midlalo esele. Ngisho nomqeqeshi we-The Gunners, uMikel Arteta, uyavuma ukuthi ukushaywa kwezakhe yiMan City yikho kanye okubavuse emaqandeni. “Sisebenzise lokho kwehlulwa kwethu (yiMan City) njengesifundo nanjengesikhuthazi ekuqondeni umsebenzi esesiwenzile kuze kube yilesi sikhathi sesizini,” kuso u-Arteta, ecashunwa e-AFP. I-The Gunners osekube ngamasizini amathathu kusukela ngeka-2022/23 ilala isibili kwi-log yePremier League, ngaphansi kobuholi buka-Arteta inenselelo yokuqeda isomiso samasizini awu-21 sokungayinqobi iligi yePremier League. Yagcina ukuyinqoba ngesizini ka-2003/04. Imidlalo ye-English Premiership: Manchester United v Nottingham Forest Brentford FC v Crystal Palace; Everton v Sunderland; Leeds United v Brighton; Wolverhampton v Fulham Newcastle United v West Ham NgoMsombuluko - Ngo-9pm: NgoLwesibili - Ngo-8.30pm: Bournemouth v Manchester City Chelsea v Tottenham Hotspur

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UMGADLI weMilford FC, uSiphosethu Ndlabi, ezakhe ezidinga ukunqoba emdlalweni wokusonga isizini  yeMotsepe Championshio neHungry Lions kusasa ukuzibekisela indawo kum-PSL Promotion Play-Offs UMGADLI weMilford FC, uSiphosethu Ndlabi, ugcizelela ukubaluleka kokunqoba umdlalo wabo wokusonga isizini yeMotsepe Foundation Championship neHungry Lions ukuze bazibekisele indawo kuma-PSL Promotion Play-Offs. IMilford izotholana phezulu neLions komunye wemidlalo yeMotsepe Foundation Championship ngo-3 ntambama eMxolisi Dicky Jacobs Stadium, e-Upington. Okwenza umdlalo weLions neMilford ubhekwe ngabomvu wukuthi womabili la maqembu asembangweni wokuzibekisela indawo kumaPlay-Offs okulwela ukukhuphukela kwiBetway Premiership. IKruger United izogcotshwa ngokusemthethweni njengompetha baka-2025/26 beMotsepe Championship kusasa ngemuva komdlalo wayo ne-The Bees, KaNyamazane Stadium, KaNyamazane. IMilford, Lions, Cape Town City, neCasric Stars, yiwona maqembu asenethuba lokuzibekisela indawo kumaPlay-Offs neqembu elizoqeda endaweni ka-15 kwi-log yePremiership azodlalwa ngoMeyi 26 kuya kuJuni 13. IMilford isendaweni yesibili ngamaphuzu awu-53, iCity isendaweni yesithathu ngawu-51 ngokulinganayo neLions enawu-51, kweyesihlanu yiCasric ngawu-49. Leli qembu laseRichards Bay lidinga amaphuzu amathathu noma elilodwa emdlalweni walo wakusasa neLions ukuzibekisela indawo kumaPlay-Offs. IStallions, efinyelele kowandulela owamanqamu eNedbank Cup, uma igcina ngokuzibekisela indawo kumaPlay-Offs kuzobe kungokokuqala kusukela ngesizini ka-2023/24 okwakuyisizini yayo yokuqala kulesi sigaba kulandela ukuthenga isitifiketi seMotsepe Championship kuThongathi FC. “Sihlale isikhathi eside esicongweni se-log kodwa sagcina siphunyukwe yisicoco, ngakho akusasizi ukukhalela ubisi oluchithekile manje. Okumqoka kithina wukulwela ukubuya namaphuzu aphelele e-Upington kwiHungry Lions ukuze sikwazi ukuyodlala kumaPlay-Offs. AmaPlay-Offs sekuyilona themba lethu lokulwela ukungena kwiBetway Premiership,” kusho uNdlabi, odabuka eMmangweni, eLusikisiki. “Siyazi ukuthi sizobhekana nomdlalo onzima kwiHungry Lions nayo edinga amaphuzu njengathi njengoba nayo ilwela ukuyodlala amaPlay-Offs kodwa sizibophezele ngokulwela ukuwunqoba lo mdlalo. Yize sazi ukuthi ukudlala ngokulingana nakho kusengasiphumelelisa ukuyodlala amaPlay-Offs kodwa esizibophezele kukho wukuyolwela ukunqoba ngoba kungasithikameza kusifake engozini ukungena enkundleni sizitshele ukuthi siyodlalela ukudlala ngokulingana.” Ngaphandle komdlalo weMilford neLions, eminye imidlalo ebhekiwe ngoweCity neLeicesterford City eDobsonville Stadium, eSoweto, noweCasric neGomora United, eSolomon Mahlangu Stadium, KwaMhlanga. Imidlalo yeMotsepe Foundation Championship: Casric Stars v Gomora United (Solomon Mahlangu Stadium); Kruger United v The Bees (KaNyamazane Stadium); Leicesterford City v Cape Town City (Dobsonville Stadium); Hungry Lions v Milford FC (Mxolisi Dicky Jacobs Stadium); Venda FC v Highbury FC (Thohoyandou Stadium); Lerumo Lions v Black Leopards (North West University Stadium); University of Pretoria v Midlands Wanderers (Tuks Stadium); Baroka FC v Upington City (Global Stadium

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UMQEQESHI waMaZulu FC, u-Arthur Zwane, owathathwa exhawulana nowe-Orlando Pirates, u-Abdeslam Ouaddou UMQEQESHI waMaZulu FC, u-Arthur Zwane, ubona kuyifanele i-Orlando Pirates ukuthola umvuzo ngenxa yokuphikelela kwayo embangweni wesicoco seligi yeBetway Premiership iminyaka ilandelana. IPirates esiqede endaweni yesibili ngemuva kweMamelodi Sundowns amasizini amathathu elandelana kusukela ngeka-2022/2023, idinga amaphuzu amathathu kwiDurban City e-Orlando Amstel Arena, eSoweto, kusasa ngo-3 ntambama, ukuze izowina iligi eyayigcina ngesizini ka-2011/2012. ISundowns iwine isicoco seligi amasizini ayisishiyagalombili elandelana. “Yebo, kusengenzeka noma yini kodwa e-Orlando akubuyi lubuyayo. Kwesinye isikhathi kufanele sincome lapho okufanele sincome khona. Abantu uma beya laphaya e-Orlando bathola amagoli amahlanu, abanye ayisithupha, nathi sithole amathathu,” kusho uZwane sakuncokola. “Bakwelinye izinga (iPirates) uma bedlalela kuleya nkundla. Uma ubheka kula masizini amathathu edlule bebelokhu bengqongqoza, beqeda endaweni yesibili kwi-log. "Esikubona manje kwi-PSL kuyafana nesikubona e-England. Mina qobo lwami angiyilandeli i-Arsenal kodwa engingakutshela khona njengomqeqeshi wukuthi ngenxa yokuzinikela nokushabasheka kwe-Arsenal kuyifanele ukuwina iligi. "Kodwa njengomqeqeshi oqeqesha lapha kwi-PSL, angikwazi ukusho ukuthi ubani nobani kufanele awine ngoba ngingumqeshi nami olwela ukuzuza okuthile neqembu engiliqeqeshayo.” AmaZulu azotholana phezulu neKaizer Chiefs kusasa ngo-3 ntambama, eMoses Mabhida Stadium, eThekwini. Usuthu ngokwezibalo ngeke lusakwazi ukugudluza iChiefs endaweni yesithathu eyisango lokungena kwiCaf Confederation Cup. Selulwela ukungagudluki endaweni yesine. “Nakuba sigcine ngisakwazanga ukuqeda endaweni yesithathu kodwa uma ubheka umsebenzi esiwenzile njengeqembu laMaZulu, simangaze abaningi ngalesi sikwati esisihlanganisile ngabadlali iningi labo ebelingenawo amava okudlala kwiPremiership, abanye babo abebedlala ezigabeni zama-amesha.  Anginandaba ukuthi ubani uthini, ngingabafela laba bafana ngenxa yomsebenzi abawenzile kule sizini. Okusemqoka manje wukulwela ukugcina indawo yethu yesine kwi-log okungumgomo ebesivele sizibekele wona njengeqembu isizini iqala,” kuqhuba uZwane ophonsele inselelo abadlali bakhe ngomdlalo abazowudlala neChiefs. “Kuzofanele bakhiphe amangwevu, bakhombise ukuthi bazimisele ukunqoba ngoba imidlalo yalolu hlobo yiyona eyakha abadlali, ibaqinise ukhakhayi. Sizobe sidlalela ekhaya, osekunesikhathi sagcina ukuhlulwa sidlala khona.”

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe USIYABONGA Mbongo waMajimbos ebanga ibhola noMouhamed Wagne weSenegal emdlalweni we-Afcon Under 17 eMohammed VI Complex, eRabat, ngoLwesine LIVULE ngonyawo oluhle liqoqa amaphuzu aphelele iqembu lesizwe lika-Under 23, Amajimbos, liguqisa iSenegal emdlalweni ka-Group D we-Africa Cup of Nations (Afcon) Under 17 ngoLwesine kusihlwa eComplex Mohammed VI Pitch 3, eRabat, eMorocco. ISenegal yiyona ebone inethi kuqala ngesiwombe sokuqala ngegoli elivalelwe phakathi uCheik Thior ngomzuzu ka-44. Nokho Amajimbos abuye ngesivuthevuthe ngesiwombe sesibili u-Inganathi Simama eshaya elokulinganisa ngomzuzu ka-48. Ukucindezela kwaMajimbos kuthele izithelo ethola igoli lesibili ngomzuzu ka-55 umkhonto ugwaza ekhaya uThior ezama ukususa umhlola ekhaya. Amajimbos aqhathwe neSenegal, Algeria neGhana kuGroup D. Azobuyela ensimini ngokubhekana ne-Algeria ngeSonto ngo-5 ntambama kulo mqhudelwano we-Afcon U-17 oqale ngoLwesithathu, ozosongwa ngoJuni 2. Kulo mqhudelwano waseMorocco, Amajimbos adinga ukufinyelela kuma-quarterfinal ukuze ezophinda azibekisele indawo koweNdebe yoMhlaba ka-Under 17 ezodlalelwa eQatar, ngoNovemba 19 kuya kuDisemba 13. Nanyakenye leli qembu laMajimbos lafinyelela kowamanqamu kwi-Afcon eyayiseMorocco, lapho laguqiswa khona ngosokhaya ngo 3-1. Sekungumlando ukuthi iqembu laseMorocco yilona elagcina lidla isicoco se-Afcon ngokuguqisa iMali ngo 4-2 sekukhahlelwa amaphenathi.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe ABADLALI bamaqembu ehlukene eHollywoodbets Super League, kwethulwa isizini entsha ka-2026 yeSuper League eSABC Studio, eGoli, izolo KUBUKEKA uzokwehla umthwalo wezindleko zokuhambela imidlalo emaqenjini eHollywoodbets Super League ngemuva kokuba iSouth African Football Association (Safa) ngokubambisana neHollywoodbets engabaxhasi, bememezele ukwethulwa kohlelo olusha lwamaqoqo amabili eligi yesizini ka-2026 yeHollywoodbets Super League. Lokhu kusho ukuthi isizini ka-2026 yeSuper League ezoqala ngochungechunge lwemidlalo  ngempelasonto kaMeyi 22-24, ezinkundleni zase-University of Johannesburg Soweto Campus, eSoweto, izobe inamaqoqo amabili okuyi-Super Rise no-Super Era. Kweminye imidlalo, amaqembu azodlala enkundleni eyodwa ngosuku. Amaqembu azoba yisishiyagalombili iqoqo ngalinye kule ligi enamaqembu angu-16. Ku-Super Rise kuboshelwe iMamelodi Sundowns Ladies, TS Galaxy Queens, University of Western Cape (UWC), University of Johannesburg, Stellenbosch FC, University of Pretoria, Ezemvelo Women’s FC neDiepkloof Ladies FC. Ku-Super Era kuboshelwe i-JVW FC, University of Fort Hare, Tshwane University of Technology (TUT), Richmond United Ladies, City Lads FC, First Touch Ladies neRamatlaohle FC. Le ligi kazwelonke yebhola labesifazane okuyiyona enkulu eNingizimu Afrika nephakela ngabadlali iqembu lesizwe lakuleli, iBanyana Banyana, yasungulwa ngo-2019 ngamaqembu angu-12. Amaqembu azodla umhlanganiso ku-Super Rise no-Super Era azodlala amaPlay-Offs okuhlunga iqembu elingompetha bakazwelonke beSuper League ekupheleni kwesizini ngoNovemba. Oyisikhulu esiphezulu kwiSafa, uLydia Monyepao, uthe lezi zinguquko kuhloswe ngazo ukwenza ibhola labesifazane ligqame liphinde limaketheke. “Amaqembu akuGroup A awezukuba nalo ithuba lokudlala namaqembu kaGroup B kuze kube sekupheleni kwesizini sekudlala ama-Play Off,” kusho uMonyepao izolo, kwethulwa iHollywoodbets Super League. “Sizokwenyusa izinga lokubukwa kwemidlalo ngokuba nemidlalo nama-festival (imidlalo edlalwa ngosuku olulodwa enkundleni eyodwa). Lokhu okusho ukuthi uma ukhuluma ngesibalo sezibukeli ezihambela imidlalo yebhola labesifazane, sizobona izibukeli eziningi, ezinye ezizobe zibuka kumabonakude. Lokho kuzonika bonke abadlali ithuba lokubonakala kumabonakude.”

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Video Assistant Referee Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX NAKUBA i-South African Football Association (Safa) isikuqinisekisile ukuthi i-Video Assistant Referee (VAR) izoqala ukusebenza ngesizini ezayo ka-2026/2027 emidlalweni yeBetway Premiership kodwa onompempe bayayichitha eyokuma ngomumo ekuqaleni ukusebenza kwalolu hlelo. Usihlalo wekomiti lemali kwiSafa, uMxolisi Sibam, ukuqinisekisile esithangamini nabezindaba ngempelasonto, ukuthi sebeyitholile imali engu-R20 million abayinikwe nguMnyango wezeMidlalo, ubuCiko namaSiko oholwa nguNgqongqoshe, uGayton McKenzie, ukuze kuqale ukusebenza kwe-VAR emidlalweni yePremiership. Nyakenye, uMcKenzie uveze ukuthi konke sekusezandleni zeSafa. Ngokusho kukaSibam, iSafa izosebenzisana nePremier Soccer League (PSL) ukwethula lolu hlelo lobuchwepheshe be-VAR, abahlela ukuthi luqale ukusebenza ngesizini ezayo. “Uhulumeni usesinikezile u-R20 million wokuthi siqale uhlelo lwe-VAR. Imali isikhona ebhange futhi ngingakuqinisekisa ukuthi ikwi-akhawunti eseceleni engahlangene namanye asetshenziswa yiSafa. Kuzofanele silandele yonke imigomo nemibandela yeSafa nekahulumeni,” kusho uSibam. “INingizimu Afrika yiyona ehamba phambili ezwenikazini lase-Afrika ngakho asifuni ukusalela ngemuva uma sekuziwa kwi-VAR. Asevele asekhona amazwe amane lapha e-Afrika aseyiqalile ukuyisebenzisa i-VAR ngakho asifuni ukusala ngemuva. Sizibophezele ekuqinisekiseni ukuthi ukuthi i-VAR iba yinto ngempela kuleli zwe.” Kwenzeka lokhu nje, sekuyisikhathi abalandeli bebhola baseNingizimu Afrika nabaqeqeshi bekhala ngokwethulwa kwe-VAR ngenxa yezinqumo zonompempe ezishayisa amakhala kweminye imidlalo yePremiership. Omunye wonompempe asebemnkantshubomvu olumane indlebe neSolezwe ngalolu hlelo lwe-VAR okubikwa ukuthi lungase luqale ngesizini ezayo, ukufanisa nokugagamela okushiwo yiSafa ngokuqala kwalolu hlelo lwe-VAR ngesizini ezayo. “Kuyiphutha ukuthi sebekulungele (abeSafa nePSL) ukuqala kwe-VAR. Mhlawumbe bona ngabe bathi sebekulungele ukuqala ukufundisa onompempe ngokusebenza kwe-VAR, hhayi ukuthi onompempe sebeyilungele i-VAR. Bayisikhombisa kuphela onompempe abadlalisa kwi-PSL abasaqeqeshelwe ukusebenzisa i-VAR. Baningi abasadinga ukuqeqeshwa kulolu hlelo ngakho kusazothatha isikhathi impela. Kuthatha izinyanga eziyisithupha ukuqeqesha onompempe ngolwazi lwe-VAR,” kusho lo nompempe ongeke adalulwe. . Lo nompempe uqhube wathi okunye okusazodala ubunzima ngokwethulwa kwe-VAR wukuthi amaqembu adlala kwiPremiership kawanazo izinkundla zawo njengoba ziphethwe ngomasipala. “Izinkundla zisetshenziselwa imicimbi ehlukene, kwesinye isikhathi amadili omculo nemicimbi yamaqembu ezepolitiki neminye. Ngakho amakhamera e-VAR angazithola esengcupheni yokucekeleka phansi, ekubeni kubiza ukufakwa kwawo ezinkundleni. Ngakho akukezukuba yinto elula ukuqala ngokushesha ukusebenza kohlelo lwe-VAR eNingizimu Afrika njengoba kucatshangwa.” U-Abdul Ebrahim oyinhloko yonompempe kwiSafa, usanda kucashunwa eyiqinisekisa eyokuqala kwe-VAR ekuqaleni kwesizini ka-2026/2027. Konompempe abaqeqeshelwe i-VAR, kubalwa u-Abongile Tom, Zakhele Siwela, Akhona Makalima, Jelly Chavani, Eugene Mdluli noLuxolo Badi.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe USIHLALO weDurban City, uFarook Kadodia, ephahlwe nguNdunankulu waKwaZulu-Natal, uThami Ntuli, umengameli weKZN Sports Confederation, uThami Mchunu, umqeqeshi uPitso Dladla, uMphathiswa wezeMidlalo, uMntomuhle Khawula, nabadlali emcimbini wokuhlonipha leli qembu eSouthern Sun Hotel, eThekwini UMPHATHISWA wezeMidlalo, ubuCiko namaSiko KwaZulu-Natal, uMntomuhle Khawula, unxuse ukwesekana emaqenjini esifundazwe adlala kwiPremier Soccer League (PSL) ukuze impumelelo yeDurban City yokuzuza isicoco seNedbank Cup ibe yisikhuthazi nakwamanye akulesi sifundazwe. UKhawula ukusho lokhu ekhuluma nabezindaba emcimbini wokubungaza ukunqoba kweCity iNedbank Cup obuseSouthern Sun Hotel, eThekwini, ngeSonto. Lo mcimbi bewuthanyelwe yizikhulu zeCity, okubalwa kuzo usihlalo, uFarook Kadodia, abadlali nethimba labaqeqeshi, abaxhasi beCity, aboMnyango wezeMidlalo, ubuCiko namaSiko, uNdunankulu wesifundazwe, uThami Ntuli, izikhulu zeSafa KwaZulu-Natal nesifunda iTheku neKwaZulu-Natal Sports Confederation. “Eminyakeni ewu-16 isifundazwe sakithi KwaZulu-Natal sagcina ukunqoba indebe, abafana bamaCitizens bakwenzile lokho, basiqeda isomiso sezindebe. Ngakho sibonga kakhulu kumqeqeshi, uPitso Dladla, usihlalo uKadodia (Farook), ithimba labaqeqeshi, nawo wonke umuntu oyingxenye yaleli qembu ofake isandla empumelelweni yalo. Okuqaphelekayo wukuthi yisizini yokuqala le iDurban City ingenile esigabeni esikhulu seBetway Premiership, kodwa isikwi-Top 8 futhi ayisaphumi, yaphinda yathatha indebe. Siyathokoza futhi ukuthi njengamanje kwi-Top 8 AmaZulu akhona, iGolden Arrows ibukeka izoba khona, neRichards Bay iyasondela,” kusho uKhawula. “Lokhu kusinika ithemba lokuthi kungenzeka sibe namaqembu amaningana kwi-MTN8 ngesizini ezayo. Impumelelo yeDurban City kufanele ibe yisikhuthazi nakwamanye amaqembu akulesi sifundazwe engifisa ukuthi kube nokubambisana kuwona, yize edlala ngokuncintisana. Ukubambisana nokwesekana kwawo kungahamba ibanga ekubuyiseni isithunzi nempumelelo ebholeni laKwaZulu-Natal, eyikhaya lebhola. NeMilford FC noma ingakwazanga ukunqoba iligi (yeMotsepe Foundation Championship), nayo sinethemba lokuthi izophumelela kuma-Play-Offs, yandise isibalo samaqembu akulesi sifundazwe kwiPremiership, futhi sizoyeseka.” ICitizens ibe yiqembu lokuqala laseKZN elinqobe isicoco selokhu kwagcina iLamontville Golden Arrows ngo-2009 inqoba indebe ye-MTN8. Usihlalo weCitizens, uKadodia, uzwakalise ukuthobeka ngomcimbi abawenzelwe wuMnyango wezeMidlalo esifundazweni ukubabonga nokubahlonipha ngokunqoba kwabo iNedbank. “Ibhola laKwaZulu-Natal bekungafanele lilinde isikhathi eside kangaka ukuthola impumelelo. Futhi amaqembu aKwaZulu-Natal akufanele adonse kanzima avike izembe kuwona wonke amasizini. Ibhola kufanele libe yimboni, lithuthukise abantu, lidale amathuba omsebenzi lithuthukise nezokuvakasha. Uma ibhola lisebenza, nomphakathi uyasebenza. Ligcina intsha imatasa, ihlengeke ezidakamizweni nasebugebengwini,” kusho uKadodia. Namuhla ngo-12.30 emini ezitaladini zaseThekwini, kuzoba nombhiyozo weCity nendebe yeNedbank Cup. Kuzosukwa eKing Dinuzulu Park, kubhekwe eMoses Mabhida Stadium.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UNOZINTI weDurban City, u-Ayanda Mtshali, odalule ukuthi usethi khumu ebholeni elikhokhelayo ekupheleni kwale sizini I-DURBAN City ezodlala kwiCaf Confederation Cup ngesizini ezayo, inenselelo yokuphuma inqina iyozingela unozinti njengoba onozinti bayo ababili, uDarren Keet no-Ayanda “Pepe” Mtshali, bewaphanyeka emgibeni amagilavu ekupheleni kwesizini. Kungakapholi maseko uKeet (36) ememezele ukuthi useyayeka ukudlala ibhola, uMtshali naye usedalule ukuthi yisizini yakhe yokugcina lena. UMtshali (38) odabuka eSection 3, eMadadeni, eNewcastle, uveze ukuthi isinqumo wasithatha ngemuva kokuthi iCity iwine isicoco seligi seMotsepe Foundation Championship ngesizini edlule. Uthe ubehlele ukuthi uzodlala isizini eyodwa kwiBetway Premiership. “Ngibone sekuyisikhathi sokuthi nginike abanye ithuba, ikakhulukazi njengoba bengingasalitholi ithuba lokudlala njalo. Kule minyaka yobudala engikuyona njengamanje ngidinga ukudlala njalo. "Ngemuva kokuwina kwethu iligi yeMotsepe Foundation Championship ngesizini edlule, bekuvele kusezinhlelweni zami ukuthi ngidlale isizini eyodwa kwiBetway Premiership, bese ngithatha umhlalaphansi ebholeni. "Okungijabulisayo ukuthi ngiyeke ibhola nendondo yegolide ngokuwina indebe yeNedbank Cup neqembu lami iDurban City,” kusho uMtshali, oqale ukudlala ibhola elikhokhelayo ngesizini ka-2010/11 kwiBlack Leopards. Udlale nakwiFree State Stars, Bloemfontein Celtic, Chippa United, ngaphambi kokujoyina iCity ngesizini ka-2023/24 isabizwa ngeMaritzburg United. Uthe yize esengene endimeni yomculo kodwa ngeke aphume ebholeni njengoba esezinhlelweni zokuzithuthukisa ngolwazi lokuqeqesha. Uneziqu ze-Caf D Licence. “Bengivele nginothando lomculo kusukela ebuncaneni bami. Ngo-2018, ngavula i-studio i-Unified Entertainment eGoli, nomfowethu omncane, u-Anele. "Sike sama iminyaka embalwa, kwathi ngoJanuwari kulo nyaka, saphinda sasivula i-studio, sasayinisa abaculi abayisithupha ukuqopha kuso. "Sengiqalile ukuqeqesha onozinti eqenjini lethu leDiski Challenge.
